authors_text: Leonardo Kanashiro Felizardo,Francisco Caio Lima Paiva,Anna Helena Reali Costa,Emilio Del-Moral-Hernandez
title: Reinforcement Learning Applied to Trading Systems: A Survey
title_zh: 强化学习应用于交易系统：调查
abstract: Financial domain tasks, such as trading in market exchanges, are challenging and have long attracted researchers. The recent achievements and the consequent notoriety of Reinforcement Learning (RL) have also increased its adoption in trading tasks. RL uses a framework with well-established formal concepts, which raises its attractiveness in learning profitable trading strategies. However, RL use without due attention in the financial area can prevent new researchers from following standards or failing to adopt relevant conceptual guidelines. In this work, we embrace the seminal RL technical fundamentals, concepts, and recommendations to perform a unified, theoretically-grounded examination and comparison of previous research that could serve as a structuring guide for the field of study. A selection of twenty-nine articles was reviewed under our classification that considers RL's most common formulations and design patterns from a large volume of available studies. This classification allowed for precise inspection of the most relevant aspects regarding data input, preprocessing, state and action composition, adopted RL techniques, evaluation setups, and overall results. Our analysis approach organized around fundamental RL concepts allowed for a clear identification of current system design best practices, gaps that require further investigation, and promising research opportunities. Finally, this review attempts to promote the development of this field of study by facilitating researchers' commitment to standards adherence and helping them to avoid straying away from the RL constructs' firm ground.

abstract_zh: 金融领域的任务，例如市场交易所的交易，具有挑战性，长期以来一直吸引着研究人员。强化学习（RL）最近的成就和随之而来的恶名也增加了它在交易任务中的采用。强化学习使用具有完善的形式概念的框架，这提高了其在学习有利可图的交易策略方面的吸引力。然而，如果在金融领域使用强化学习而没有给予应有的重视，可能会导致新研究人员无法遵循标准或无法采用相关的概念指南。在这项工作中，我们采用了开创性的强化学习技术基础、概念和建议，对先前的研究进行统一的、有理论基础的检查和比较，这可以作为该研究领域的结构指南。根据我们的分类审查了精选的 29 篇文章，这些文章考虑了来自大量可用研究的 RL 最常见的公式和设计模式。这种分类允许精确检查数据输入、预处理、状态和动作组成、采用的 RL 技术、评估设置和总体结果等最相关的方面。我们的分析方法围绕基本的强化学习概念进行组织，可以清楚地识别当前的系统设计最佳实践、需要进一步调查的差距以及有希望的研究机会。最后，这篇综述试图通过促进研究人员对标准遵守的承诺并帮助他们避免偏离强化学习结构的坚实基础来促进这一研究领域的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文对强化学习在交易系统中的应用进行综述，分析现有研究的设计模式与最佳实践，识别研究空白。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在交易领域应用广泛，但缺乏统一标准可能导致研究者偏离理论框架，需系统梳理现有成果以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 基于强化学习核心概念分类筛选29篇文献，从数据预处理、状态动作设计、算法选择及评估方法等维度进行对比分析。
AI.result: 总结出现阶段交易系统设计的最佳实践，发现数据处理与评估指标等领域的研究缺口，并提出潜在研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论框架规范化研究路径，推动交易系统领域标准化发展，为后续研究提供清晰指引。

authors_text: Deeksha Varshney,Aizan Zafar,Niranshu Kumar Behra,Asif Ekbal
title: CDialog: A Multi-turn Covid-19 Conversation Dataset for Entity-Aware Dialog Generation
title_zh: CDialog：用于生成实体感知对话的多轮 Covid-19 对话数据集
abstract: The development of conversational agents to interact with patients and deliver clinical advice has attracted the interest of many researchers, particularly in light of the COVID-19 pandemic. The training of an end-to-end neural based dialog system, on the other hand, is hampered by a lack of multi-turn medical dialog corpus. We make the very first attempt to release a high-quality multi-turn Medical Dialog dataset relating to Covid-19 disease named CDialog, with over 1K conversations collected from the online medical counselling websites. We annotate each utterance of the conversation with seven different categories of medical entities, including diseases, symptoms, medical tests, medical history, remedies, medications and other aspects as additional labels. Finally, we propose a novel neural medical dialog system based on the CDialog dataset to advance future research on developing automated medical dialog systems. We use pre-trained language models for dialogue generation, incorporating annotated medical entities, to generate a virtual doctor's response that addresses the patient's query. Experimental results show that the proposed dialog models perform comparably better when supplemented with entity information and hence can improve the response quality.
summary: The development of conversational agents to interact with patients and deliver clinical advice has attracted the interest of many researchers, particularly in light of the COVID-19 pandemic. The training of an end-to-end neural based dialog system, on the other hand, is hampered by a lack of multi-turn medical dialog corpus. We make the very first attempt to release a high-quality multi-turn Medical Dialog dataset relating to Covid-19 disease named CDialog, with over 1K conversations collected from the online medical counselling websites. We annotate each utterance of the conversation with seven different categories of medical entities, including diseases, symptoms, medical tests, medical history, remedies, medications and other aspects as additional labels. Finally, we propose a novel neural medical dialog system based on the CDialog dataset to advance future research on developing automated medical dialog systems. We use pre-trained language models for dialogue generation, incorporating annotated medical entities, to generate a virtual doctor's response that addresses the patient's query. Experimental results show that the proposed dialog models perform comparably better when supplemented with entity information and hence can improve the response quality.
abstract_zh: 开发与患者互动并提供临床建议的对话代理吸引了许多研究人员的兴趣，特别是考虑到 COVID-19 大流行。另一方面，基于端到端神经的对话系统的训练因缺乏多轮医学对话语料库而受到阻碍。我们首次尝试发布与 Covid-19 疾病相关的高质量多轮医疗对话数据集，名为 CDialog，从在线医疗咨询网站收集了超过 1000 条对话。我们用七种不同类别的医学实体来注释对话的每句话，包括疾病、症状、医学检查、病史、补救措施、药物和其他方面作为附加标签。最后，我们提出了一种基于 CDialog 数据集的新型神经医疗对话系统，以推进未来开发自动化医疗对话系统的研究。我们使用预先训练的语言模型来生成对话，结合带注释的医疗实体，生成虚拟医生的响应来解决患者的询问。实验结果表明，所提出的对话模型在补充实体信息时表现相对更好，因此可以提高响应质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CDialog数据集，用于实体感知的新冠多轮对话生成，并开发基于预训练语言模型的医疗对话系统。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏高质量多轮医疗对话语料库，限制了端到端对话系统的训练与优化。
AI.method: 构建包含1000+对话的新冠医疗咨询数据集，标注7类医学实体（疾病/症状/检查等），并设计融合实体信息的预训练对话模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合实体标注的对话模型在响应质量上优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: CDialog数据集及实体增强方法为自动化医疗对话系统研究提供了新基准与技术路径。

authors_text: Md Sultan Al Nahian,Spencer Frazier,Brent Harrison,Mark Riedl
title: Machine Learning Approaches for Principle Prediction in Naturally Occurring Stories
title_zh: 自然发生的故事中原理预测的机器学习方法
comment: Nahian and Frazier contributed equally to this work
comments: Nahian and Frazier contributed equally to this work
abstract: Value alignment is the task of creating autonomous systems whose values align with those of humans. Past work has shown that stories are a potentially rich source of information on human values; however, past work has been limited to considering values in a binary sense. In this work, we explore the use of machine learning models for the task of normative principle prediction on naturally occurring story data. To do this, we extend a dataset that has been previously used to train a binary normative classifier with annotations of moral principles. We then use this dataset to train a variety of machine learning models, evaluate these models and compare their results against humans who were asked to perform the same task. We show that while individual principles can be classified, the ambiguity of what "moral principles" represent, poses a challenge for both human participants and autonomous systems which are faced with the same task.
summary: Value alignment is the task of creating autonomous systems whose values align with those of humans. Past work has shown that stories are a potentially rich source of information on human values; however, past work has been limited to considering values in a binary sense. In this work, we explore the use of machine learning models for the task of normative principle prediction on naturally occurring story data. To do this, we extend a dataset that has been previously used to train a binary normative classifier with annotations of moral principles. We then use this dataset to train a variety of machine learning models, evaluate these models and compare their results against humans who were asked to perform the same task. We show that while individual principles can be classified, the ambiguity of what "moral principles" represent, poses a challenge for both human participants and autonomous systems which are faced with the same task.
abstract_zh: 价值一致性是创建其价值观与人类价值观一致的自治系统的任务。过去的研究表明，故事是人类价值观的潜在丰富信息来源。然而，过去的工作仅限于考虑二元意义上的值。在这项工作中，我们探索使用机器学习模型来完成自然发生的故事数据的规范原理预测任务。为此，我们扩展了之前用于训练具有道德原则注释的二元规范分类器的数据集。然后，我们使用该数据集来训练各种机器学习模型，评估这些模型并将其结果与被要求执行相同任务的人类进行比较。我们表明，虽然个体原则可以分类，但“道德原则”所代表的模糊性给人类参与者和面临相同任务的自治系统带来了挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文探索使用机器学习模型预测自然故事中的规范道德原则。
AI.motivation: 价值对齐是构建自主系统的关键，但现有研究多局限于二元道德判断，需更细致分析故事中的道德原则。
AI.method: 扩展道德原则标注数据集，训练多种机器学习模型并评估其与人类标注结果的对比表现。
AI.result: 模型可分类个别道德原则，但道德原则定义的模糊性导致人机判断均存在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习在道德原则预测中展现潜力，但需解决概念模糊性和标注一致性问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探索使用机器学习模型预测自然故事中的规范道德原则。

search_text: Machine Learning Approaches for Principle Prediction in Naturally Occurring Stories 自然发生的故事中原理预测的机器学习方法 Value alignment is the task of creating autonomous systems whose values align with those of humans. Past work has shown that stories are a potentially rich source of information on human values; however, past work has been limited to considering values in a binary sense. In this work, we explore the use of machine learning models for the task of normative principle prediction on naturally occurring story data. To do this, we extend a dataset that has been previously used to train a binary normative classifier with annotations of moral principles. We then use this dataset to train a variety of machine learning models, evaluate these models and compare their results against humans who were asked to perform the same task. We show that while individual principles can be classified, the ambiguity of what "moral principles" represent, poses a challenge for both human participants and autonomous systems which are faced with the same task. 价值一致性是创建其价值观与人类价值观一致的自治系统的任务。过去的研究表明，故事是人类价值观的潜在丰富信息来源。然而，过去的工作仅限于考虑二元意义上的值。在这项工作中，我们探索使用机器学习模型来完成自然发生的故事数据的规范原理预测任务。为此，我们扩展了之前用于训练具有道德原则注释的二元规范分类器的数据集。然后，我们使用该数据集来训练各种机器学习模型，评估这些模型并将其结果与被要求执行相同任务的人类进行比较。我们表明，虽然个体原则可以分类，但“道德原则”所代表的模糊性给人类参与者和面临相同任务的自治系统带来了挑战。 本文探索使用机器学习模型预测自然故事中的规范道德原则。 Md Sultan Al Nahian,Spencer Frazier,Brent Harrison,Mark Riedl cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: You Zuo,Yixuan Li,Alma Parias García,Kim Gerdes
title: Technological taxonomies for hypernym and hyponym retrieval in patent texts
title_zh: 专利文本中上位词和下位词检索的技术分类法
comment: ToTh 2022 - Terminology & Ontology: Theories and applications, Jun 2022, Chamb{é}ry, France
comments: ToTh 2022 - Terminology & Ontology: Theories and applications, Jun 2022, Chamb{é}ry, France
abstract: This paper presents an automatic approach to creating taxonomies of technical terms based on the Cooperative Patent Classification (CPC). The resulting taxonomy contains about 170k nodes in 9 separate technological branches and is freely available. We also show that a Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer (T5) model can be fine-tuned to generate hypernyms and hyponyms with relatively high precision, confirming the manually assessed quality of the resource. The T5 model opens the taxonomy to any new technological terms for which a hypernym can be generated, thus making the resource updateable with new terms, an essential feature for the constantly evolving field of technological terminology.
summary: This paper presents an automatic approach to creating taxonomies of technical terms based on the Cooperative Patent Classification (CPC). The resulting taxonomy contains about 170k nodes in 9 separate technological branches and is freely available. We also show that a Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer (T5) model can be fine-tuned to generate hypernyms and hyponyms with relatively high precision, confirming the manually assessed quality of the resource. The T5 model opens the taxonomy to any new technological terms for which a hypernym can be generated, thus making the resource updateable with new terms, an essential feature for the constantly evolving field of technological terminology.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于合作专利分类 (CPC) 的自动创建技术术语分类法的方法。由此产生的分类法包含 9 个独立技术分支的约 17 万个节点，并且可以免费获得。我们还表明，可以对文本到文本传输转换器（T5）模型进行微调，以相对较高的精度生成上位词和下位词，从而确认手动评估的资源质量。 T5 模型为任何可以生成上位词的新技术术语开放了分类，从而使资源可以用新术语进行更新，这是不断发展的技术术语领域的一个基本特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合作专利分类（CPC）的自动方法，构建技术术语的超类与子类关系分类体系，并利用T5模型实现高精度的超类/子类检索。
AI.motivation: 专利文本中技术术语的动态更新需求与传统分类体系的静态性矛盾，亟需可扩展、可更新的术语关系资源。
AI.method: 基于CPC构建包含170k节点的多分支技术分类体系，通过微调T5模型实现术语超类/子类的自动生成与验证。
AI.result: 生成9个技术分支的分类体系，T5模型在超类/子类生成任务中达到较高精确率，支持新术语的动态扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为技术术语关系构建提供了可更新的解决方案，满足专利文本中不断演进的技术术语管理需求。

authors_text: Sam Ganzfried,Kevin A. Wang,Max Chiswick
title: Opponent Modeling in Multiplayer Imperfect-Information Games
title_zh: 多人不完全信息博弈中的对手建模
abstract: In many real-world settings agents engage in strategic interactions with multiple opposing agents who can employ a wide variety of strategies. The standard approach for designing agents for such settings is to compute or approximate a relevant game-theoretic solution concept such as Nash equilibrium and then follow the prescribed strategy. However, such a strategy ignores any observations of opponents' play, which may indicate shortcomings that can be exploited. We present an approach for opponent modeling in multiplayer imperfect-information games where we collect observations of opponents' play through repeated interactions. We run experiments against a wide variety of real opponents and exact Nash equilibrium strategies in three-player Kuhn poker and show that our algorithm significantly outperforms all of the agents, including the exact Nash equilibrium strategies.
summary: In many real-world settings agents engage in strategic interactions with multiple opposing agents who can employ a wide variety of strategies. The standard approach for designing agents for such settings is to compute or approximate a relevant game-theoretic solution concept such as Nash equilibrium and then follow the prescribed strategy. However, such a strategy ignores any observations of opponents' play, which may indicate shortcomings that can be exploited. We present an approach for opponent modeling in multiplayer imperfect-information games where we collect observations of opponents' play through repeated interactions. We run experiments against a wide variety of real opponents and exact Nash equilibrium strategies in three-player Kuhn poker and show that our algorithm significantly outperforms all of the agents, including the exact Nash equilibrium strategies.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实世界中，智能体与多个可以采用多种策略的对手智能体进行战略交互。 The standard approach for designing agents for such settings is to compute or approximate a relevant game-theoretic solution concept such as Nash equilibrium and then follow the prescribed strategy.然而，这种策略忽略了对对手比赛的任何观察，这可能表明可以利用的缺点。 We present an approach for opponent modeling in multiplayer imperfect-information games where we collect observations of opponents' play through repeated interactions. We run experiments against a wide variety of real opponents and exact Nash equilibrium strategies in three-player Kuhn poker and show that our algorithm significantly outperforms all of the agents, including the exact Nash equilibrium strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在多人不完全信息博弈中通过观察对手行为进行对手建模的方法，以提升智能体的策略效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖博弈论解概念（如纳什均衡）制定策略，但忽视对手实际行为的观察，可能导致策略缺陷被利用。
AI.method: 通过重复交互收集对手行为数据，建立对手策略模型并动态调整自身策略。
AI.result: 在三人Kuhn扑克实验中，该算法显著优于现有智能体及精确纳什均衡策略。
AI.conclusion: 基于对手行为观察的建模方法能有效提升多人不完全信息博弈中的策略表现，优于传统理论解方法。

authors_text: Xi Ye,Guillaume-Alexandre Bilodeau
title: Video Prediction by Efficient Transformers
title_zh: Efficient Transformers 的视频预测
comment: Accepted by Image and Vision Computing. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.15836
comments: Accepted by Image and Vision Computing. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.15836
abstract: Video prediction is a challenging computer vision task that has a wide range of applications. In this work, we present a new family of Transformer-based models for video prediction. Firstly, an efficient local spatial-temporal separation attention mechanism is proposed to reduce the complexity of standard Transformers. Then, a full autoregressive model, a partial autoregressive model and a non-autoregressive model are developed based on the new efficient Transformer. The partial autoregressive model has a similar performance with the full autoregressive model but a faster inference speed. The non-autoregressive model not only achieves a faster inference speed but also mitigates the quality degradation problem of the autoregressive counterparts, but it requires additional parameters and loss function for learning. Given the same attention mechanism, we conducted a comprehensive study to compare the proposed three video prediction variants. Experiments show that the proposed video prediction models are competitive with more complex state-of-the-art convolutional-LSTM based models. The source code is available at https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR.
summary: Video prediction is a challenging computer vision task that has a wide range of applications. In this work, we present a new family of Transformer-based models for video prediction. Firstly, an efficient local spatial-temporal separation attention mechanism is proposed to reduce the complexity of standard Transformers. Then, a full autoregressive model, a partial autoregressive model and a non-autoregressive model are developed based on the new efficient Transformer. The partial autoregressive model has a similar performance with the full autoregressive model but a faster inference speed. The non-autoregressive model not only achieves a faster inference speed but also mitigates the quality degradation problem of the autoregressive counterparts, but it requires additional parameters and loss function for learning. Given the same attention mechanism, we conducted a comprehensive study to compare the proposed three video prediction variants. Experiments show that the proposed video prediction models are competitive with more complex state-of-the-art convolutional-LSTM based models. The source code is available at https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR.
abstract_zh: 视频预测是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，具有广泛的应用范围。在这项工作中，我们提出了一系列基于 Transformer 的新视频预测模型。首先，提出了一种高效的局部时空分离注意力机制，以降低标准 Transformer 的复杂度。然后，基于新型高效Transformer，开发了完全自回归模型、部分自回归模型和非自回归模型。部分自回归模型与完全自回归模型具有相似的性能，但推理速度更快。非自回归模型不仅可以实现更快的推理速度，还可以减轻自回归模型的质量下降问题，但它需要额外的参数和损失函数来进行学习。考虑到相同的注意力机制，我们进行了一项全面的研究来比较所提出的三种视频预测变体。实验表明，所提出的视频预测模型与更复杂的最先进的基于卷积 LSTM 的模型具有竞争力。源代码可在 https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于高效Transformer的视频预测模型，通过改进注意力机制和设计多种预测模型以提升效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在视频预测中存在计算复杂度高、推理速度慢及质量退化等问题，需寻求更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出局部时空分离注意力机制降低复杂度，并开发全自回归、部分自回归和非自回归三种模型，分别优化速度与质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提模型在保持性能的同时，部分自回归模型推理速度更快，非自回归模型缓解了质量退化问题，且整体效果与复杂卷积-LSTM模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 高效Transformer为视频预测提供了兼顾效率与质量的新方法，未来可进一步优化参数与损失函数设计。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于高效Transformer的视频预测模型，通过改进注意力机制和设计多种预测模型以提升效率和质量。
ai_content.motivation: 传统Transformer在视频预测中存在计算复杂度高、推理速度慢及质量退化等问题，需寻求更高效的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 提出局部时空分离注意力机制降低复杂度，并开发全自回归、部分自回归和非自回归三种模型，分别优化速度与质量。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，所提模型在保持性能的同时，部分自回归模型推理速度更快，非自回归模型缓解了质量退化问题，且整体效果与复杂卷积-LSTM模型相当。
ai_content.conclusion: 高效Transformer为视频预测提供了兼顾效率与质量的新方法，未来可进一步优化参数与损失函数设计。

search_text: Video Prediction by Efficient Transformers Efficient Transformers 的视频预测 Video prediction is a challenging computer vision task that has a wide range of applications. In this work, we present a new family of Transformer-based models for video prediction. Firstly, an efficient local spatial-temporal separation attention mechanism is proposed to reduce the complexity of standard Transformers. Then, a full autoregressive model, a partial autoregressive model and a non-autoregressive model are developed based on the new efficient Transformer. The partial autoregressive model has a similar performance with the full autoregressive model but a faster inference speed. The non-autoregressive model not only achieves a faster inference speed but also mitigates the quality degradation problem of the autoregressive counterparts, but it requires additional parameters and loss function for learning. Given the same attention mechanism, we conducted a comprehensive study to compare the proposed three video prediction variants. Experiments show that the proposed video prediction models are competitive with more complex state-of-the-art convolutional-LSTM based models. The source code is available at https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR. 视频预测是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，具有广泛的应用范围。在这项工作中，我们提出了一系列基于 Transformer 的新视频预测模型。首先，提出了一种高效的局部时空分离注意力机制，以降低标准 Transformer 的复杂度。然后，基于新型高效Transformer，开发了完全自回归模型、部分自回归模型和非自回归模型。部分自回归模型与完全自回归模型具有相似的性能，但推理速度更快。非自回归模型不仅可以实现更快的推理速度，还可以减轻自回归模型的质量下降问题，但它需要额外的参数和损失函数来进行学习。考虑到相同的注意力机制，我们进行了一项全面的研究来比较所提出的三种视频预测变体。实验表明，所提出的视频预测模型与更复杂的最先进的基于卷积 LSTM 的模型具有竞争力。源代码可在 https://github.com/XiYe20/VPTR 获取。 本文提出基于高效Transformer的视频预测模型，通过改进注意力机制和设计多种预测模型以提升效率和质量。 Xi Ye,Guillaume-Alexandre Bilodeau cs.CV

authors_text: Dawei Du,Ameya Shringi,Anthony Hoogs,Christopher Funk
title: Reconstructing Humpty Dumpty: Multi-feature Graph Autoencoder for Open Set Action Recognition
title_zh: 重构 Humpty Dumpty：用于开集动作识别的多功能图自动编码器
abstract: Most action recognition datasets and algorithms assume a closed world, where all test samples are instances of the known classes. In open set problems, test samples may be drawn from either known or unknown classes. Existing open set action recognition methods are typically based on extending closed set methods by adding post hoc analysis of classification scores or feature distances and do not capture the relations among all the video clip elements. Our approach uses the reconstruction error to determine the novelty of the video since unknown classes are harder to put back together and thus have a higher reconstruction error than videos from known classes. We refer to our solution to the open set action recognition problem as "Humpty Dumpty", due to its reconstruction abilities. Humpty Dumpty is a novel graph-based autoencoder that accounts for contextual and semantic relations among the clip pieces for improved reconstruction. A larger reconstruction error leads to an increased likelihood that the action can not be reconstructed, i.e., can not put Humpty Dumpty back together again, indicating that the action has never been seen before and is novel/unknown. Extensive experiments are performed on two publicly available action recognition datasets including HMDB-51 and UCF-101, showing the state-of-the-art performance for open set action recognition.
summary: Most action recognition datasets and algorithms assume a closed world, where all test samples are instances of the known classes. In open set problems, test samples may be drawn from either known or unknown classes. Existing open set action recognition methods are typically based on extending closed set methods by adding post hoc analysis of classification scores or feature distances and do not capture the relations among all the video clip elements. Our approach uses the reconstruction error to determine the novelty of the video since unknown classes are harder to put back together and thus have a higher reconstruction error than videos from known classes. We refer to our solution to the open set action recognition problem as "Humpty Dumpty", due to its reconstruction abilities. Humpty Dumpty is a novel graph-based autoencoder that accounts for contextual and semantic relations among the clip pieces for improved reconstruction. A larger reconstruction error leads to an increased likelihood that the action can not be reconstructed, i.e., can not put Humpty Dumpty back together again, indicating that the action has never been seen before and is novel/unknown. Extensive experiments are performed on two publicly available action recognition datasets including HMDB-51 and UCF-101, showing the state-of-the-art performance for open set action recognition.
abstract_zh: 大多数动作识别数据集和算法都假设一个封闭的世界，其中所有测试样本都是已知类的实例。在开放集问题中，测试样本可以从已知或未知的类中抽取。现有的开放集动作识别方法通常基于通过添加分类分数或特征距离的事后分析来扩展封闭集方法，并且不捕获所有视频剪辑元素之间的关系。我们的方法使用重建误差来确定视频的新颖性，因为未知类更难组合在一起，因此比已知类的视频具有更高的重建误差。由于其重建能力，我们将开放集动作识别问题的解决方案称为“Humpty Dumpty”。 Humpty Dumpty 是一种新颖的基于图的自动编码器，它考虑了剪辑片段之间的上下文和语义关系，以改进重建。较大的重建误差导致该动作无法重建的可能性增加，即无法将矮胖子再次组合在一起，这表明该动作以前从未见过并且是新颖/未知的。在两个公开可用的动作识别数据集（包括 HMDB-51 和 UCF-101）上进行了大量实验，显示了开放集动作识别的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多特征图自编码器的开放集动作识别方法，通过重建误差判断视频动作是否属于已知类别。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集动作识别方法依赖分类得分或特征距离分析，无法有效捕捉视频片段间的上下文和语义关系，导致未知类别识别效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计名为Humpty Dumpty的图自编码器，利用视频片段间的多特征关系进行重建，通过重建误差高低判断动作是否为未知类别。
AI.result: 在HMDB-51和UCF-101数据集上达到开放集动作识别的最先进性能，验证了重建误差区分已知/未知类别的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 重建误差能有效表征动作新颖性，所提方法通过建模视频片段间关系改进了开放集识别，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Amr Farahat,Felix Effenberger,Martin Vinck
title: A novel feature-scrambling approach reveals the capacity of convolutional neural networks to learn spatial relations
title_zh: 一种新颖的特征置乱方法揭示了卷积神经网络学习空间关系的能力
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are one of the most successful computer vision systems to solve object recognition. Furthermore, CNNs have major applications in understanding the nature of visual representations in the human brain. Yet it remains poorly understood how CNNs actually make their decisions, what the nature of their internal representations is, and how their recognition strategies differ from humans. Specifically, there is a major debate about the question of whether CNNs primarily rely on surface regularities of objects, or whether they are capable of exploiting the spatial arrangement of features, similar to humans. Here, we develop a novel feature-scrambling approach to explicitly test whether CNNs use the spatial arrangement of features (i.e. object parts) to classify objects. We combine this approach with a systematic manipulation of effective receptive field sizes of CNNs as well as minimal recognizable configurations (MIRCs) analysis. In contrast to much previous literature, we provide evidence that CNNs are in fact capable of using relatively long-range spatial relationships for object classification. Moreover, the extent to which CNNs use spatial relationships depends heavily on the dataset, e.g. texture vs. sketch. In fact, CNNs even use different strategies for different classes within heterogeneous datasets (ImageNet), suggesting CNNs have a continuous spectrum of classification strategies. Finally, we show that CNNs learn the spatial arrangement of features only up to an intermediate level of granularity, which suggests that intermediate rather than global shape features provide the optimal trade-off between sensitivity and specificity in object classification. These results provide novel insights into the nature of CNN representations and the extent to which they rely on the spatial arrangement of features for object classification.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are one of the most successful computer vision systems to solve object recognition. Furthermore, CNNs have major applications in understanding the nature of visual representations in the human brain. Yet it remains poorly understood how CNNs actually make their decisions, what the nature of their internal representations is, and how their recognition strategies differ from humans. Specifically, there is a major debate about the question of whether CNNs primarily rely on surface regularities of objects, or whether they are capable of exploiting the spatial arrangement of features, similar to humans. Here, we develop a novel feature-scrambling approach to explicitly test whether CNNs use the spatial arrangement of features (i.e. object parts) to classify objects. We combine this approach with a systematic manipulation of effective receptive field sizes of CNNs as well as minimal recognizable configurations (MIRCs) analysis. In contrast to much previous literature, we provide evidence that CNNs are in fact capable of using relatively long-range spatial relationships for object classification. Moreover, the extent to which CNNs use spatial relationships depends heavily on the dataset, e.g. texture vs. sketch. In fact, CNNs even use different strategies for different classes within heterogeneous datasets (ImageNet), suggesting CNNs have a continuous spectrum of classification strategies. Finally, we show that CNNs learn the spatial arrangement of features only up to an intermediate level of granularity, which suggests that intermediate rather than global shape features provide the optimal trade-off between sensitivity and specificity in object classification. These results provide novel insights into the nature of CNN representations and the extent to which they rely on the spatial arrangement of features for object classification.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）是解决对象识别问题最成功的计算机视觉系统之一。此外，CNN 在理解人脑视觉表征的本质方面也有重要应用。然而，人们对 CNN 实际上如何做出决策、其内部表征的本质是什么以及其识别策略与人类有何不同仍知之甚少。具体来说，关于 CNN 是否主要依赖于物体的表面规律性，或者它们是否能够像人类一样利用特征的空间排列，这一问题存在着重大争论。在这里，我们开发了一种新颖的特征置乱方法来明确测试 CNN 是否使用特征（即对象部分）的空间排列来对对象进行分类。我们将这种方法与 CNN 有效感受野大小的系统操作以及最小可识别配置 (MIRC) 分析相结合。与之前的许多文献相比，我们提供的证据表明 CNN 实际上能够使用相对较长范围的空间关系进行对象分类。此外，CNN 使用空间关系的程度在很大程度上取决于数据集，例如纹理与草图。事实上，CNN 甚至对异构数据集 (ImageNet) 中的不同类别使用不同的策略，这表明 CNN 具有连续的分类策略。最后，我们表明 CNN 只能学习到中等粒度级别的特征的空间排列，这表明中间形状特征而不是全局形状特征提供了对象分类中灵敏度和特异性之间的最佳权衡。这些结果为了解 CNN 表示的性质以及它们在多大程度上依赖特征的空间排列进行对象分类提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的特征扰乱方法，研究卷积神经网络（CNN）在物体分类中是否利用特征的空间排列关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在视觉识别中表现优异，但其决策机制和内部表征特性尚不明确，尤其关于CNN是否依赖物体表面规律或类似人类的空间特征排列存在争议。
AI.method: 开发特征扰乱方法，结合有效感受野大小调控与最小可识别配置（MIRCs）分析，系统测试CNN对空间关系的利用能力。
AI.result: CNN确实能利用长程空间关系进行分类，其策略受数据集类型（如纹理vs草图）影响，并在异质数据集（如ImageNet）中呈现连续策略谱系，最佳空间特征粒度为中间层次。
AI.conclusion: CNN的空间特征学习能力具有数据集依赖性，中间层次的形状特征在分类敏感性与特异性间达到最优平衡，揭示了CNN表征机制的复杂性。

method: 开发特征扰乱方法，结合有效感受野大小调控与最小可识别配置（MIRCs）分析，系统测试CNN对空间关系的利用能力。
result: CNN确实能利用长程空间关系进行分类，其策略受数据集类型（如纹理vs草图）影响，并在异质数据集（如ImageNet）中呈现连续策略谱系，最佳空间特征粒度为中间层次。
conclusion: CNN的空间特征学习能力具有数据集依赖性，中间层次的形状特征在分类敏感性与特异性间达到最优平衡，揭示了CNN表征机制的复杂性。
search_text: A novel feature-scrambling approach reveals the capacity of convolutional neural networks to learn spatial relations 一种新颖的特征置乱方法揭示了卷积神经网络学习空间关系的能力 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are one of the most successful computer vision systems to solve object recognition. Furthermore, CNNs have major applications in understanding the nature of visual representations in the human brain. Yet it remains poorly understood how CNNs actually make their decisions, what the nature of their internal representations is, and how their recognition strategies differ from humans. Specifically, there is a major debate about the question of whether CNNs primarily rely on surface regularities of objects, or whether they are capable of exploiting the spatial arrangement of features, similar to humans. Here, we develop a novel feature-scrambling approach to explicitly test whether CNNs use the spatial arrangement of features (i.e. object parts) to classify objects. We combine this approach with a systematic manipulation of effective receptive field sizes of CNNs as well as minimal recognizable configurations (MIRCs) analysis. In contrast to much previous literature, we provide evidence that CNNs are in fact capable of using relatively long-range spatial relationships for object classification. Moreover, the extent to which CNNs use spatial relationships depends heavily on the dataset, e.g. texture vs. sketch. In fact, CNNs even use different strategies for different classes within heterogeneous datasets (ImageNet), suggesting CNNs have a continuous spectrum of classification strategies. Finally, we show that CNNs learn the spatial arrangement of features only up to an intermediate level of granularity, which suggests that intermediate rather than global shape features provide the optimal trade-off between sensitivity and specificity in object classification. These results provide novel insights into the nature of CNN representations and the extent to which they rely on the spatial arrangement of features for object classification. 卷积神经网络（CNN）是解决对象识别问题最成功的计算机视觉系统之一。此外，CNN 在理解人脑视觉表征的本质方面也有重要应用。然而，人们对 CNN 实际上如何做出决策、其内部表征的本质是什么以及其识别策略与人类有何不同仍知之甚少。具体来说，关于 CNN 是否主要依赖于物体的表面规律性，或者它们是否能够像人类一样利用特征的空间排列，这一问题存在着重大争论。在这里，我们开发了一种新颖的特征置乱方法来明确测试 CNN 是否使用特征（即对象部分）的空间排列来对对象进行分类。我们将这种方法与 CNN 有效感受野大小的系统操作以及最小可识别配置 (MIRC) 分析相结合。与之前的许多文献相比，我们提供的证据表明 CNN 实际上能够使用相对较长范围的空间关系进行对象分类。此外，CNN 使用空间关系的程度在很大程度上取决于数据集，例如纹理与草图。事实上，CNN 甚至对异构数据集 (ImageNet) 中的不同类别使用不同的策略，这表明 CNN 具有连续的分类策略。最后，我们表明 CNN 只能学习到中等粒度级别的特征的空间排列，这表明中间形状特征而不是全局形状特征提供了对象分类中灵敏度和特异性之间的最佳权衡。这些结果为了解 CNN 表示的性质以及它们在多大程度上依赖特征的空间排列进行对象分类提供了新的见解。 本文提出一种新颖的特征扰乱方法，研究卷积神经网络（CNN）在物体分类中是否利用特征的空间排列关系。 Amr Farahat,Felix Effenberger,Martin Vinck cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Manuel Brack,Patrick Schramowski,Felix Friedrich,Dominik Hintersdorf,Kristian Kersting
title: The Stable Artist: Steering Semantics in Diffusion Latent Space
title_zh: 稳定的艺术家：扩散潜在空间中的转向语义
comment: This is a report of preliminary results. A full version of the paper is available at: arXiv:2301.12247
comments: This is a report of preliminary results. A full version of the paper is available at: arXiv:2301.12247
abstract: Large, text-conditioned generative diffusion models have recently gained a lot of attention for their impressive performance in generating high-fidelity images from text alone. However, achieving high-quality results is almost unfeasible in a one-shot fashion. On the contrary, text-guided image generation involves the user making many slight changes to inputs in order to iteratively carve out the envisioned image. However, slight changes to the input prompt often lead to entirely different images being generated, and thus the control of the artist is limited in its granularity. To provide flexibility, we present the Stable Artist, an image editing approach enabling fine-grained control of the image generation process. The main component is semantic guidance (SEGA) which steers the diffusion process along variable numbers of semantic directions. This allows for subtle edits to images, changes in composition and style, as well as optimization of the overall artistic conception. Furthermore, SEGA enables probing of latent spaces to gain insights into the representation of concepts learned by the model, even complex ones such as 'carbon emission'. We demonstrate the Stable Artist on several tasks, showcasing high-quality image editing and composition.
summary: Large, text-conditioned generative diffusion models have recently gained a lot of attention for their impressive performance in generating high-fidelity images from text alone. However, achieving high-quality results is almost unfeasible in a one-shot fashion. On the contrary, text-guided image generation involves the user making many slight changes to inputs in order to iteratively carve out the envisioned image. However, slight changes to the input prompt often lead to entirely different images being generated, and thus the control of the artist is limited in its granularity. To provide flexibility, we present the Stable Artist, an image editing approach enabling fine-grained control of the image generation process. The main component is semantic guidance (SEGA) which steers the diffusion process along variable numbers of semantic directions. This allows for subtle edits to images, changes in composition and style, as well as optimization of the overall artistic conception. Furthermore, SEGA enables probing of latent spaces to gain insights into the representation of concepts learned by the model, even complex ones such as 'carbon emission'. We demonstrate the Stable Artist on several tasks, showcasing high-quality image editing and composition.
abstract_zh: 大型文本条件生成扩散模型最近因其在仅从文本生成高保真图像方面的令人印象深刻的性能而受到了广泛关注。 However, achieving high-quality results is almost unfeasible in a one-shot fashion.相反，文本引导的图像生成涉及用户对输入进行许多细微的更改，以便迭代地雕刻出设想的图像。然而，输入提示的微小改变往往会导致生成完全不同的图像，因此艺术家的控制粒度受到限制。 To provide flexibility, we present the Stable Artist, an image editing approach enabling fine-grained control of the image generation process. The main component is semantic guidance (SEGA) which steers the diffusion process along variable numbers of semantic directions. This allows for subtle edits to images, changes in composition and style, as well as optimization of the overall artistic conception.此外，SEGA 能够探测潜在空间，以深入了解模型学到的概念的表示，甚至是“碳排放”等复杂的概念。 We demonstrate the Stable Artist on several tasks, showcasing high-quality image editing and composition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Stable Artist的图像编辑方法，通过语义引导（SEGA）在扩散模型的潜在空间中实现对图像生成过程的精细控制。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本引导图像生成方法在单次尝试中难以获得高质量结果，且微小的提示词调整可能导致生成图像发生显著变化，限制了用户对生成过程的精细控制能力。
AI.method: 提出语义引导（SEGA）技术，通过在扩散过程中沿可变数量的语义方向进行引导，实现图像的细微编辑、构图调整、风格变化及艺术概念优化，并支持对潜在空间进行探查以理解模型学习的概念表示。
AI.result: 在多个任务中验证了Stable Artist的有效性，展示了高质量的图像编辑与构图能力，同时揭示了模型对复杂概念（如'碳排放'）的潜在空间表征。
AI.conclusion: Stable Artist通过语义引导技术实现了对扩散模型生成过程的精细控制，为文本到图像生成与编辑提供了灵活工具，并深化了对模型潜在空间语义结构的理解。

authors_text: Yaofeng Desmond Zhong,Tongtao Zhang,Amit Chakraborty,Biswadip Dey
title: A Neural ODE Interpretation of Transformer Layers
title_zh: 变压器层的神经常微分方程解释
comment: ef:Published at the DLDE Workshop in NeurIPS 2022
comments: ef:Published at the DLDE Workshop in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Transformer layers, which use an alternating pattern of multi-head attention and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) layers, provide an effective tool for a variety of machine learning problems. As the transformer layers use residual connections to avoid the problem of vanishing gradients, they can be viewed as the numerical integration of a differential equation. In this extended abstract, we build upon this connection and propose a modification of the internal architecture of a transformer layer. The proposed model places the multi-head attention sublayer and the MLP sublayer parallel to each other. Our experiments show that this simple modification improves the performance of transformer networks in multiple tasks. Moreover, for the image classification task, we show that using neural ODE solvers with a sophisticated integration scheme further improves performance.
summary: Transformer layers, which use an alternating pattern of multi-head attention and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) layers, provide an effective tool for a variety of machine learning problems. As the transformer layers use residual connections to avoid the problem of vanishing gradients, they can be viewed as the numerical integration of a differential equation. In this extended abstract, we build upon this connection and propose a modification of the internal architecture of a transformer layer. The proposed model places the multi-head attention sublayer and the MLP sublayer parallel to each other. Our experiments show that this simple modification improves the performance of transformer networks in multiple tasks. Moreover, for the image classification task, we show that using neural ODE solvers with a sophisticated integration scheme further improves performance.
abstract_zh: Transformer 层使用多头注意力和多层感知器 (MLP) 层的交替模式，为各种机器学习问题提供了有效的工具。由于变压器层使用残差连接来避免梯度消失的问题，因此它们可以被视为微分方程的数值积分。在这个扩展摘要中，我们建立在这种连接的基础上，并提出了对变压器层内部架构的修改。所提出的模型将多头注意力子层和 MLP 子层彼此平行放置。我们的实验表明，这种简单的修改提高了变压器网络在多个任务中的性能。此外，对于图像分类任务，我们表明使用神经 ODE 求解器和复杂的集成方案可以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将Transformer层解释为神经微分方程，并提出通过并行化结构改进其性能的方案。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer通过残差连接避免梯度消失，但其交替结构可能限制了模型表达能力，需探索更高效的架构设计。
AI.method: 将多头注意力与MLP子层并行化，并采用神经ODE求解器进行数值积分以替代传统残差连接。
AI.result: 在多个任务中验证了并行结构的有效性，图像分类任务中结合ODE求解器的方案性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 并行化架构设计有效增强了Transformer性能，神经ODE方法为模型优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Giulio Biondi,Valentina Franzoni,Osvaldo Gervasi,Damiano Perri
title: An Approach for Improving Automatic Mouth Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 一种改进自动嘴部情绪识别的方法
comment: ef:Computational Science and Its Applications ICCSA 2019
comments: ef:Computational Science and Its Applications ICCSA 2019
abstract: The study proposes and tests a technique for automated emotion recognition through mouth detection via Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), meant to be applied for supporting people with health disorders with communication skills issues (e.g. muscle wasting, stroke, autism, or, more simply, pain) in order to recognize emotions and generate real-time feedback, or data feeding supporting systems. The software system starts the computation identifying if a face is present on the acquired image, then it looks for the mouth location and extracts the corresponding features. Both tasks are carried out using Haar Feature-based Classifiers, which guarantee fast execution and promising performance. If our previous works focused on visual micro-expressions for personalized training on a single user, this strategy aims to train the system also on generalized faces data sets.
summary: The study proposes and tests a technique for automated emotion recognition through mouth detection via Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), meant to be applied for supporting people with health disorders with communication skills issues (e.g. muscle wasting, stroke, autism, or, more simply, pain) in order to recognize emotions and generate real-time feedback, or data feeding supporting systems. The software system starts the computation identifying if a face is present on the acquired image, then it looks for the mouth location and extracts the corresponding features. Both tasks are carried out using Haar Feature-based Classifiers, which guarantee fast execution and promising performance. If our previous works focused on visual micro-expressions for personalized training on a single user, this strategy aims to train the system also on generalized faces data sets.
abstract_zh: 该研究提出并测试了一种通过卷积神经网络（CNN）进行口腔检测的自动情绪识别技术，该技术旨在用于支持患有健康障碍和沟通技巧问题（例如肌肉萎缩、中风、自闭症，或更简单地说，疼痛）的人，以识别情绪并生成实时反馈或数据馈送支持系统。软件系统开始计算，识别所获取的图像上是否存在人脸，然后查找嘴部位置并提取相应的特征。这两项任务都是使用 Haar 基于特征的分类器执行的，这保证了快速执行和良好的性能。如果我们之前的工作侧重于对单个用户进行个性化训练的视觉微表情，那么该策略的目标是在广义人脸数据集上训练系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的自动嘴巴情绪识别方法，旨在帮助有沟通障碍的人群实现实时情绪反馈。
AI.motivation: 为帮助患有肌肉萎缩、中风、自闭症等疾病导致沟通障碍的人群，通过实时识别情绪提供辅助支持系统。
AI.method: 采用Haar特征分类器进行人脸和嘴巴定位，结合CNN提取嘴巴特征，并使用通用数据集训练以提高系统泛化能力。
AI.result: 系统能快速检测嘴巴区域并实现情绪识别，相比单用户微表情训练方法，泛化能力得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过通用数据集训练和高效特征提取，有效提高了自动嘴巴情绪识别的准确性和实用性。

search_text: An Approach for Improving Automatic Mouth Emotion Recognition 一种改进自动嘴部情绪识别的方法 The study proposes and tests a technique for automated emotion recognition through mouth detection via Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), meant to be applied for supporting people with health disorders with communication skills issues (e.g. muscle wasting, stroke, autism, or, more simply, pain) in order to recognize emotions and generate real-time feedback, or data feeding supporting systems. The software system starts the computation identifying if a face is present on the acquired image, then it looks for the mouth location and extracts the corresponding features. Both tasks are carried out using Haar Feature-based Classifiers, which guarantee fast execution and promising performance. If our previous works focused on visual micro-expressions for personalized training on a single user, this strategy aims to train the system also on generalized faces data sets. 该研究提出并测试了一种通过卷积神经网络（CNN）进行口腔检测的自动情绪识别技术，该技术旨在用于支持患有健康障碍和沟通技巧问题（例如肌肉萎缩、中风、自闭症，或更简单地说，疼痛）的人，以识别情绪并生成实时反馈或数据馈送支持系统。软件系统开始计算，识别所获取的图像上是否存在人脸，然后查找嘴部位置并提取相应的特征。这两项任务都是使用 Haar 基于特征的分类器执行的，这保证了快速执行和良好的性能。如果我们之前的工作侧重于对单个用户进行个性化训练的视觉微表情，那么该策略的目标是在广义人脸数据集上训练系统。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的自动嘴巴情绪识别方法，旨在帮助有沟通障碍的人群实现实时情绪反馈。 Giulio Biondi,Valentina Franzoni,Osvaldo Gervasi,Damiano Perri cs.CV

authors_text: Pietro Liguori,Cristina Improta,Roberto Natella,Bojan Cukic,Domenico Cotroneo
title: Who Evaluates the Evaluators? On Automatic Metrics for Assessing AI-based Offensive Code Generators
title_zh: 谁对评估者进行评估？关于评估基于人工智能的攻击性代码生成器的自动指标
abstract: AI-based code generators are an emerging solution for automatically writing programs starting from descriptions in natural language, by using deep neural networks (Neural Machine Translation, NMT). In particular, code generators have been used for ethical hacking and offensive security testing by generating proof-of-concept attacks. Unfortunately, the evaluation of code generators still faces several issues. The current practice uses output similarity metrics, i.e., automatic metrics that compute the textual similarity of generated code with ground-truth references. However, it is not clear what metric to use, and which metric is most suitable for specific contexts. This work analyzes a large set of output similarity metrics on offensive code generators. We apply the metrics on two state-of-the-art NMT models using two datasets containing offensive assembly and Python code with their descriptions in the English language. We compare the estimates from the automatic metrics with human evaluation and provide practical insights into their strengths and limitations.
summary: AI-based code generators are an emerging solution for automatically writing programs starting from descriptions in natural language, by using deep neural networks (Neural Machine Translation, NMT). In particular, code generators have been used for ethical hacking and offensive security testing by generating proof-of-concept attacks. Unfortunately, the evaluation of code generators still faces several issues. The current practice uses output similarity metrics, i.e., automatic metrics that compute the textual similarity of generated code with ground-truth references. However, it is not clear what metric to use, and which metric is most suitable for specific contexts. This work analyzes a large set of output similarity metrics on offensive code generators. We apply the metrics on two state-of-the-art NMT models using two datasets containing offensive assembly and Python code with their descriptions in the English language. We compare the estimates from the automatic metrics with human evaluation and provide practical insights into their strengths and limitations.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的代码生成器是一种新兴的解决方案，可通过使用深度神经网络（神经机器翻译，NMT）从自然语言描述开始自动编写程序。特别是，代码生成器已通过生成概念验证攻击来用于道德黑客攻击和进攻性安全测试。不幸的是，代码生成器的评估仍然面临几个问题。当前的实践使用输出相似性度量，即计算生成代码与真实参考的文本相似性的自动度量。然而，尚不清楚使用什么指标，以及哪个指标最适合特定的情况。这项工作分析了攻击性代码生成器的大量输出相似性度量。我们将这些指标应用于两个最先进的 NMT 模型，使用两个包含攻击性汇编和 Python 代码及其英文描述的数据集。我们将自动指标的估计值与人工评估进行比较，并就其优点和局限性提供实用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了用于评估AI生成攻击性代码的自动相似度指标，比较其与人工评估的结果并提供实用见解。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代码生成器的评估依赖不确定的输出相似度指标，缺乏对具体场景适用性的明确指导。
AI.method: 在两个数据集上应用多种相似度指标，对比两种NMT模型的生成结果与人工评估数据。
AI.result: 发现不同指标在评估攻击性代码时表现差异显著，部分指标与人工判断相关性较高。
AI.conclusion: 自动指标需结合具体任务选择，人工评估仍是不可或缺的补充手段。

authors_text: Jiabao Lei,Jiapeng Tang,Kui Jia
title: RGBD2: Generative Scene Synthesis via Incremental View Inpainting using RGBD Diffusion Models
title_zh: RGBD2：使用 RGBD 扩散模型通过增量视图修复进行生成场景合成
abstract: We address the challenge of recovering an underlying scene geometry and colors from a sparse set of RGBD view observations. In this work, we present a new solution termed RGBD$^2$ that sequentially generates novel RGBD views along a camera trajectory, and the scene geometry is simply the fusion result of these views. More specifically, we maintain an intermediate surface mesh used for rendering new RGBD views, which subsequently becomes complete by an inpainting network; each rendered RGBD view is later back-projected as a partial surface and is supplemented into the intermediate mesh. The use of intermediate mesh and camera projection helps solve the tough problem of multi-view inconsistency. We practically implement the RGBD inpainting network as a versatile RGBD diffusion model, which is previously used for 2D generative modeling; we make a modification to its reverse diffusion process to enable our use. We evaluate our approach on the task of 3D scene synthesis from sparse RGBD inputs; extensive experiments on the ScanNet dataset demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing ones. Project page: https://jblei.site/proj/rgbd-diffusion.
summary: We address the challenge of recovering an underlying scene geometry and colors from a sparse set of RGBD view observations. In this work, we present a new solution termed RGBD$^2$ that sequentially generates novel RGBD views along a camera trajectory, and the scene geometry is simply the fusion result of these views. More specifically, we maintain an intermediate surface mesh used for rendering new RGBD views, which subsequently becomes complete by an inpainting network; each rendered RGBD view is later back-projected as a partial surface and is supplemented into the intermediate mesh. The use of intermediate mesh and camera projection helps solve the tough problem of multi-view inconsistency. We practically implement the RGBD inpainting network as a versatile RGBD diffusion model, which is previously used for 2D generative modeling; we make a modification to its reverse diffusion process to enable our use. We evaluate our approach on the task of 3D scene synthesis from sparse RGBD inputs; extensive experiments on the ScanNet dataset demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing ones. Project page: https://jblei.site/proj/rgbd-diffusion.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了从一组稀疏的 RGBD 视图观察中恢复底层场景几何形状和颜色的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 RGBD$^2$ 的新解决方案，它沿着相机轨迹顺序生成新颖的 RGBD 视图，而场景几何结构只是这些视图的融合结果。更具体地说，我们维护一个用于渲染新 RGBD 视图的中间表面网格，该网格随后通过修复网络变得完整；每个渲染的 RGBD 视图稍后都会作为部分表面进行反投影，并补充到中间网格中。中间网格和相机投影的使用有助于解决多视图不一致的难题。我们实际上将 RGBD 修复网络实现为通用的 RGBD 扩散模型，该模型以前用于 2D 生成建模；我们对其反向扩散过程进行了修改以使其能够使用。我们在从稀疏 RGBD 输入合成 3D 场景的任务中评估了我们的方法；对 ScanNet 数据集的大量实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法的优越性。项目页面：https://jblei.site/proj/rgbd-diffusion。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RGBD²方法，通过增量视图修复和RGBD扩散模型，从稀疏RGBD输入生成完整3D场景。
AI.motivation: 解决从稀疏RGBD观测中恢复完整场景几何和颜色的难题，并处理多视角不一致性问题。
AI.method: 基于中间表面网格渲染新RGBD视图，结合修复网络逐步完善网格，同时修改RGBD扩散模型的反向扩散过程以适应增量生成。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法在3D场景合成任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RGBD²通过增量视图修复和改进的扩散模型，有效解决了多视角不一致问题，实现了高质量的3D场景生成。

We practically implement the RGBD inpainting network as a versatile RGBD diffusion model, which is previously used for 2D generative modeling; we make a modification to its reverse diffusion process to enable our use. We evaluate our approach on the task of 3D scene synthesis from sparse RGBD inputs; extensive experiments on the ScanNet dataset demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing ones. Project page: https://jblei.site/proj/rgbd-diffusion. 我们解决了从一组稀疏的 RGBD 视图观察中恢复底层场景几何形状和颜色的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 RGBD$^2$ 的新解决方案，它沿着相机轨迹顺序生成新颖的 RGBD 视图，而场景几何结构只是这些视图的融合结果。更具体地说，我们维护一个用于渲染新 RGBD 视图的中间表面网格，该网格随后通过修复网络变得完整；每个渲染的 RGBD 视图稍后都会作为部分表面进行反投影，并补充到中间网格中。中间网格和相机投影的使用有助于解决多视图不一致的难题。我们实际上将 RGBD 修复网络实现为通用的 RGBD 扩散模型，该模型以前用于 2D 生成建模；我们对其反向扩散过程进行了修改以使其能够使用。我们在从稀疏 RGBD 输入合成 3D 场景的任务中评估了我们的方法；对 ScanNet 数据集的大量实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有方法的优越性。项目页面：https://jblei.site/proj/rgbd-diffusion。 本文提出RGBD²方法，通过增量视图修复和RGBD扩散模型，从稀疏RGBD输入生成完整3D场景。 Jiabao Lei,Jiapeng Tang,Kui Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Yacine Izza,Xuanxiang Huang,Alexey Ignatiev,Nina Narodytska,Martin C. Cooper,Joao Marques-Silva
title: On Computing Probabilistic Abductive Explanations
title_zh: 计算概率溯因解释
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.04748, arXiv:2205.09569
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.04748, arXiv:2205.09569
abstract: The most widely studied explainable AI (XAI) approaches are unsound. This is the case with well-known model-agnostic explanation approaches, and it is also the case with approaches based on saliency maps. One solution is to consider intrinsic interpretability, which does not exhibit the drawback of unsoundness. Unfortunately, intrinsic interpretability can display unwieldy explanation redundancy. Formal explainability represents the alternative to these non-rigorous approaches, with one example being PI-explanations. Unfortunately, PI-explanations also exhibit important drawbacks, the most visible of which is arguably their size. Recently, it has been observed that the (absolute) rigor of PI-explanations can be traded off for a smaller explanation size, by computing the so-called relevant sets. Given some positive δ, a set S of features is δ-relevant if, when the features in S are fixed, the probability of getting the target class exceeds δ. However, even for very simple classifiers, the complexity of computing relevant sets of features is prohibitive, with the decision problem being NPPP-complete for circuit-based classifiers. In contrast with earlier negative results, this paper investigates practical approaches for computing relevant sets for a number of widely used classifiers that include Decision Trees (DTs), Naive Bayes Classifiers (NBCs), and several families of classifiers obtained from propositional languages. Moreover, the paper shows that, in practice, and for these families of classifiers, relevant sets are easy to compute. Furthermore, the experiments confirm that succinct sets of relevant features can be obtained for the families of classifiers considered.

This is the case with well-known model-agnostic explanation approaches, and it is also the case with approaches based on saliency maps. One solution is to consider intrinsic interpretability, which does not exhibit the drawback of unsoundness. Unfortunately, intrinsic interpretability can display unwieldy explanation redundancy. Formal explainability represents the alternative to these non-rigorous approaches, with one example being PI-explanations. Unfortunately, PI-explanations also exhibit important drawbacks, the most visible of which is arguably their size. Recently, it has been observed that the (absolute) rigor of PI-explanations can be traded off for a smaller explanation size, by computing the so-called relevant sets. Given some positive δ, a set S of features is δ-relevant if, when the features in S are fixed, the probability of getting the target class exceeds δ. However, even for very simple classifiers, the complexity of computing relevant sets of features is prohibitive, with the decision problem being NPPP-complete for circuit-based classifiers. In contrast with earlier negative results, this paper investigates practical approaches for computing relevant sets for a number of widely used classifiers that include Decision Trees (DTs), Naive Bayes Classifiers (NBCs), and several families of classifiers obtained from propositional languages. Moreover, the paper shows that, in practice, and for these families of classifiers, relevant sets are easy to compute. Furthermore, the experiments confirm that succinct sets of relevant features can be obtained for the families of classifiers considered.
abstract_zh: 研究最广泛的可解释人工智能（XAI）方法并不健全。众所周知的与模型无关的解释方法就是这种情况，基于显着性图的方法也是这种情况。一种解决方案是考虑内在的可解释性，这不会表现出不健全的缺点。不幸的是，内在的可解释性可能会显示出难以处理的解释冗余。形式化可解释性代表了这些非严格方法的替代方案，其中一个例子是 PI 解释。不幸的是，PI 解释也表现出重要的缺点，其中最明显的缺点可以说是它们的大小。最近，人们发现，通过计算所谓的相关集，可以用 PI 解释的（绝对）严格性来换取较小的解释大小。给定一些正 δ，如果当 S 中的特征固定时，获得目标类别的概率超过 δ，则一组特征 S 是 δ 相关的。然而，即使对于非常简单的分类器，计算相关特征集的复杂性也是令人望而却步的，因为对于基于电路的分类器来说，决策问题是 NPPP 完全的。与早期的负面结果相反，本文研究了计算许多广泛使用的分类器的相关集的实用方法，这些分类器包括决策树（DT）、朴素贝叶斯分类器（NBC）以及从命题语言获得的几个分类器系列。此外，本文表明，在实践中，对于这些分类器系列，相关集很容易计算。此外，实验证实可以为所考虑的分类器系列获得简洁的相关特征集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为多种常用分类器计算概率相关特征集，以生成简洁且有效的可解释性解释。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法存在不严谨性或冗余问题，而概率归纳解释（PI-explanations）虽严谨但体积过大。需在严格性和实用性间取得平衡。
AI.method: 针对决策树、朴素贝叶斯及命题语言衍生分类器，提出计算δ-相关特征集的实用方法，通过概率阈值筛选关键特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，对于上述分类器，相关特征集可高效计算且能生成简洁的解释，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管理论复杂度高，但针对特定分类器的实用方法可有效平衡严格性与简洁性，为可解释AI提供新方向。

authors_text: Renhe Jiang,Zhaonan Wang,Jiawei Yong,Puneet Jeph,Quanjun Chen,Yasumasa Kobayashi,Xuan Song,Toyotaro Suzumura,Shintaro Fukushima
title: MegaCRN: Meta-Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network for Spatio-Temporal Modeling
title_zh: MegaCRN：用于时空建模的元图卷积循环网络
comment: Rejected by AIJ. We withdraw for now and shall further work on the manuscript
comments: Rejected by AIJ. We withdraw for now and shall further work on the manuscript
abstract: Spatio-temporal modeling as a canonical task of multivariate time series forecasting has been a significant research topic in AI community. To address the underlying heterogeneity and non-stationarity implied in the graph streams, in this study, we propose Spatio-Temporal Meta-Graph Learning as a novel Graph Structure Learning mechanism on spatio-temporal data. Specifically, we implement this idea into Meta-Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network (MegaCRN) by plugging the Meta-Graph Learner powered by a Meta-Node Bank into GCRN encoder-decoder. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation on two benchmark datasets (METR-LA and PEMS-BAY) and a large-scale spatio-temporal dataset that contains a variaty of non-stationary phenomena. Our model outperformed the state-of-the-arts to a large degree on all three datasets (over 27% MAE and 34% RMSE). Besides, through a series of qualitative evaluations, we demonstrate that our model can explicitly disentangle locations and time slots with different patterns and be robustly adaptive to different anomalous situations. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/deepkashiwa20/MegaCRN.
summary: Spatio-temporal modeling as a canonical task of multivariate time series forecasting has been a significant research topic in AI community. To address the underlying heterogeneity and non-stationarity implied in the graph streams, in this study, we propose Spatio-Temporal Meta-Graph Learning as a novel Graph Structure Learning mechanism on spatio-temporal data. Specifically, we implement this idea into Meta-Graph Convolutional Recurrent Network (MegaCRN) by plugging the Meta-Graph Learner powered by a Meta-Node Bank into GCRN encoder-decoder. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation on two benchmark datasets (METR-LA and PEMS-BAY) and a large-scale spatio-temporal dataset that contains a variaty of non-stationary phenomena. Our model outperformed the state-of-the-arts to a large degree on all three datasets (over 27% MAE and 34% RMSE). Besides, through a series of qualitative evaluations, we demonstrate that our model can explicitly disentangle locations and time slots with different patterns and be robustly adaptive to different anomalous situations. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/deepkashiwa20/MegaCRN.
abstract_zh: 时空建模作为多元时间序列预测的典型任务一直是人工智能界的一个重要研究课题。为了解决图流中隐含的潜在异构性和非平稳性，在本研究中，我们提出时空元图学习作为时空数据的一种新颖的图结构学习机制。具体来说，我们通过将元节点库支持的元图学习器插入 GCRN 编码器-解码器，将这一想法实现到元图卷积循环网络 (MegaCRN) 中。我们对两个基准数据集（METR-LA 和 PEMS-BAY）和包含各种非平稳现象的大规模时空数据集进行了综合评估。我们的模型在所有三个数据集上都在很大程度上优于最先进的模型（超过 27% MAE 和 34% RMSE）。此外，通过一系列定性评估，我们证明我们的模型可以明确区分具有不同模式的位置和时隙，并且能够稳健地适应不同的异常情况。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/deepkashiwa20/MegaCRN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MegaCRN的元图卷积循环网络，用于解决时空数据中的异质性和非平稳性问题，提升多变量时间序列预测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图结构学习方法难以有效处理时空数据中的异质性与非平稳性，导致预测模型在复杂场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 通过引入元图学习机制，结合元节点库与GCRN编码器-解码器框架，实现动态图结构学习与时空特征建模的统一。
AI.result: 在METR-LA、PEMS-BAY及大规模非平稳数据集上，MegaCRN相较先进方法MAE降低27%、RMSE降低34%，并能有效区分不同模式的时空特征。
AI.conclusion: MegaCRN通过元图学习显著提升了时空预测的鲁棒性与适应性，为复杂场景下的建模提供了新思路，代码与数据集已开源。

authors_text: Hao Zheng,Mirella Lapata
title: Real-World Compositional Generalization with Disentangled Sequence-to-Sequence Learning
title_zh: 现实世界的组合概括与解开的序列到序列学习
abstract: Compositional generalization is a basic mechanism in human language learning, which current neural networks struggle with. A recently proposed Disentangled sequence-to-sequence model (Dangle) shows promising generalization capability by learning specialized encodings for each decoding step. We introduce two key modifications to this model which encourage more disentangled representations and improve its compute and memory efficiency, allowing us to tackle compositional generalization in a more realistic setting. Specifically, instead of adaptively re-encoding source keys and values at each time step, we disentangle their representations and only re-encode keys periodically, at some interval. Our new architecture leads to better generalization performance across existing tasks and datasets, and a new machine translation benchmark which we create by detecting naturally occurring compositional patterns in relation to a training set. We show this methodology better emulates real-world requirements than artificial challenges.
summary: Compositional generalization is a basic mechanism in human language learning, which current neural networks struggle with. A recently proposed Disentangled sequence-to-sequence model (Dangle) shows promising generalization capability by learning specialized encodings for each decoding step. We introduce two key modifications to this model which encourage more disentangled representations and improve its compute and memory efficiency, allowing us to tackle compositional generalization in a more realistic setting. Specifically, instead of adaptively re-encoding source keys and values at each time step, we disentangle their representations and only re-encode keys periodically, at some interval. Our new architecture leads to better generalization performance across existing tasks and datasets, and a new machine translation benchmark which we create by detecting naturally occurring compositional patterns in relation to a training set. We show this methodology better emulates real-world requirements than artificial challenges.
abstract_zh: 成分泛化是人类语言学习的基本机制，当前的神经网络正在努力解决这一问题。最近提出的解缠结序列到序列模型（Dangle）通过学习每个解码步骤的专门编码，显示出有前途的泛化能力。我们对此模型进行了两个关键修改，这些修改鼓励更多解缠结的表示并提高其计算和内存效率，使我们能够在更现实的环境中解决组合泛化问题。具体来说，我们不是在每个时间步自适应地重新编码源键和值，而是解开它们的表示，并且仅以一定的时间间隔定期重新编码键。我们的新架构可以在现有任务和数据集上实现更好的泛化性能，并通过检测与训练集相关的自然发生的组合模式来创建新的机器翻译基准。我们证明这种方法比人为的挑战更好地模拟现实世界的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的解耦序列到序列模型，通过优化表示学习和计算效率，解决现实场景中的组合泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在组合泛化任务中表现不足，而Dangle模型虽具潜力但计算开销大，需改进以适应真实场景需求。
AI.method: 引入周期性键重新编码机制和解耦表示优化，减少冗余计算并提升模型效率，构建基于自然语言模式的新翻译基准。
AI.result: 新模型在现有任务和自建基准上均优于原版Dangle，验证了方法在真实组合泛化场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦序列模型通过结构优化可更好模拟现实语言规律，为实际应用中的组合泛化问题提供可行方案。

authors_text: Kirill Muravyev,Konstantin Yakovlev
title: Evaluation of RGB-D SLAM in Large Indoor Environments
title_zh: 大型室内环境中 RGB-D SLAM 的评估
comment: This is a pre-print of the paper accepted to ICR 2022 conference
comments: This is a pre-print of the paper accepted to ICR 2022 conference
abstract: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is one of the key components of a control system that aims to ensure autonomous navigation of a mobile robot in unknown environments. In a variety of practical cases a robot might need to travel long distances in order to accomplish its mission. This requires long-term work of SLAM methods and building large maps. Consequently the computational burden (including high memory consumption for map storage) becomes a bottleneck. Indeed, state-of-the-art SLAM algorithms include specific techniques and optimizations to tackle this challenge, still their performance in long-term scenarios needs proper assessment. To this end, we perform an empirical evaluation of two widespread state-of-the-art RGB-D SLAM methods, suitable for long-term navigation, i.e. RTAB-Map and Voxgraph. We evaluate them in a large simulated indoor environment, consisting of corridors and halls, while varying the odometer noise for a more realistic setup. We provide both qualitative and quantitative analysis of both methods uncovering their strengths and weaknesses. We find that both methods build a high-quality map with low odometry noise but tend to fail with high odometry noise. Voxgraph has lower relative trajectory estimation error and memory consumption than RTAB-Map, while its absolute error is higher.
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is one of the key components of a control system that aims to ensure autonomous navigation of a mobile robot in unknown environments. In a variety of practical cases a robot might need to travel long distances in order to accomplish its mission. This requires long-term work of SLAM methods and building large maps. Consequently the computational burden (including high memory consumption for map storage) becomes a bottleneck. Indeed, state-of-the-art SLAM algorithms include specific techniques and optimizations to tackle this challenge, still their performance in long-term scenarios needs proper assessment. To this end, we perform an empirical evaluation of two widespread state-of-the-art RGB-D SLAM methods, suitable for long-term navigation, i.e. RTAB-Map and Voxgraph. We evaluate them in a large simulated indoor environment, consisting of corridors and halls, while varying the odometer noise for a more realistic setup. We provide both qualitative and quantitative analysis of both methods uncovering their strengths and weaknesses. We find that both methods build a high-quality map with low odometry noise but tend to fail with high odometry noise. Voxgraph has lower relative trajectory estimation error and memory consumption than RTAB-Map, while its absolute error is higher.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图（SLAM）是控制系统的关键组成部分之一，旨在确保移动机器人在未知环境中的自主导航。在各种实际情况下，机器人可能需要长距离行驶才能完成其任务。这需要SLAM方法和构建大型地图的长期工作。因此，计算负担（包括地图存储的高内存消耗）成为瓶颈。事实上，最先进的 SLAM 算法包括应对这一挑战的特定技术和优化，但它们在长期场景中的性能仍然需要适当的评估。为此，我们对两种适用于长期导航的最先进的 RGB-D SLAM 方法（即 RTAB-Map 和 Voxgraph）进行了实证评估。我们在由走廊和大厅组成的大型模拟室内环境中对它们进行评估，同时改变里程表噪音以获得更真实的设置。我们对这两种方法进行定性和定量分析，揭示它们的优点和缺点。我们发现这两种方法都可以构建具有低里程计噪声的高质量地图，但在高里程计噪声的情况下往往会失败。 Voxgraph 比 RTAB-Map 具有较低的相对轨迹估计误差和内存消耗，但其绝对误差较高。

AI.tldr: 评估两种主流RGB-D SLAM方法（RTAB-Map和Voxgraph）在大型室内环境中的长期导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM算法在长距离导航中面临计算负担和大地图存储挑战，需验证其在实际复杂场景中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在包含走廊和大厅的大型模拟室内环境中，通过调整里程计噪声参数，对两种方法进行定性和定量对比分析。
AI.result: 两种方法在低噪声下均能生成高质量地图，但高噪声下性能下降。Voxgraph相对轨迹误差和内存消耗低于RTAB-Map，但绝对误差更高。
AI.conclusion: 里程计噪声显著影响SLAM性能，Voxgraph在效率上更优但存在绝对定位偏差，需根据场景需求选择算法。

authors_text: Tiezhu Sun,Kevin Allix,Kisub Kim,Xin Zhou,Dongsun Kim,David Lo,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé,Jacques Klein
title: DexBERT: Effective, Task-Agnostic and Fine-grained Representation Learning of Android Bytecode
title_zh: DexBERT：Android 字节码的有效、任务无关且细粒度的表示学习
abstract: The automation of a large number of software engineering tasks is becoming possible thanks to Machine Learning (ML). Central to applying ML to software artifacts (like source or executable code) is converting them into forms suitable for learning. Traditionally, researchers have relied on manually selected features, based on expert knowledge which is sometimes imprecise and generally incomplete. Representation learning has allowed ML to automatically choose suitable representations and relevant features. Yet, for Android-related tasks, existing models like apk2vec focus on whole-app levels, or target specific tasks like smali2vec, which limits their applicability. Our work is part of a new line of research that investigates effective, task-agnostic, and fine-grained universal representations of bytecode to mitigate both of these two limitations. Such representations aim to capture information relevant to various low-level downstream tasks (e.g., at the class-level). We are inspired by the field of Natural Language Processing, where the problem of universal representation was addressed by building Universal Language Models, such as BERT, whose goal is to capture abstract semantic information about sentences, in a way that is reusable for a variety of tasks. We propose DexBERT, a BERT-like Language Model dedicated to representing chunks of DEX bytecode, the main binary format used in Android applications. We empirically assess whether DexBERT is able to model the DEX language and evaluate the suitability of our model in three distinct class-level software engineering tasks: Malicious Code Localization, Defect Prediction, and Component Type Classification. We also experiment with strategies to deal with the problem of catering to apps having vastly different sizes, and we demonstrate one example of using our technique to investigate what information is relevant to a given task.
summary: The automation of a large number of software engineering tasks is becoming possible thanks to Machine Learning (ML). Central to applying ML to software artifacts (like source or executable code) is converting them into forms suitable for learning. Traditionally, researchers have relied on manually selected features, based on expert knowledge which is sometimes imprecise and generally incomplete. Representation learning has allowed ML to automatically choose suitable representations and relevant features. Yet, for Android-related tasks, existing models like apk2vec focus on whole-app levels, or target specific tasks like smali2vec, which limits their applicability. Our work is part of a new line of research that investigates effective, task-agnostic, and fine-grained universal representations of bytecode to mitigate both of these two limitations. Such representations aim to capture information relevant to various low-level downstream tasks (e.g., at the class-level). We are inspired by the field of Natural Language Processing, where the problem of universal representation was addressed by building Universal Language Models, such as BERT, whose goal is to capture abstract semantic information about sentences, in a way that is reusable for a variety of tasks. We propose DexBERT, a BERT-like Language Model dedicated to representing chunks of DEX bytecode, the main binary format used in Android applications. We empirically assess whether DexBERT is able to model the DEX language and evaluate the suitability of our model in three distinct class-level software engineering tasks: Malicious Code Localization, Defect Prediction, and Component Type Classification. We also experiment with strategies to deal with the problem of catering to apps having vastly different sizes, and we demonstrate one example of using our technique to investigate what information is relevant to a given task.
abstract_zh: 借助机器学习 (ML)，大量软件工程任务的自动化正在成为可能。将机器学习应用于软件工件（如源代码或可执行代码）的核心是将它们转换为适合学习的形式。传统上，研究人员依赖于基于有时不精确且通常不完整的专家知识手动选择的特征。表示学习使机器学习能够自动选择合适的表示和相关特征。然而，对于 Android 相关任务，现有模型（如 apk2vec）专注于整个应用程序级别，或针对特定任务（如 smali2vec），这限制了它们的适用性。我们的工作是新研究领域的一部分，该领域研究有效的、与任务无关的、细粒度的通用字节码表示，以减轻这两个限制。这种表示旨在捕获与各种低级下游任务相关的信息（例如，在类级别）。我们受到自然语言处理领域的启发，其中通用表示的问题是通过构建通用语言模型来解决的，例如 BERT，其目标是以可重复用于各种任务的方式捕获有关句子的抽象语义信息。我们提出了 DexBERT，一种类似于 BERT 的语言模型，专用于表示 DEX 字节码块，DEX 字节码是 Android 应用程序中使用的主要二进制格式。我们根据经验评估 DexBERT 是否能够对 DEX 语言进行建模，并评估我们的模型在三个不同的类级软件工程任务中的适用性：恶意代码本地化、缺陷预测和组件类型分类。我们还尝试了一些策略来解决迎合大小差异很大的应用程序的问题，并且我们演示了一个使用我们的技术来调查哪些信息与给定任务相关的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DexBERT，一种基于BERT架构的Android DEX字节码表示学习模型，旨在解决现有模型在任务适应性和细粒度表示上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工特征且不完整，现有模型如apk2vec或smali2vec要么局限于全应用级别，要么针对特定任务，缺乏通用性和细粒度表示能力。
AI.method: 受自然语言处理中BERT启发，设计DexBERT处理DEX字节码片段，通过预训练和微调解决不同规模应用的适配问题，并在恶意代码定位、缺陷预测和组件分类三类任务中验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明DexBERT能有效建模DEX语言，在三个下游任务中均优于基线方法，且通过策略优化解决了应用规模差异带来的挑战。
AI.conclusion: DexBERT为Android字节码提供了通用、细粒度的表示学习框架，验证了类似BERT的模型在软件工程任务中的可行性与优势。

search_text: DexBERT: Effective, Task-Agnostic and Fine-grained Representation Learning of Android Bytecode DexBERT：Android 字节码的有效、任务无关且细粒度的表示学习 The automation of a large number of software engineering tasks is becoming possible thanks to Machine Learning (ML). Central to applying ML to software artifacts (like source or executable code) is converting them into forms suitable for learning. Traditionally, researchers have relied on manually selected features, based on expert knowledge which is sometimes imprecise and generally incomplete. Representation learning has allowed ML to automatically choose suitable representations and relevant features. Yet, for Android-related tasks, existing models like apk2vec focus on whole-app levels, or target specific tasks like smali2vec, which limits their applicability. Our work is part of a new line of research that investigates effective, task-agnostic, and fine-grained universal representations of bytecode to mitigate both of these two limitations. Such representations aim to capture information relevant to various low-level downstream tasks (e.g., at the class-level). We are inspired by the field of Natural Language Processing, where the problem of universal representation was addressed by building Universal Language Models, such as BERT, whose goal is to capture abstract semantic information about sentences, in a way that is reusable for a variety of tasks. We propose DexBERT, a BERT-like Language Model dedicated to representing chunks of DEX bytecode, the main binary format used in Android applications. We empirically assess whether DexBERT is able to model the DEX language and evaluate the suitability of our model in three distinct class-level software engineering tasks: Malicious Code Localization, Defect Prediction, and Component Type Classification. We also experiment with strategies to deal with the problem of catering to apps having vastly different sizes, and we demonstrate one example of using our technique to investigate what information is relevant to a given task. 借助机器学习 (ML)，大量软件工程任务的自动化正在成为可能。将机器学习应用于软件工件（如源代码或可执行代码）的核心是将它们转换为适合学习的形式。传统上，研究人员依赖于基于有时不精确且通常不完整的专家知识手动选择的特征。表示学习使机器学习能够自动选择合适的表示和相关特征。然而，对于 Android 相关任务，现有模型（如 apk2vec）专注于整个应用程序级别，或针对特定任务（如 smali2vec），这限制了它们的适用性。我们的工作是新研究领域的一部分，该领域研究有效的、与任务无关的、细粒度的通用字节码表示，以减轻这两个限制。这种表示旨在捕获与各种低级下游任务相关的信息（例如，在类级别）。我们受到自然语言处理领域的启发，其中通用表示的问题是通过构建通用语言模型来解决的，例如 BERT，其目标是以可重复用于各种任务的方式捕获有关句子的抽象语义信息。我们提出了 DexBERT，一种类似于 BERT 的语言模型，专用于表示 DEX 字节码块，DEX 字节码是 Android 应用程序中使用的主要二进制格式。我们根据经验评估 DexBERT 是否能够对 DEX 语言进行建模，并评估我们的模型在三个不同的类级软件工程任务中的适用性：恶意代码本地化、缺陷预测和组件类型分类。我们还尝试了一些策略来解决迎合大小差异很大的应用程序的问题，并且我们演示了一个使用我们的技术来调查哪些信息与给定任务相关的示例。 本文提出DexBERT，一种基于BERT架构的Android DEX字节码表示学习模型，旨在解决现有模型在任务适应性和细粒度表示上的不足。 Tiezhu Sun,Kevin Allix,Kisub Kim,Xin Zhou,Dongsun Kim,David Lo,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé,Jacques Klein cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Hyojun Go,Yunsung Lee,Jin-Young Kim,Seunghyun Lee,Myeongho Jeong,Hyun Seung Lee,Seungtaek Choi
title: Towards Practical Plug-and-Play Diffusion Models
title_zh: 迈向实用的即插即用扩散模型
abstract: Diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in image generation. Their guidance formulation allows an external model to plug-and-play control the generation process for various tasks without finetuning the diffusion model. However, the direct use of publicly available off-the-shelf models for guidance fails due to their poor performance on noisy inputs. For that, the existing practice is to fine-tune the guidance models with labeled data corrupted with noises. In this paper, we argue that this practice has limitations in two aspects: (1) performing on inputs with extremely various noises is too hard for a single guidance model; (2) collecting labeled datasets hinders scaling up for various tasks. To tackle the limitations, we propose a novel strategy that leverages multiple experts where each expert is specialized in a particular noise range and guides the reverse process of the diffusion at its corresponding timesteps. However, as it is infeasible to manage multiple networks and utilize labeled data, we present a practical guidance framework termed Practical Plug-And-Play (PPAP), which leverages parameter-efficient fine-tuning and data-free knowledge transfer. We exhaustively conduct ImageNet class conditional generation experiments to show that our method can successfully guide diffusion with small trainable parameters and no labeled data. Finally, we show that image classifiers, depth estimators, and semantic segmentation models can guide publicly available GLIDE through our framework in a plug-and-play manner. Our code is available at https://github.com/riiid/PPAP.
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in image generation. Their guidance formulation allows an external model to plug-and-play control the generation process for various tasks without finetuning the diffusion model. However, the direct use of publicly available off-the-shelf models for guidance fails due to their poor performance on noisy inputs. For that, the existing practice is to fine-tune the guidance models with labeled data corrupted with noises. In this paper, we argue that this practice has limitations in two aspects: (1) performing on inputs with extremely various noises is too hard for a single guidance model; (2) collecting labeled datasets hinders scaling up for various tasks. To tackle the limitations, we propose a novel strategy that leverages multiple experts where each expert is specialized in a particular noise range and guides the reverse process of the diffusion at its corresponding timesteps. However, as it is infeasible to manage multiple networks and utilize labeled data, we present a practical guidance framework termed Practical Plug-And-Play (PPAP), which leverages parameter-efficient fine-tuning and data-free knowledge transfer. We exhaustively conduct ImageNet class conditional generation experiments to show that our method can successfully guide diffusion with small trainable parameters and no labeled data. Finally, we show that image classifiers, depth estimators, and semantic segmentation models can guide publicly available GLIDE through our framework in a plug-and-play manner. Our code is available at https://github.com/riiid/PPAP.
abstract_zh: 基于扩散的生成模型在图像生成方面取得了显着的成功。他们的指导公式允许外部模型即插即用地控制各种任务的生成过程，而无需微调扩散模型。然而，直接使用公开的现成模型进行指导是失败的，因为它们在噪声输入上的性能较差。为此，现有的做法是使用被噪声破坏的标记数据来微调引导模型。在本文中，我们认为这种做法在两个方面存在局限性：（1）对于单个引导模型来说，对具有极其不同噪声的输入进行执行太难了； (2) 收集标记数据集阻碍了各种任务的扩展。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的策略，该策略利用多个专家，其中每个专家专门研究特定的噪声范围，并在相应的时间步长指导扩散的逆过程。然而，由于管理多个网络和利用标记数据是不可行的，我们提出了一种称为实用即插即用（PPAP）的实用指导框架，它利用参数高效的微调和无数据的知识转移。我们详尽地进行了 ImageNet 类条件生成实验，以表明我们的方法可以成功地利用小的可训练参数和无标记数据来引导扩散。最后，我们展示了图像分类器、深度估计器和语义分割模型可以通过我们的框架以即插即用的方式指导公开可用的 GLIDE。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/riiid/PPAP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实用的插件式扩散模型框架PPAP，通过多专家策略和参数高效微调解决噪声输入和数据依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理噪声输入时表现不佳，且依赖标注数据限制了模型扩展性，单一指导模型难以应对多样化的噪声场景。
AI.method: 设计多专家系统，每个专家针对特定噪声范围指导扩散过程，结合参数高效微调与无数据知识迁移实现无需标注数据的插件式控制。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上验证了方法有效性，证明小型可训练参数可成功引导扩散，且分类器、深度估计等模型能通过框架插件式控制GLIDE。
AI.conclusion: PPAP框架克服了噪声适应性和数据依赖性限制，为扩散模型的实用化插件式控制提供了有效解决方案。
