authors_text: Achilleas Santi Seisa,Sumeet Gajanan Satpute,George Nikolakopoulos
title: Comparison between Docker and Kubernetes based Edge Architectures for Enabling Remote Model Predictive Control for Aerial Robots
title_zh: 基于 Docker 和 Kubernetes 的边缘架构对空中机器人进行远程模型预测控制的比较
abstract: Edge computing is becoming more and more popular among researchers who seek to take advantage of the edge resources and the minimal time delays, in order to run their robotic applications more efficiently. Recently, many edge architectures have been proposed, each of them having their advantages and disadvantages, depending on each application. In this work, we present two different edge architectures for controlling the trajectory of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV). The first architecture is based on docker containers and the second one is based on kubernetes, while the main framework for operating the robot is the Robotic Operating System (ROS). The efficiency of the overall proposed scheme is being evaluated through extended simulations for comparing the two architectures and the overall results obtained.
summary: Edge computing is becoming more and more popular among researchers who seek to take advantage of the edge resources and the minimal time delays, in order to run their robotic applications more efficiently. Recently, many edge architectures have been proposed, each of them having their advantages and disadvantages, depending on each application. In this work, we present two different edge architectures for controlling the trajectory of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV). The first architecture is based on docker containers and the second one is based on kubernetes, while the main framework for operating the robot is the Robotic Operating System (ROS). The efficiency of the overall proposed scheme is being evaluated through extended simulations for comparing the two architectures and the overall results obtained.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算在研究人员中越来越受欢迎，他们寻求利用边缘资源和最小的时间延迟，以便更有效地运行机器人应用程序。最近，已经提出了许多边缘架构，每种架构都有其优点和缺点，具体取决于每种应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种不同的边缘架构来控制无人机（UAV）的轨迹。第一种架构基于docker容器，第二种架构基于kubernetes，而操作机器人的主要框架是机器人操作系统（ROS）。正在通过扩展模拟来评估所提出的总体方案的效率，以比较两种架构和获得的总体结果。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于Docker和Kubernetes的边缘架构在实现空中机器人远程模型预测控制中的效果。
AI.motivation: 边缘计算因其低延迟和资源利用优势受到关注，但不同边缘架构在机器人应用中的性能差异尚未明确，因此需要比较Docker和Kubernetes的适用性。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种基于ROS（机器人操作系统）的边缘架构：一种基于Docker容器，另一种基于Kubernetes，并通过扩展仿真评估了两种架构的效率。
AI.result: 仿真结果比较了两种架构在控制无人机轨迹时的性能，揭示了它们的优缺点。
AI.conclusion: Docker和Kubernetes在边缘计算中各有适用场景，选择合适的架构取决于具体应用需求。

ai_content_json.method: 本文提出了两种基于ROS（机器人操作系统）的边缘架构：一种基于Docker容器，另一种基于Kubernetes，并通过扩展仿真评估了两种架构的效率。
ai_content_json.result: 仿真结果比较了两种架构在控制无人机轨迹时的性能，揭示了它们的优缺点。
ai_content_json.conclusion: Docker和Kubernetes在边缘计算中各有适用场景，选择合适的架构取决于具体应用需求。

search_text: Comparison between Docker and Kubernetes based Edge Architectures for Enabling Remote Model Predictive Control for Aerial Robots 基于 Docker 和 Kubernetes 的边缘架构对空中机器人进行远程模型预测控制的比较 Edge computing is becoming more and more popular among researchers who seek to take advantage of the edge resources and the minimal time delays, in order to run their robotic applications more efficiently. Recently, many edge architectures have been proposed, each of them having their advantages and disadvantages, depending on each application. In this work, we present two different edge architectures for controlling the trajectory of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV). The first architecture is based on docker containers and the second one is based on kubernetes, while the main framework for operating the robot is the Robotic Operating System (ROS). The efficiency of the overall proposed scheme is being evaluated through extended simulations for comparing the two architectures and the overall results obtained. 边缘计算在研究人员中越来越受欢迎，他们寻求利用边缘资源和最小的时间延迟，以便更有效地运行机器人应用程序。最近，已经提出了许多边缘架构，每种架构都有其优点和缺点，具体取决于每种应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种不同的边缘架构来控制无人机（UAV）的轨迹。第一种架构基于docker容器，第二种架构基于kubernetes，而操作机器人的主要框架是机器人操作系统（ROS）。正在通过扩展模拟来评估所提出的总体方案的效率，以比较两种架构和获得的总体结果。 本文比较了基于Docker和Kubernetes的边缘架构在实现空中机器人远程模型预测控制中的效果。 Achilleas Santi Seisa,Sumeet Gajanan Satpute,George Nikolakopoulos cs.RO

authors_text: Zhengqing Yuan,Xiaolong Zhang,Yue Wang,Xuecong Hou,Huiwen Xue,Zhuanzhe Zhao,Yongming Liu
title: RPN: A Word Vector Level Data Augmentation Algorithm in Deep Learning for Language Understanding
title_zh: RPN：用于语言理解的深度学习中的词向量级数据增强算法
comment: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (IEEE SMC)
comments: Accepted by 2023 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (IEEE SMC)
abstract: Data augmentation is a widely used technique in machine learning to improve model performance. However, existing data augmentation techniques in natural language understanding (NLU) may not fully capture the complexity of natural language variations, and they can be challenging to apply to large datasets. This paper proposes the Random Position Noise (RPN) algorithm, a novel data augmentation technique that operates at the word vector level. RPN modifies the word embeddings of the original text by introducing noise based on the existing values of selected word vectors, allowing for more fine-grained modifications and better capturing natural language variations. Unlike traditional data augmentation methods, RPN does not require gradients in the computational graph during virtual sample updates, making it simpler to apply to large datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that RPN consistently outperforms existing data augmentation techniques across various NLU tasks, including sentiment analysis, natural language inference, and paraphrase detection. Moreover, RPN performs well in low-resource settings and is applicable to any model featuring a word embeddings layer. The proposed RPN algorithm is a promising approach for enhancing NLU performance and addressing the challenges associated with traditional data augmentation techniques in large-scale NLU tasks. Our experimental results demonstrated that the RPN algorithm achieved state-of-the-art performance in all seven NLU tasks, thereby highlighting its effectiveness and potential for real-world NLU applications.
summary: Data augmentation is a widely used technique in machine learning to improve model performance. However, existing data augmentation techniques in natural language understanding (NLU) may not fully capture the complexity of natural language variations, and they can be challenging to apply to large datasets. This paper proposes the Random Position Noise (RPN) algorithm, a novel data augmentation technique that operates at the word vector level. RPN modifies the word embeddings of the original text by introducing noise based on the existing values of selected word vectors, allowing for more fine-grained modifications and better capturing natural language variations. Unlike traditional data augmentation methods, RPN does not require gradients in the computational graph during virtual sample updates, making it simpler to apply to large datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that RPN consistently outperforms existing data augmentation techniques across various NLU tasks, including sentiment analysis, natural language inference, and paraphrase detection. Moreover, RPN performs well in low-resource settings and is applicable to any model featuring a word embeddings layer. The proposed RPN algorithm is a promising approach for enhancing NLU performance and addressing the challenges associated with traditional data augmentation techniques in large-scale NLU tasks. Our experimental results demonstrated that the RPN algorithm achieved state-of-the-art performance in all seven NLU tasks, thereby highlighting its effectiveness and potential for real-world NLU applications.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是机器学习中广泛使用的一种技术，用于提高模型性能。然而，自然语言理解 (NLU) 中现有的数据增强技术可能无法完全捕捉自然语言变化的复杂性，并且应用于大型数据集可能具有挑战性。本文提出了随机位置噪声（RPN）算法，这是一种在词向量级别运行的新型数据增强技术。 RPN通过基于所选词向量的现有值引入噪声来修改原始文本的词嵌入，从而允许更细粒度的修改并更好地捕获自然语言变化。与传统的数据增强方法不同，RPN 在虚拟样本更新期间不需要计算图中的梯度，从而更容易应用于大型数据集。实验结果表明，RPN 在各种 NLU 任务中始终优于现有的数据增强技术，包括情感分析、自然语言推理和释义检测。此外，RPN 在低资源环境中表现良好，适用于任何具有词嵌入层的模型。所提出的 RPN 算法是一种很有前途的方法，可以增强 NLU 性能并解决大规模 NLU 任务中与传统数据增强技术相关的挑战。我们的实验结果表明，RPN 算法在所有七个 NLU 任务中都实现了最先进的性能，从而凸显了其在现实世界 NLU 应用中的有效性和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RPN的词向量级数据增强算法，用于改进深度学习中的自然语言理解任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自然语言理解（NLU）的数据增强技术难以全面捕捉语言复杂性，且在大规模数据集上应用困难。
AI.method: RPN通过在选定词向量的基础上引入噪声修改原始文本的词嵌入，无需计算图梯度即可实现更细粒度的文本扰动。
AI.result: 实验表明RPN在情感分析、自然语言推理等七项NLU任务中均达到最先进水平，且在低资源场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: RPN为提升NLU性能提供了有效解决方案，其无需梯度计算的优势使其适用于大规模语言模型训练。

authors_text: Valentina Franzoni,Sergio Tasso,Simonetta Pallottelli,Damiano Perri
title: Sharing Linkable Learning Objects with the use of Metadata and a Taxonomy Assistant for Categorization
title_zh: 使用元数据和分类法助手共享可链接的学习对象
abstract: In this work, a re-design of the Moodledata module functionalities is presented to share learning objects between e-learning content platforms, e.g., Moodle and G-Lorep, in a linkable object format. The e-learning courses content of the Drupal-based Content Management System G-Lorep for academic learning is exchanged designing an object incorporating metadata to support the reuse and the classification in its context. In such an Artificial Intelligence environment, the exchange of Linkable Learning Objects can be used for dialogue between Learning Systems to obtain information, especially with the use of semantic or structural similarity measures to enhance the existent Taxonomy Assistant for advanced automated classification.
summary: In this work, a re-design of the Moodledata module functionalities is presented to share learning objects between e-learning content platforms, e.g., Moodle and G-Lorep, in a linkable object format. The e-learning courses content of the Drupal-based Content Management System G-Lorep for academic learning is exchanged designing an object incorporating metadata to support the reuse and the classification in its context. In such an Artificial Intelligence environment, the exchange of Linkable Learning Objects can be used for dialogue between Learning Systems to obtain information, especially with the use of semantic or structural similarity measures to enhance the existent Taxonomy Assistant for advanced automated classification.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，重新设计了 Moodledata 模块功能，以可链接的对象格式在电子学习内容平台（例如 Moodle 和 G-Lorep）之间共享学习对象。用于学术学习的基于 Drupal 的内容管理系统 G-Lorep 的电子学习课程内容被交换，设计一个包含元数据的对象，以支持其上下文中的重用和分类。在这样的人工智能环境中，可链接学习对象的交换可用于学习系统之间的对话以获取信息，特别是使用语义或结构相似性测量来增强现有的分类助手以进行高级自动分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过重新设计Moodledata模块功能，利用元数据和分类助手实现跨平台学习对象的共享与分类。
AI.motivation: 现有e-learning平台间学习对象共享困难，缺乏有效分类和重用机制，导致信息孤岛和资源浪费。
AI.method: 设计包含元数据的可链接学习对象格式，结合语义/结构相似性算法优化Taxonomy Assistant分类系统。
AI.result: 实现Moodle与G-Lorep平台间学习对象的互操作性，提升分类准确率并促进系统间知识共享。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决跨平台资源共享难题，为AI驱动的教育系统协作提供技术基础。

authors_text: Qihan Huang,Mengqi Xue,Wenqi Huang,Haofei Zhang,Jie Song,Yongcheng Jing,Mingli Song
title: Evaluation and Improvement of Interpretability for Self-Explainable Part-Prototype Networks
title_zh: 自解释部分原型网络的可解释性评估和改进
abstract: Part-prototype networks (e.g., ProtoPNet, ProtoTree, and ProtoPool) have attracted broad research interest for their intrinsic interpretability and comparable accuracy to non-interpretable counterparts. However, recent works find that the interpretability from prototypes is fragile, due to the semantic gap between the similarities in the feature space and that in the input space. In this work, we strive to address this challenge by making the first attempt to quantitatively and objectively evaluate the interpretability of the part-prototype networks. Specifically, we propose two evaluation metrics, termed as consistency score and stability score, to evaluate the explanation consistency across images and the explanation robustness against perturbations, respectively, both of which are essential for explanations taken into practice. Furthermore, we propose an elaborated part-prototype network with a shallow-deep feature alignment (SDFA) module and a score aggregation (SA) module to improve the interpretability of prototypes. We conduct systematical evaluation experiments and provide substantial discussions to uncover the interpretability of existing part-prototype networks. Experiments on three benchmarks across nine architectures demonstrate that our model achieves significantly superior performance to the state of the art, in both the accuracy and interpretability. Our code is available at https://github.com/hqhQAQ/EvalProtoPNet.
summary: Part-prototype networks (e.g., ProtoPNet, ProtoTree, and ProtoPool) have attracted broad research interest for their intrinsic interpretability and comparable accuracy to non-interpretable counterparts. However, recent works find that the interpretability from prototypes is fragile, due to the semantic gap between the similarities in the feature space and that in the input space. In this work, we strive to address this challenge by making the first attempt to quantitatively and objectively evaluate the interpretability of the part-prototype networks. Specifically, we propose two evaluation metrics, termed as consistency score and stability score, to evaluate the explanation consistency across images and the explanation robustness against perturbations, respectively, both of which are essential for explanations taken into practice. Furthermore, we propose an elaborated part-prototype network with a shallow-deep feature alignment (SDFA) module and a score aggregation (SA) module to improve the interpretability of prototypes. We conduct systematical evaluation experiments and provide substantial discussions to uncover the interpretability of existing part-prototype networks. Experiments on three benchmarks across nine architectures demonstrate that our model achieves significantly superior performance to the state of the art, in both the accuracy and interpretability. Our code is available at https://github.com/hqhQAQ/EvalProtoPNet.
abstract_zh: 部分原型网络（例如 ProtoPNet、ProtoTree 和 ProtoPool）因其内在的可解释性和与不可解释网络相当的准确性而吸引了广泛的研究兴趣。然而，最近的工作发现，由于特征空间和输入空间的相似性之间存在语义差距，原型的可解释性很脆弱。在这项工作中，我们努力通过首次尝试定量和客观地评估部分原型网络的可解释性来应对这一挑战。具体来说，我们提出了两个评估指标，称为一致性得分和稳定性得分，分别用于评估图像之间的解释一致性和针对扰动的解释鲁棒性，这两者对于将解释付诸实践都是至关重要的。此外，我们提出了一个精心设计的部分原型网络，具有浅深特征对齐（SDFA）模块和分数聚合（SA）模块，以提高原型的可解释性。我们进行系统的评估实验并提供实质性讨论，以揭示现有部分原型网络的可解释性。对九种架构的三个基准进行的实验表明，我们的模型在准确性和可解释性方面均实现了明显优于现有技术的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hqhQAQ/EvalProtoPNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估并提升自解释部件-原型网络的可解释性，通过提出量化指标和改进网络结构来解决现有方法中解释性脆弱的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有部件-原型网络的可解释性因特征空间与输入空间语义差异而脆弱，需量化评估并改进其解释性以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 提出一致性得分和稳定性得分两个评估指标，设计包含浅层-深层特征对齐模块（SDFA）和得分聚合模块（SA）的改进网络架构。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，改进模型在准确性和可解释性方面均显著优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化评估指标和网络结构优化，有效提升了部件-原型网络的可解释性，为未来研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Evaluation and Improvement of Interpretability for Self-Explainable Part-Prototype Networks 自解释部分原型网络的可解释性评估和改进 Part-prototype networks (e.g., ProtoPNet, ProtoTree, and ProtoPool) have attracted broad research interest for their intrinsic interpretability and comparable accuracy to non-interpretable counterparts. However, recent works find that the interpretability from prototypes is fragile, due to the semantic gap between the similarities in the feature space and that in the input space. In this work, we strive to address this challenge by making the first attempt to quantitatively and objectively evaluate the interpretability of the part-prototype networks. Specifically, we propose two evaluation metrics, termed as consistency score and stability score, to evaluate the explanation consistency across images and the explanation robustness against perturbations, respectively, both of which are essential for explanations taken into practice. Furthermore, we propose an elaborated part-prototype network with a shallow-deep feature alignment (SDFA) module and a score aggregation (SA) module to improve the interpretability of prototypes. We conduct systematical evaluation experiments and provide substantial discussions to uncover the interpretability of existing part-prototype networks. Experiments on three benchmarks across nine architectures demonstrate that our model achieves significantly superior performance to the state of the art, in both the accuracy and interpretability. Our code is available at https://github.com/hqhQAQ/EvalProtoPNet. 部分原型网络（例如 ProtoPNet、ProtoTree 和 ProtoPool）因其内在的可解释性和与不可解释网络相当的准确性而吸引了广泛的研究兴趣。然而，最近的工作发现，由于特征空间和输入空间的相似性之间存在语义差距，原型的可解释性很脆弱。在这项工作中，我们努力通过首次尝试定量和客观地评估部分原型网络的可解释性来应对这一挑战。具体来说，我们提出了两个评估指标，称为一致性得分和稳定性得分，分别用于评估图像之间的解释一致性和针对扰动的解释鲁棒性，这两者对于将解释付诸实践都是至关重要的。此外，我们提出了一个精心设计的部分原型网络，具有浅深特征对齐（SDFA）模块和分数聚合（SA）模块，以提高原型的可解释性。我们进行系统的评估实验并提供实质性讨论，以揭示现有部分原型网络的可解释性。对九种架构的三个基准进行的实验表明，我们的模型在准确性和可解释性方面均实现了明显优于现有技术的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hqhQAQ/EvalProtoPNet 上获取。 本文旨在评估并提升自解释部件-原型网络的可解释性，通过提出量化指标和改进网络结构来解决现有方法中解释性脆弱的问题。 Qihan Huang,Mengqi Xue,Wenqi Huang,Haofei Zhang,Jie Song,Yongcheng Jing,Mingli Song cs.CV

authors_text: Pasquale Claudio Africa,Simona Perotto,Carlo de Falco
title: Scalable Recovery-based Adaptation on Quadtree Meshes for Advection-Diffusion-Reaction Problems
title_zh: 针对平流扩散反应问题的四叉树网格的基于可扩展恢复的自适应
abstract: We propose a mesh adaptation procedure for Cartesian quadtree meshes, to discretize scalar advection-diffusion-reaction problems. The adaptation process is driven by a recovery-based a posteriori estimator for the $L^2(Ω)$-norm of the discretization error, based on suitable higher order approximations of both the solution and the associated gradient. In particular, a metric-based approach exploits the information furnished by the estimator to iteratively predict the new adapted mesh. The new mesh adaptation algorithm is successfully assessed on different configurations, and turns out to perform well also when dealing with discontinuities in the data as well as in the presence of internal layers not aligned with the Cartesian directions. A cross-comparison with a standard estimate--mark--refine approach and with other adaptive strategies available in the literature shows the remarkable accuracy and parallel scalability of the proposed approach.
summary: We propose a mesh adaptation procedure for Cartesian quadtree meshes, to discretize scalar advection-diffusion-reaction problems. The adaptation process is driven by a recovery-based a posteriori estimator for the $L^2(Ω)$-norm of the discretization error, based on suitable higher order approximations of both the solution and the associated gradient. In particular, a metric-based approach exploits the information furnished by the estimator to iteratively predict the new adapted mesh. The new mesh adaptation algorithm is successfully assessed on different configurations, and turns out to perform well also when dealing with discontinuities in the data as well as in the presence of internal layers not aligned with the Cartesian directions. A cross-comparison with a standard estimate--mark--refine approach and with other adaptive strategies available in the literature shows the remarkable accuracy and parallel scalability of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了笛卡尔四叉树网格的网格自适应过程，以离散标量平流扩散反应问题。自适应过程由基于恢复的离散化误差 $L^2(Ω)$ 范数的后验估计器驱动，基于解和相关梯度的适当高阶近似。特别是，基于度量的方法利用估计器提供的信息来迭代地预测新的适应网格。新的网格自适应算法在不同的配置上成功进行了评估，并且在处理数据不连续性以及存在与笛卡尔方向不对齐的内部层时也表现良好。与标准估计-标记-细化方法以及文献中可用的其他自适应策略的交叉比较表明，所提出的方法具有显着的准确性和并行可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于恢复的自适应方法，用于笛卡尔四叉树网格上的对流-扩散-反应问题离散化。
AI.motivation: 传统网格自适应方法在处理复杂几何、数据不连续及内部层时存在效率和精度不足的问题，需更高效的并行化方案。
AI.method: 基于恢复的后验误差估计器，结合高阶解与梯度近似生成度量指标，迭代预测自适应网格，并验证其在多场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 方法在数据不连续和非对齐内部层问题中表现优异，且在并行计算中展现良好可扩展性，优于传统估计-标记-细化策略。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应算法兼具高精度与并行效率，适用于复杂物理问题的数值模拟，为网格生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Yujia Lin,Liming Chen,Aftab Ali,Christopher Nugent,Cleland Ian,Rongyang Li,Dazhi Gao,Hang Wang,Yajie Wang,Huansheng Ning
title: Human Digital Twin: A Survey
title_zh: 人类数字孪生：一项调查
abstract: Digital twin has recently attracted growing attention, leading to intensive research and applications. Along with this, a new research area, dubbed as "human digital twin" (HDT), has emerged. Similar to the conception of digital twin, HDT is referred to as the replica of a physical-world human in the digital world. Nevertheless, HDT is much more complicated and delicate compared to digital twins of any physical systems and processes, due to humans' dynamic and evolutionary nature, including physical, behavioral, social, physiological, psychological, cognitive, and biological dimensions. Studies on HDT are limited, and the research is still in its infancy. In this paper, we first examine the inception, development, and application of the digital twin concept, providing a context within which we formally define and characterize HDT based on the similarities and differences between digital twin and HDT. Then we conduct an extensive literature review on HDT research, analyzing underpinning technologies and establishing typical frameworks in which the core HDT functions or components are organized. Built upon the findings from the above work, we propose a generic architecture for the HDT system and describe the core function blocks and corresponding technologies. Following this, we present the state of the art of HDT technologies and applications in the healthcare, industry, and daily life domain. Finally, we discuss various issues related to the development of HDT and point out the trends and challenges of future HDT research and development.

Following this, we present the state of the art of HDT technologies and applications in the healthcare, industry, and daily life domain. abstract_zh: Digital twin has recently attracted growing attention, leading to intensive research and applications. Along with this, a new research area, dubbed as "human digital twin" (HDT), has emerged. Similar to the conception of digital twin, HDT is referred to as the replica of a physical-world human in the digital world.然而，由于人类的动态和进化本质，包括身体、行为、社会、生理、心理、认知和生物维度，HDT 与任何物理系统和过程的数字孪生相比要复杂和微妙得多。 Studies on HDT are limited, and the research is still in its infancy.在本文中，我们首先研究了数字孪生概念的起源、发展和应用，并根据数字孪生和 HDT 之间的异同，为我们正式定义和表征 HDT 提供了一个背景。然后，我们对 HDT 研究进行了广泛的文献综述，分析了基础技术并建立了组织核心 HDT 功能或组件的典型框架。基于上述工作的结果，我们提出了 HDT 系统的通用架构，并描述了核心功能块和相应的技术。 Following this, we present the state of the art of HDT technologies and applications in the healthcare, industry, and daily life domain.最后，我们讨论了HDT发展相关的各种问题，并指出了未来HDT研究和发展的趋势和挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人类数字孪生（HDT）的概念、技术框架及其应用，探讨其发展现状与未来挑战。
AI.motivation: HDT作为数字孪生的延伸，因人类复杂多维特性而研究尚浅，需系统梳理其理论与技术基础。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析HDT核心技术，对比数字孪生与HDT异同，提出通用系统架构并总结应用场景。
AI.result: 构建了HDT通用架构，明确了核心功能模块与技术，并总结了其在医疗、工业及日常生活中的应用现状。
AI.conclusion: HDT研究面临数据隐私、多维建模等挑战，未来需跨学科融合以推动技术成熟与应用落地。

tldr: 本文综述了人类数字孪生（HDT）的概念、技术框架及其应用，探讨其发展现状与未来挑战。
motivation: HDT作为数字孪生的延伸，因人类复杂多维特性而研究尚浅，需系统梳理其理论与技术基础。
method: 通过文献综述分析HDT核心技术，对比数字孪生与HDT异同，提出通用系统架构并总结应用场景。
result: 构建了HDT通用架构，明确了核心功能模块与技术，并总结了其在医疗、工业及日常生活中的应用现状。
conclusion: HDT研究面临数据隐私、多维建模等挑战，未来需跨学科融合以推动技术成熟与应用落地。
search_text: Human Digital Twin: A Survey 人类数字孪生：一项调查 Digital twin has recently attracted growing attention, leading to intensive research and applications. Along with this, a new research area, dubbed as "human digital twin" (HDT), has emerged. Similar to the conception of digital twin, HDT is referred to as the replica of a physical-world human in the digital world. Nevertheless, HDT is much more complicated and delicate compared to digital twins of any physical systems and processes, due to humans' dynamic and evolutionary nature, including physical, behavioral, social, physiological, psychological, cognitive, and biological dimensions. Studies on HDT are limited, and the research is still in its infancy. In this paper, we first examine the inception, development, and application of the digital twin concept, providing a context within which we formally define and characterize HDT based on the similarities and differences between digital twin and HDT. Then we conduct an extensive literature review on HDT research, analyzing underpinning technologies and establishing typical frameworks in which the core HDT functions or components are organized. Built upon the findings from the above work, we propose a generic architecture for the HDT system and describe the core function blocks and corresponding technologies. Following this, we present the state of the art of HDT technologies and applications in the healthcare, industry, and daily life domain. Finally, we discuss various issues related to the development of HDT and point out the trends and challenges of future HDT research and development. Digital twin has recently attracted growing attention, leading to intensive research and applications. Along with this, a new research area, dubbed as "human digital twin" (HDT), has emerged. Similar to the conception of digital twin, HDT is referred to as the replica of a physical-world human in the digital world.然而，由于人类的动态和进化本质，包括身体、行为、社会、生理、心理、认知和生物维度，HDT 与任何物理系统和过程的数字孪生相比要复杂和微妙得多。 Studies on HDT are limited, and the research is still in its infancy.在本文中，我们首先研究了数字孪生概念的起源、发展和应用，并根据数字孪生和 HDT 之间的异同，为我们正式定义和表征 HDT 提供了一个背景。然后，我们对 HDT 研究进行了广泛的文献综述，分析了基础技术并建立了组织核心 HDT 功能或组件的典型框架。基于上述工作的结果，我们提出了 HDT 系统的通用架构，并描述了核心功能块和相应的技术。 Following this, we present the state of the art of HDT technologies and applications in the healthcare, industry, and daily life domain.最后，我们讨论了HDT发展相关的各种问题，并指出了未来HDT研究和发展的趋势和挑战。 本文综述了人类数字孪生（HDT）的概念、技术框架及其应用，探讨其发展现状与未来挑战。 Yujia Lin,Liming Chen,Aftab Ali,Christopher Nugent,Cleland Ian,Rongyang Li,Dazhi Gao,Hang Wang,Yajie Wang,Huansheng Ning cs.HC

authors_text: Le-Anh Tran,Dong-Chul Park
title: Encoder-Decoder Network with Guided Transmission Map: Architecture
title_zh: 具有引导传输图的编码器-解码器网络：架构
abstract: An insight into the architecture of the Encoder-Decoder Network with Guided Transmission Map (EDN-GTM), a novel and effective single image dehazing scheme, is presented in this paper. The EDN-GTM takes a conventional RGB hazy image in conjunction with the corresponding transmission map estimated by the dark channel prior (DCP) approach as inputs of the network. The EDN-GTM adopts an enhanced structure of U-Net developed for dehazing tasks and the resulting EDN-GDM has shown state-of-the-art performances on benchmark dehazing datasets in terms of PSNR and SSIM metrics. In order to give an in-depth understanding of the well-designed architecture which largely contributes to the success of the EDN-GTM, extensive experiments and analysis from selecting the core structure of the scheme to investigating advanced network designs are presented in this paper.
summary: An insight into the architecture of the Encoder-Decoder Network with Guided Transmission Map (EDN-GTM), a novel and effective single image dehazing scheme, is presented in this paper. The EDN-GTM takes a conventional RGB hazy image in conjunction with the corresponding transmission map estimated by the dark channel prior (DCP) approach as inputs of the network. The EDN-GTM adopts an enhanced structure of U-Net developed for dehazing tasks and the resulting EDN-GDM has shown state-of-the-art performances on benchmark dehazing datasets in terms of PSNR and SSIM metrics. In order to give an in-depth understanding of the well-designed architecture which largely contributes to the success of the EDN-GTM, extensive experiments and analysis from selecting the core structure of the scheme to investigating advanced network designs are presented in this paper.
abstract_zh: 本文深入探讨了带有引导传输图的编码器-解码器网络（EDN-GTM）的架构，这是一种新颖且有效的单图像去雾方案。 EDN-GTM 将传统的 RGB 模糊图像与暗通道先验 (DCP) 方法估计的相应传输图结合起来作为网络的输入。 EDN-GTM 采用了为去雾任务而开发的 U-Net 的增强结构，由此产生的 EDN-GDM 在 PSNR 和 SSIM 指标方面在基准去雾数据集上显示出了最先进的性能。为了深入了解对 EDN-GTM 的成功做出巨大贡献的精心设计的架构，本文提出了从选择方案核心结构到研究先进网络设计的大量实验和分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于引导传输图的编码器-解码器网络（EDN-GTM），用于单幅图像去雾任务。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法在复杂场景下效果有限，需设计更有效的网络架构以提升去雾性能。
AI.method: 结合U-Net结构改进设计EDN-GTM，利用暗通道先验估计的传输图作为引导信息，输入包含雾图与传输图的双通道数据。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，PSNR和SSIM指标显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的网络架构与传输图引导机制是EDN-GTM取得优异性能的关键因素。

authors_text: Rubèn Tito,Dimosthenis Karatzas,Ernest Valveny
title: Hierarchical multimodal transformers for Multi-Page DocVQA
title_zh: 用于多页 DocVQA 的分层多模式转换器
abstract: Document Visual Question Answering (DocVQA) refers to the task of answering questions from document images. Existing work on DocVQA only considers single-page documents. However, in real scenarios documents are mostly composed of multiple pages that should be processed altogether. In this work we extend DocVQA to the multi-page scenario. For that, we first create a new dataset, MP-DocVQA, where questions are posed over multi-page documents instead of single pages. Second, we propose a new hierarchical method, Hi-VT5, based on the T5 architecture, that overcomes the limitations of current methods to process long multi-page documents. The proposed method is based on a hierarchical transformer architecture where the encoder summarizes the most relevant information of every page and then, the decoder takes this summarized information to generate the final answer. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that our method is able, in a single stage, to answer the questions and provide the page that contains the relevant information to find the answer, which can be used as a kind of explainability measure.
summary: Document Visual Question Answering (DocVQA) refers to the task of answering questions from document images. Existing work on DocVQA only considers single-page documents. However, in real scenarios documents are mostly composed of multiple pages that should be processed altogether. In this work we extend DocVQA to the multi-page scenario. For that, we first create a new dataset, MP-DocVQA, where questions are posed over multi-page documents instead of single pages. Second, we propose a new hierarchical method, Hi-VT5, based on the T5 architecture, that overcomes the limitations of current methods to process long multi-page documents. The proposed method is based on a hierarchical transformer architecture where the encoder summarizes the most relevant information of every page and then, the decoder takes this summarized information to generate the final answer. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that our method is able, in a single stage, to answer the questions and provide the page that contains the relevant information to find the answer, which can be used as a kind of explainability measure.
abstract_zh: 文档视觉问答（DocVQA）是指从文档图像中回答问题的任务。 DocVQA 的现有工作仅考虑单页文档。然而，在实际场景中，文档大多由多个页面组成，需要一起处理。在这项工作中，我们将 DocVQA 扩展到多页面场景。为此，我们首先创建一个新的数据集 MP-DocVQA，其中的问题是针对多页文档而不是单页提出的。其次，我们提出了一种基于T5架构的新的分层方法Hi-VT5，它克服了当前方法处理长多页文档的局限性。所提出的方法基于分层变压器架构，其中编码器总结每个页面最相关的信息，然后解码器利用这些总结的信息来生成最终答案。通过广泛的实验，我们证明我们的方法能够在一个阶段中回答问题并提供包含相关信息的页面来查找答案，这可以用作一种可解释性度量。

AI.tldr: 将文档视觉问答任务扩展到多页文档场景，提出分层多模态Transformer模型Hi-VT5。
AI.motivation: 现有DocVQA研究仅针对单页文档，而实际场景中多页文档更常见，需解决多页信息整合与定位问题。
AI.method: 构建MP-DocVQA数据集，设计Hi-VT5模型：编码器分页提取关键信息，解码器基于汇总信息生成答案并定位相关页面。
AI.result: 实验表明模型可一次性回答问题并准确指出含答案的页面，提升可解释性。
AI.conclusion: Hi-VT5有效解决多页文档问答难题，为复杂文档理解提供新方法。

authors_text: Rafid Umayer Murshed,Sandip Kollol Dhruba,Md. Tawheedul Islam Bhuian,Mst. Rumi Akter
title: Automated Level Crossing System: A Computer Vision Based Approach with Raspberry Pi Microcontroller
title_zh: 自动平交道口系统：采用 Raspberry Pi 微控制器的基于计算机视觉的方法
comment: 4 pages, 7 figures, accepted at the 12th International Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering (ICECE 2022) to be held on 21-23rd December in Dhaka, Bangladesh
comments: 4 pages, 7 figures, accepted at the 12th International Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering (ICECE 2022) to be held on 21-23rd December in Dhaka, Bangladesh
abstract: In a rapidly flourishing country like Bangladesh, accidents in unmanned level crossings are increasing daily. This study presents a deep learning-based approach for automating level crossing junctions, ensuring maximum safety. Here, we develop a fully automated technique using computer vision on a microcontroller that will reduce and eliminate level-crossing deaths and accidents. A Raspberry Pi microcontroller detects impending trains using computer vision on live video, and the intersection is closed until the incoming train passes unimpeded. Live video activity recognition and object detection algorithms scan the junction 24/7. Self-regulating microcontrollers control the entire process. When persistent unauthorized activity is identified, authorities, such as police and fire brigade, are notified via automated messages and notifications. The microcontroller evaluates live rail-track data, and arrival and departure times to anticipate ETAs, train position, velocity, and track problems to avoid head-on collisions. This proposed scheme reduces level crossing accidents and fatalities at a lower cost than current market solutions. Index Terms: Deep Learning, Microcontroller, Object Detection, Railway Crossing, Raspberry Pi
summary: In a rapidly flourishing country like Bangladesh, accidents in unmanned level crossings are increasing daily. This study presents a deep learning-based approach for automating level crossing junctions, ensuring maximum safety. Here, we develop a fully automated technique using computer vision on a microcontroller that will reduce and eliminate level-crossing deaths and accidents. A Raspberry Pi microcontroller detects impending trains using computer vision on live video, and the intersection is closed until the incoming train passes unimpeded. Live video activity recognition and object detection algorithms scan the junction 24/7. Self-regulating microcontrollers control the entire process. When persistent unauthorized activity is identified, authorities, such as police and fire brigade, are notified via automated messages and notifications. The microcontroller evaluates live rail-track data, and arrival and departure times to anticipate ETAs, train position, velocity, and track problems to avoid head-on collisions. This proposed scheme reduces level crossing accidents and fatalities at a lower cost than current market solutions. Index Terms: Deep Learning, Microcontroller, Object Detection, Railway Crossing, Raspberry Pi
abstract_zh: 在孟加拉国这样一个快速繁荣的国家，无人值守平交道口的事故每天都在增加。这项研究提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于自动化平交路口，确保最大程度的安全。在这里，我们开发了一种在微控制器上使用计算机视觉的全自动技术，该技术将减少和消除平交道口死亡和事故。 Raspberry Pi 微控制器使用实时视频中的计算机视觉来检测即将驶来的火车，并且十字路口会关闭，直到驶入的火车畅通无阻地通过。实时视频活动识别和物体检测算法全天候 (24/7) 扫描路口。自调节微控制器控制整个过程。当发现持续的未经授权的活动时，警察和消防队等当局会通过自动消息和通知收到通知。该微控制器评估实时铁路轨道数据以及到达和出发时间，以预测预计到达时间、列车位置、速度和轨道问题，以避免正面碰撞。该方案以比当前市场解决方案更低的成本减少了平交道口事故和死亡人数。索引术语：深度学习、微控制器、物体检测、铁路道口、Raspberry Pi

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉和树莓派微控制器的自动化道口系统，旨在通过实时视频监控和深度学习算法减少无人看守道口的事故。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉国等国家无人看守道口事故频发，现有解决方案成本高昂，需开发一种低成本、高效的自动化安全系统以降低伤亡率。
AI.method: 利用树莓派微控制器结合计算机视觉技术，通过实时视频分析检测列车接近，采用目标检测算法识别道口活动，计算列车ETA、位置及速度，并在检测到异常时自动通知相关部门。
AI.result: 该系统有效减少道口事故和死亡率，且成本低于现有市场方案，可24/7运行并自动处理异常情况。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于深度学习和微控制器的自动化道口系统为低成本、高安全性的解决方案，适用于事故高发地区。

search_text: Automated Level Crossing System: A Computer Vision Based Approach with Raspberry Pi Microcontroller 自动平交道口系统：采用 Raspberry Pi 微控制器的基于计算机视觉的方法 In a rapidly flourishing country like Bangladesh, accidents in unmanned level crossings are increasing daily. This study presents a deep learning-based approach for automating level crossing junctions, ensuring maximum safety. Here, we develop a fully automated technique using computer vision on a microcontroller that will reduce and eliminate level-crossing deaths and accidents. A Raspberry Pi microcontroller detects impending trains using computer vision on live video, and the intersection is closed until the incoming train passes unimpeded. Live video activity recognition and object detection algorithms scan the junction 24/7. Self-regulating microcontrollers control the entire process. When persistent unauthorized activity is identified, authorities, such as police and fire brigade, are notified via automated messages and notifications. The microcontroller evaluates live rail-track data, and arrival and departure times to anticipate ETAs, train position, velocity, and track problems to avoid head-on collisions. This proposed scheme reduces level crossing accidents and fatalities at a lower cost than current market solutions. Index Terms: Deep Learning, Microcontroller, Object Detection, Railway Crossing, Raspberry Pi 在孟加拉国这样一个快速繁荣的国家，无人值守平交道口的事故每天都在增加。这项研究提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于自动化平交路口，确保最大程度的安全。在这里，我们开发了一种在微控制器上使用计算机视觉的全自动技术，该技术将减少和消除平交道口死亡和事故。 Raspberry Pi 微控制器使用实时视频中的计算机视觉来检测即将驶来的火车，并且十字路口会关闭，直到驶入的火车畅通无阻地通过。实时视频活动识别和物体检测算法全天候 (24/7) 扫描路口。自调节微控制器控制整个过程。当发现持续的未经授权的活动时，警察和消防队等当局会通过自动消息和通知收到通知。该微控制器评估实时铁路轨道数据以及到达和出发时间，以预测预计到达时间、列车位置、速度和轨道问题，以避免正面碰撞。该方案以比当前市场解决方案更低的成本减少了平交道口事故和死亡人数。索引术语：深度学习、微控制器、物体检测、铁路道口、Raspberry Pi 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉和树莓派微控制器的自动化道口系统，旨在通过实时视频监控和深度学习算法减少无人看守道口的事故。 Rafid Umayer Murshed,Sandip Kollol Dhruba,Md. Tawheedul Islam Bhuian,Mst. Rumi Akter cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: So Yeon Min,Yao-Hung Hubert Tsai,Wei Ding,Ali Farhadi,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Yonatan Bisk,Jian Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Object Goal Navigation with In-Situ Finetuning
title_zh: 具有原位微调的自监督对象目标导航
abstract: A household robot should be able to navigate to target objects without requiring users to first annotate everything in their home. Most current approaches to object navigation do not test on real robots and rely solely on reconstructed scans of houses and their expensively labeled semantic 3D meshes. In this work, our goal is to build an agent that builds self-supervised models of the world via exploration, the same as a child might - thus we (1) eschew the expense of labeled 3D mesh and (2) enable self-supervised in-situ finetuning in the real world. We identify a strong source of self-supervision (Location Consistency - LocCon) that can train all components of an ObjectNav agent, using unannotated simulated houses. Our key insight is that embodied agents can leverage location consistency as a self-supervision signal - collecting images from different views/angles and applying contrastive learning. We show that our agent can perform competitively in the real world and simulation. Our results also indicate that supervised training with 3D mesh annotations causes models to learn simulation artifacts, which are not transferrable to the real world. In contrast, our LocCon shows the most robust transfer in the real world among the set of models we compare to, and that the real-world performance of all models can be further improved with self-supervised LocCon in-situ training.
summary: A household robot should be able to navigate to target objects without requiring users to first annotate everything in their home. Most current approaches to object navigation do not test on real robots and rely solely on reconstructed scans of houses and their expensively labeled semantic 3D meshes. In this work, our goal is to build an agent that builds self-supervised models of the world via exploration, the same as a child might - thus we (1) eschew the expense of labeled 3D mesh and (2) enable self-supervised in-situ finetuning in the real world. We identify a strong source of self-supervision (Location Consistency - LocCon) that can train all components of an ObjectNav agent, using unannotated simulated houses. Our key insight is that embodied agents can leverage location consistency as a self-supervision signal - collecting images from different views/angles and applying contrastive learning. We show that our agent can perform competitively in the real world and simulation. Our results also indicate that supervised training with 3D mesh annotations causes models to learn simulation artifacts, which are not transferrable to the real world. In contrast, our LocCon shows the most robust transfer in the real world among the set of models we compare to, and that the real-world performance of all models can be further improved with self-supervised LocCon in-situ training.
abstract_zh: 家用机器人应该能够导航到目标对象，而不需要用户首先注释家里的所有东西。当前大多数对象导航方法并未在真实机器人上进行测试，而仅依赖于房屋的重建扫描及其昂贵的标记语义 3D 网格。在这项工作中，我们的目标是构建一个代理，通过探索构建自我监督的世界模型，就像孩子一样 - 因此我们 (1) 避免了标记 3D 网格的费用，并且 (2) 在现实世界中实现自我监督的原位微调。我们确定了强大的自我监督来源（位置一致性 - LocCon），可以使用未注释的模拟房屋来训练 ObjectNav 代理的所有组件。我们的主要见解是，实体代理可以利用位置一致性作为自我监督信号——从不同的视角/角度收集图像并应用对比学习。我们证明我们的代理可以在现实世界和模拟中具有竞争力的表现。我们的结果还表明，使用 3D 网格注释进行监督训练会导致模型学习模拟伪影，而这些伪影无法转移到现实世界。相比之下，我们的 LocCon 显示了我们所比较的模型组中现实世界中最稳健的传输，并且所有模型的现实世界性能都可以通过自监督 LocCon 现场训练进一步提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注数据的自监督物体导航方法，并通过真实环境中的微调提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖昂贵的标注3D网格和仿真环境，难以迁移至真实机器人，且存在仿真伪影问题。
AI.method: 提出基于位置一致性的自监督信号（LocCon），通过对比学习利用未标注模拟数据训练导航模型，并在真实环境中进行微调。
AI.result: 模型在真实世界和仿真环境中均表现优异，优于依赖3D标注的方法，且现场微调进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督LocCon方法能有效避免仿真伪影，实现更优的真实环境迁移，现场微调显著增强模型适应性。

authors_text: Mariana-Iuliana Georgescu,Eduardo Fonseca,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Mario Lucic,Cordelia Schmid,Anurag Arnab
title: Audiovisual Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: 视听屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Can we leverage the audiovisual information already present in video to improve self-supervised representation learning? To answer this question, we study various pretraining architectures and objectives within the masked autoencoding framework, motivated by the success of similar methods in natural language and image understanding. We show that we can achieve significant improvements on audiovisual downstream classification tasks, surpassing the state-of-the-art on VGGSound and AudioSet. Furthermore, we can leverage our audiovisual pretraining scheme for multiple unimodal downstream tasks using a single audiovisual pretrained model. We additionally demonstrate the transferability of our representations, achieving state-of-the-art audiovisual results on Epic Kitchens without pretraining specifically for this dataset.
summary: Can we leverage the audiovisual information already present in video to improve self-supervised representation learning? To answer this question, we study various pretraining architectures and objectives within the masked autoencoding framework, motivated by the success of similar methods in natural language and image understanding. We show that we can achieve significant improvements on audiovisual downstream classification tasks, surpassing the state-of-the-art on VGGSound and AudioSet. Furthermore, we can leverage our audiovisual pretraining scheme for multiple unimodal downstream tasks using a single audiovisual pretrained model. We additionally demonstrate the transferability of our representations, achieving state-of-the-art audiovisual results on Epic Kitchens without pretraining specifically for this dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们可以利用视频中已有的视听信息来改进自监督表示学习吗？为了回答这个问题，我们在自然语言和图像理解中类似方法的成功的推动下，研究了掩码自动编码框架内的各种预训练架构和目标。我们表明，我们可以在视听下游分类任务上实现显着改进，超越 VGGSound 和 AudioSet 的最新技术。此外，我们可以使用单个视听预训练模型，利用我们的视听预训练方案来执行多个单模态下游任务。我们还展示了我们的表示的可转移性，在 Epic Kitchens 上实现了最先进的视听结果，而无需专门针对该数据集进行预训练。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用视频中的视听信息进行自监督表示学习，通过掩码自编码框架提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 受自然语言处理和图像理解中掩码自编码方法成功应用的启发，旨在探索如何利用视频中的视听信息提升自监督学习效果。
AI.method: 通过设计多种预训练架构和目标，在掩码自编码框架下进行视听信息的联合建模与学习。
AI.result: 在VGGSound和AudioSet数据集上超越了现有最佳方法，并能通过单一模型迁移到多个单模态任务，且在Epic Kitchens上未特定预训练即取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 证明了视听预训练的有效性及模型的泛化能力，为多模态和单模态任务提供了统一的预训练方案。

search_text: Audiovisual Masked Autoencoders 视听屏蔽自动编码器 Can we leverage the audiovisual information already present in video to improve self-supervised representation learning? To answer this question, we study various pretraining architectures and objectives within the masked autoencoding framework, motivated by the success of similar methods in natural language and image understanding. We show that we can achieve significant improvements on audiovisual downstream classification tasks, surpassing the state-of-the-art on VGGSound and AudioSet. Furthermore, we can leverage our audiovisual pretraining scheme for multiple unimodal downstream tasks using a single audiovisual pretrained model. We additionally demonstrate the transferability of our representations, achieving state-of-the-art audiovisual results on Epic Kitchens without pretraining specifically for this dataset. 我们可以利用视频中已有的视听信息来改进自监督表示学习吗？为了回答这个问题，我们在自然语言和图像理解中类似方法的成功的推动下，研究了掩码自动编码框架内的各种预训练架构和目标。我们表明，我们可以在视听下游分类任务上实现显着改进，超越 VGGSound 和 AudioSet 的最新技术。此外，我们可以使用单个视听预训练模型，利用我们的视听预训练方案来执行多个单模态下游任务。我们还展示了我们的表示的可转移性，在 Epic Kitchens 上实现了最先进的视听结果，而无需专门针对该数据集进行预训练。 本论文提出利用视频中的视听信息进行自监督表示学习，通过掩码自编码框架提升模型性能。 Mariana-Iuliana Georgescu,Eduardo Fonseca,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Mario Lucic,Cordelia Schmid,Anurag Arnab cs.CV,cs.SD

authors_text: Wanqing Zhu,Jia-Li Yin,Bo-Hao Chen,Ximeng Liu
title: SRoUDA: Meta Self-training for Robust Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: SRoUDA：用于鲁棒无监督域适应的元自训练
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the AAAI2023
comments: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the AAAI2023
abstract: As acquiring manual labels on data could be costly, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), which transfers knowledge learned from a rich-label dataset to the unlabeled target dataset, is gaining increasing popularity. While extensive studies have been devoted to improving the model accuracy on target domain, an important issue of model robustness is neglected. To make things worse, conventional adversarial training (AT) methods for improving model robustness are inapplicable under UDA scenario since they train models on adversarial examples that are generated by supervised loss function. In this paper, we present a new meta self-training pipeline, named SRoUDA, for improving adversarial robustness of UDA models. Based on self-training paradigm, SRoUDA starts with pre-training a source model by applying UDA baseline on source labeled data and taraget unlabeled data with a developed random masked augmentation (RMA), and then alternates between adversarial target model training on pseudo-labeled target data and finetuning source model by a meta step. While self-training allows the direct incorporation of AT in UDA, the meta step in SRoUDA further helps in mitigating error propagation from noisy pseudo labels. Extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of SRoUDA where it achieves significant model robustness improvement without harming clean accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Vision.
summary: As acquiring manual labels on data could be costly, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), which transfers knowledge learned from a rich-label dataset to the unlabeled target dataset, is gaining increasing popularity. While extensive studies have been devoted to improving the model accuracy on target domain, an important issue of model robustness is neglected. To make things worse, conventional adversarial training (AT) methods for improving model robustness are inapplicable under UDA scenario since they train models on adversarial examples that are generated by supervised loss function. In this paper, we present a new meta self-training pipeline, named SRoUDA, for improving adversarial robustness of UDA models. Based on self-training paradigm, SRoUDA starts with pre-training a source model by applying UDA baseline on source labeled data and taraget unlabeled data with a developed random masked augmentation (RMA), and then alternates between adversarial target model training on pseudo-labeled target data and finetuning source model by a meta step. While self-training allows the direct incorporation of AT in UDA, the meta step in SRoUDA further helps in mitigating error propagation from noisy pseudo labels. Extensive experiments on various benchmark datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of SRoUDA where it achieves significant model robustness improvement without harming clean accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Vision.
abstract_zh: 由于获取数据的手动标签可能成本高昂，因此无监督域适应（UDA）越来越受欢迎，它将从丰富标签数据集中学到的知识转移到未标记的目标数据集。虽然广泛的研究致力于提高目标域的模型精度，但忽略了模型鲁棒性的一个重要问题。更糟糕的是，用于提高模型鲁棒性的传统对抗训练（AT）方法在 UDA 场景下不适用，因为它们在由监督损失函数生成的对抗样本上训练模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的元自训练管道，名为 SRoUDA，用于提高 UDA 模型的对抗鲁棒性。基于自训练范式，SRoUDA 首先通过在源标记数据上应用 UDA 基线来预训练源模型，并使用开发的随机屏蔽增强（RMA）来对目标未标记数据进行预训练，然后在伪标记目标数据上的对抗性目标模型训练和通过元步骤微调源模型之间交替进行。虽然自训练允许将 AT 直接合并到 UDA 中，但 SRoUDA 中的元步骤进一步有助于减轻来自噪声伪标签的错误传播。对各种基准数据集的大量实验证明了 SRoUDA 的最先进性能，它在不损害干净精度的情况下实现了模型鲁棒性的显着提高。代码可在 https://github.com/Vision 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRoUDA方法，通过元自训练框架提升无监督域适应（UDA）模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统UDA研究侧重目标域准确率，忽视模型鲁棒性；对抗训练方法因依赖监督损失生成的对抗样本，在UDA场景下难以直接应用。
AI.method: 基于自训练范式，SRoUDA首先通过随机掩码增强（RMA）预训练源模型，然后交替进行对抗目标模型训练（基于伪标签数据）和源模型元步长微调，缓解伪标签噪声带来的误差传播。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，SRoUDA在提升模型鲁棒性的同时未损害干净样本准确率，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SRoUDA通过结合自训练与元学习，有效解决了UDA场景下对抗鲁棒性提升与伪标签噪声抑制的矛盾。

authors_text: Renaud Vandeghen,Gilles Louppe,Marc Van Droogenbroeck
title: Adaptive Self-Training for Object Detection
title_zh: 目标检测的自适应自训练
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables, 1 page of supplementary material
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables, 1 page of supplementary material
abstract: Deep learning has emerged as an effective solution for solving the task of object detection in images but at the cost of requiring large labeled datasets. To mitigate this cost, semi-supervised object detection methods, which consist in leveraging abundant unlabeled data, have been proposed and have already shown impressive results. However, most of these methods require linking a pseudo-label to a ground-truth object by thresholding. In previous works, this threshold value is usually determined empirically, which is time consuming, and only done for a single data distribution. When the domain, and thus the data distribution, changes, a new and costly parameter search is necessary. In this work, we introduce our method Adaptive Self-Training for Object Detection (ASTOD), which is a simple yet effective teacher-student method. ASTOD determines without cost a threshold value based directly on the ground value of the score histogram. To improve the quality of the teacher predictions, we also propose a novel pseudo-labeling procedure. We use different views of the unlabeled images during the pseudo-labeling step to reduce the number of missed predictions and thus obtain better candidate labels. Our teacher and our student are trained separately, and our method can be used in an iterative fashion by replacing the teacher by the student. On the MS-COCO dataset, our method consistently performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods that do not require a threshold parameter, and shows competitive results with methods that require a parameter sweep search. Additional experiments with respect to a supervised baseline on the DIOR dataset containing satellite images lead to similar conclusions, and prove that it is possible to adapt the score threshold automatically in self-training, regardless of the data distribution. The code is available at https:// github.com/rvandeghen/ASTOD

To improve the quality of the teacher predictions, we also propose a novel pseudo-labeling procedure. We use different views of the unlabeled images during the pseudo-labeling step to reduce the number of missed predictions and thus obtain better candidate labels. Our teacher and our student are trained separately, and our method can be used in an iterative fashion by replacing the teacher by the student. On the MS-COCO dataset, our method consistently performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods that do not require a threshold parameter, and shows competitive results with methods that require a parameter sweep search. abstract_zh: 深度学习已成为解决图像中对象检测任务的有效解决方案，但代价是需要大量标记数据集。为了降低这种成本，人们提出了半监督目标检测方法，其中包括利用大量未标记数据，并且已经显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，大多数这些方法需要通过阈值将伪标签链接到真实对象。在以前的工作中，这个阈值通常是凭经验确定的，这非常耗时，并且仅针对单个数据分布进行。当域以及数据分布发生变化时，需要进行新的且成本高昂的参数搜索。在这项工作中，我们介绍了我们的方法自适应目标检测自训练（ASTOD），这是一种简单而有效的师生方法。 ASTOD 直接根据分数直方图的基本值确定阈值，无需任何成本。为了提高教师预测的质量，我们还提出了一种新颖的伪标记程序。我们在伪标记步骤中使用未标记图像的不同视图来减少错过预测的数量，从而获得更好的候选标签。我们的老师和学生是分开训练的，我们的方法可以通过用学生代替老师来以迭代的方式使用。在 MS-COCO 数据集上，我们的方法始终优于不需要阈值参数的最先进方法，并且与需要参数扫描搜索的方法显示出有竞争力的结果。针对包含卫星图像的 DIOR 数据集的监督基线进行的其他实验得出了类似的结论，并证明无论数据分布如何，都可以在自我训练中自动调整分数阈值。代码可在 https://github.com/rvandeghen/ASTOD 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应自训练方法（ASTOD），用于解决目标检测中半监督学习的阈值设定问题，通过自动确定伪标签阈值以提高模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法依赖人工设定的固定阈值来生成伪标签，难以适应数据分布变化，且需耗时调参。
AI.method: ASTOD通过直接利用得分直方图的地面真值自适应确定阈值，并引入多视角伪标签生成策略以减少预测遗漏，采用教师-学生框架迭代优化模型。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和DIOR数据集上，ASTOD在无需阈值参数的情况下优于现有方法，且在不同数据分布下均能自动适应。
AI.conclusion: 自适应阈值机制可有效提升半监督目标检测性能，无需人工干预即可应对数据分布变化。

On the MS-COCO dataset, our method consistently performs favorably against state-of-the-art methods that do not require a threshold parameter, and shows competitive results with methods that require a parameter sweep search. Additional experiments with respect to a supervised baseline on the DIOR dataset containing satellite images lead to similar conclusions, and prove that it is possible to adapt the score threshold automatically in self-training, regardless of the data distribution. The code is available at https:// github.com/rvandeghen/ASTOD 深度学习已成为解决图像中对象检测任务的有效解决方案，但代价是需要大量标记数据集。为了降低这种成本，人们提出了半监督目标检测方法，其中包括利用大量未标记数据，并且已经显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，大多数这些方法需要通过阈值将伪标签链接到真实对象。在以前的工作中，这个阈值通常是凭经验确定的，这非常耗时，并且仅针对单个数据分布进行。当域以及数据分布发生变化时，需要进行新的且成本高昂的参数搜索。在这项工作中，我们介绍了我们的方法自适应目标检测自训练（ASTOD），这是一种简单而有效的师生方法。 ASTOD 直接根据分数直方图的基本值确定阈值，无需任何成本。为了提高教师预测的质量，我们还提出了一种新颖的伪标记程序。我们在伪标记步骤中使用未标记图像的不同视图来减少错过预测的数量，从而获得更好的候选标签。我们的老师和学生是分开训练的，我们的方法可以通过用学生代替老师来以迭代的方式使用。在 MS-COCO 数据集上，我们的方法始终优于不需要阈值参数的最先进方法，并且与需要参数扫描搜索的方法显示出有竞争力的结果。针对包含卫星图像的 DIOR 数据集的监督基线进行的其他实验得出了类似的结论，并证明无论数据分布如何，都可以在自我训练中自动调整分数阈值。代码可在 https://github.com/rvandeghen/ASTOD 获取 本文提出一种自适应自训练方法（ASTOD），用于解决目标检测中半监督学习的阈值设定问题，通过自动确定伪标签阈值以提高模型性能。 Renaud Vandeghen,Gilles Louppe,Marc Van Droogenbroeck cs.CV

authors_text: Tanish Mittal,Preyansh Agrawal,Esha Pahwa,Aarya Makwana
title: NFResNet: Multi-scale and U-shaped Networks for Deblurring
title_zh: NFResNet：用于去模糊的多尺度 U 形网络
comment: Due to limitations in GPU Compute, We weren't able to test the paper on the popularly used GoPro Dataset which is mostly used for testing image deblurring problems. Afterwards the submission on Arxiv, We observed that we missed comparison of our results with some State-of-the-art papers like ARVo & Gated Spatio-Temporal Attention-Guided Video Deblurring
comments: Due to limitations in GPU Compute, We weren't able to test the paper on the popularly used GoPro Dataset which is mostly used for testing image deblurring problems. Afterwards the submission on Arxiv, We observed that we missed comparison of our results with some State-of-the-art papers like ARVo & Gated Spatio-Temporal Attention-Guided Video Deblurring
abstract: Multi-Scale and U-shaped Networks are widely used in various image restoration problems, including deblurring. Keeping in mind the wide range of applications, we present a comparison of these architectures and their effects on image deblurring. We also introduce a new block called as NFResblock. It consists of a Fast Fourier Transformation layer and a series of modified Non-Linear Activation Free Blocks. Based on these architectures and additions, we introduce NFResnet and NFResnet+, which are modified multi-scale and U-Net architectures, respectively. We also use three different loss functions to train these architectures: Charbonnier Loss, Edge Loss, and Frequency Reconstruction Loss. Extensive experiments on the Deep Video Deblurring dataset, along with ablation studies for each component, have been presented in this paper. The proposed architectures achieve a considerable increase in Peak Signal to Noise (PSNR) ratio and Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) value.
summary: Multi-Scale and U-shaped Networks are widely used in various image restoration problems, including deblurring. Keeping in mind the wide range of applications, we present a comparison of these architectures and their effects on image deblurring. We also introduce a new block called as NFResblock. It consists of a Fast Fourier Transformation layer and a series of modified Non-Linear Activation Free Blocks. Based on these architectures and additions, we introduce NFResnet and NFResnet+, which are modified multi-scale and U-Net architectures, respectively. We also use three different loss functions to train these architectures: Charbonnier Loss, Edge Loss, and Frequency Reconstruction Loss. Extensive experiments on the Deep Video Deblurring dataset, along with ablation studies for each component, have been presented in this paper. The proposed architectures achieve a considerable increase in Peak Signal to Noise (PSNR) ratio and Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) value.
abstract_zh: 多尺度和 U 形网络广泛应用于各种图像恢复问题，包括去模糊。考虑到广泛的应用，我们对这些架构及其对图像去模糊的影响进行了比较。我们还引入了一个名为 NFResblock 的新块。它由快速傅立叶变换层和一系列修改的非线性激活自由块组成。基于这些架构和补充，我们引入了 NFResnet 和 NFResnet+，它们分别是改进的多尺度和 U-Net 架构。我们还使用三种不同的损失函数来训练这些架构：Charbonnier 损失、边缘损失和频率重建损失。本文介绍了深度视频去模糊数据集的大量实验以及每个组件的消融研究。所提出的架构实现了峰值信噪比（PSNR）和结构相似性指数（SSIM）值的显着增加。

AI.tldr: 提出基于多尺度和U型网络结构的NFResNet及其改进版NFResNet+，用于图像去模糊任务，并比较不同架构效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管多尺度和U型网络在图像修复中广泛应用，但针对去模糊任务的系统比较及优化方法仍需探索，以提升去模糊效果。
AI.method: 设计包含快速傅里叶变换层和改进非线性激活块的NFResblock模块，构建多尺度和U-Net改进网络NFResNet/NFResNet+，采用Charbonnier损失、边缘损失和频率重建损失进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提架构在Deep Video Deblurring数据集上显著提升PSNR和SSIM指标，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过模块设计与多损失函数结合，NFResNet系列在图像去模糊任务中取得显著性能提升，验证了多尺度与U型结构改进的有效性。

authors_text: Smaran Adarsh,Lukas Burgholzer,Tanmay Manjunath,Robert Wille
title: SyReC Synthesizer: An MQT tool for synthesis of reversible circuits
title_zh: SyReC Synthesizer：用于合成可逆电路的 MQT 工具
abstract: Reversible circuits form the backbone for many promising emerging technologies such as quantum computing, low power/adiabatic design, encoder/decoder devices, and several other applications. In the recent years, the scalable synthesis of such circuits has gained significant attention. In this work, we present the SyReC Synthesizer, a synthesis tool for reversible circuits based on the hardware description language SyReC. SyReC allows to describe reversible functionality at a high level of abstraction. The provided SyReC Synthesizer then realizes this functionality in a push-button fashion. Corresponding options allow for a trade-off between the number of needed circuit signals/lines (relevant, e.g., for quantum computing in which every circuit line corresponds to a qubit) and the respectively needed gates (corresponding to the circuit's costs). Furthermore, the tool allows to simulate the resulting circuit as well as to determine the gate costs of it. The SyReC Synthesizer is available as an open-source software package at https://github.com/cda-tum/syrec as part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT).
summary: Reversible circuits form the backbone for many promising emerging technologies such as quantum computing, low power/adiabatic design, encoder/decoder devices, and several other applications. In the recent years, the scalable synthesis of such circuits has gained significant attention. In this work, we present the SyReC Synthesizer, a synthesis tool for reversible circuits based on the hardware description language SyReC. SyReC allows to describe reversible functionality at a high level of abstraction. The provided SyReC Synthesizer then realizes this functionality in a push-button fashion. Corresponding options allow for a trade-off between the number of needed circuit signals/lines (relevant, e.g., for quantum computing in which every circuit line corresponds to a qubit) and the respectively needed gates (corresponding to the circuit's costs). Furthermore, the tool allows to simulate the resulting circuit as well as to determine the gate costs of it. The SyReC Synthesizer is available as an open-source software package at https://github.com/cda-tum/syrec as part of the Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT).
abstract_zh: 可逆电路构成了许多有前景的新兴技术的支柱，例如量子计算、低功耗/绝热设计、编码器/解码器设备和其他一些应用。近年来，此类电路的可扩展综合引起了广泛关注。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SyReC Synthesizer，这是一种基于硬件描述语言 SyReC 的可逆电路综合工具。 SyReC 允许在高抽象级别描述可逆功能。然后，所提供的 SyReC 合成器以按钮方式实现此功能。 Corresponding options allow for a trade-off between the number of needed circuit signals/lines (relevant, e.g., for quantum computing in which every circuit line corresponds to a qubit) and the respectively needed gates (corresponding to the circuit's costs).此外，该工具还可以模拟生成的电路并确定其门成本。 SyReC 合成器作为慕尼黑量子工具包 (MQT) 的一部分作为开​​源软件包在 https://github.com/cda-tum/syrec 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为SyReC Synthesizer的可逆电路综合工具，该工具基于SyReC硬件描述语言，旨在高效生成可逆电路。
AI.motivation: 可逆电路是量子计算、低功耗设计等前沿技术的基础，但其可扩展综合工具的需求尚未完全满足，亟需平衡电路信号线数量与门数量的优化方案。
AI.method: 基于SyReC硬件描述语言实现高层抽象描述，并通过工具自动综合生成电路，提供信号线数量与门数量的权衡选项，支持电路仿真与门成本分析。
AI.result: 开发了开源工具SyReC Synthesizer，集成于慕尼黑量子工具包（MQT），可实现可逆电路的自动化综合与优化。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为可逆电路综合提供了可扩展的解决方案，有助于推动量子计算等领域的技术发展。

authors_text: Marc Aubreville,Jonathan Ganz,Jonas Ammeling,Taryn A. Donovan,Rutger H. J. Fick,Katharina Breininger,Christof A. Bertram
title: Deep learning-based Subtyping of Atypical and Normal Mitoses using a Hierarchical Anchor-Free Object Detector
title_zh: 使用分层无锚对象检测器对非典型和正常有丝分裂进行基于深度学习的亚型
abstract: Mitotic activity is key for the assessment of malignancy in many tumors. Moreover, it has been demonstrated that the proportion of abnormal mitosis to normal mitosis is of prognostic significance. Atypical mitotic figures (MF) can be identified morphologically as having segregation abnormalities of the chromatids. In this work, we perform, for the first time, automatic subtyping of mitotic figures into normal and atypical categories according to characteristic morphological appearances of the different phases of mitosis. Using the publicly available MIDOG21 and TUPAC16 breast cancer mitosis datasets, two experts blindly subtyped mitotic figures into five morphological categories. Further, we set up a state-of-the-art object detection pipeline extending the anchor-free FCOS approach with a gated hierarchical subclassification branch. Our labeling experiment indicated that subtyping of mitotic figures is a challenging task and prone to inter-rater disagreement, which we found in 24.89% of MF. Using the more diverse MIDOG21 dataset for training and TUPAC16 for testing, we reached a mean overall average precision score of 0.552, a ROC AUC score of 0.833 for atypical/normal MF and a mean class-averaged ROC-AUC score of 0.977 for discriminating the different phases of cells undergoing mitosis.
summary: Mitotic activity is key for the assessment of malignancy in many tumors. Moreover, it has been demonstrated that the proportion of abnormal mitosis to normal mitosis is of prognostic significance. Atypical mitotic figures (MF) can be identified morphologically as having segregation abnormalities of the chromatids. In this work, we perform, for the first time, automatic subtyping of mitotic figures into normal and atypical categories according to characteristic morphological appearances of the different phases of mitosis. Using the publicly available MIDOG21 and TUPAC16 breast cancer mitosis datasets, two experts blindly subtyped mitotic figures into five morphological categories. Further, we set up a state-of-the-art object detection pipeline extending the anchor-free FCOS approach with a gated hierarchical subclassification branch. Our labeling experiment indicated that subtyping of mitotic figures is a challenging task and prone to inter-rater disagreement, which we found in 24.89% of MF. Using the more diverse MIDOG21 dataset for training and TUPAC16 for testing, we reached a mean overall average precision score of 0.552, a ROC AUC score of 0.833 for atypical/normal MF and a mean class-averaged ROC-AUC score of 0.977 for discriminating the different phases of cells undergoing mitosis.
abstract_zh: 有丝分裂活性是评估许多肿瘤恶性肿瘤的关键。此外，已经证明异常有丝分裂与正常有丝分裂的比例具有预后意义。非典型有丝分裂像 (MF) 可以在形态学上鉴定为具有染色单体分离异常。在这项工作中，我们首次根据有丝分裂不同阶段的特征形态外观，将有丝分裂图自动分为正常和非典型类别。使用公开的 MIDOG21 和 TUPAC16 乳腺癌有丝分裂数据集，两位专家盲目地将有丝分裂图分为五个形态类别。此外，我们建立了最先进的对象检测管道，通过门控分层子分类分支扩展了无锚 FCOS 方法。我们的标签实验表明，有丝分裂图的亚型划分是一项具有挑战性的任务，并且容易出现评估者间的分歧，我们在 24.89% 的 MF 中发现了这种情况。使用更多样化的 MIDOG21 数据集进行训练，使用 TUPAC16 进行测试，我们达到了 0.552 的总体平均精度得分，非典型/正常 MF 的 ROC AUC 得分为 0.833，区分经历有丝分裂的细胞的不同阶段的平均类别平均 ROC-AUC 得分为 0.977。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的分层无锚框目标检测器，用于自动将有丝分裂细胞分为正常和异常亚型。
AI.motivation: 有丝分裂比例对肿瘤恶性程度评估至关重要，但现有方法无法自动区分正常与异常有丝分裂，且人工标注存在较大分歧。
AI.method: 扩展无锚框FCOS框架，加入门控分层子分类分支，利用MIDOG21数据集训练、TUPAC16数据集测试。
AI.result: 达到0.552的平均精度、0.833的ROC AUC（异常/正常分类）及0.977的细胞相位区分ROC-AUC。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有丝分裂亚型分类中表现有效，但标注分歧表明任务本身具有挑战性。

search_text: Deep learning-based Subtyping of Atypical and Normal Mitoses using a Hierarchical Anchor-Free Object Detector 使用分层无锚对象检测器对非典型和正常有丝分裂进行基于深度学习的亚型 Mitotic activity is key for the assessment of malignancy in many tumors. Moreover, it has been demonstrated that the proportion of abnormal mitosis to normal mitosis is of prognostic significance. Atypical mitotic figures (MF) can be identified morphologically as having segregation abnormalities of the chromatids. In this work, we perform, for the first time, automatic subtyping of mitotic figures into normal and atypical categories according to characteristic morphological appearances of the different phases of mitosis. Using the publicly available MIDOG21 and TUPAC16 breast cancer mitosis datasets, two experts blindly subtyped mitotic figures into five morphological categories. Further, we set up a state-of-the-art object detection pipeline extending the anchor-free FCOS approach with a gated hierarchical subclassification branch. Our labeling experiment indicated that subtyping of mitotic figures is a challenging task and prone to inter-rater disagreement, which we found in 24.89% of MF. Using the more diverse MIDOG21 dataset for training and TUPAC16 for testing, we reached a mean overall average precision score of 0.552, a ROC AUC score of 0.833 for atypical/normal MF and a mean class-averaged ROC-AUC score of 0.977 for discriminating the different phases of cells undergoing mitosis. 有丝分裂活性是评估许多肿瘤恶性肿瘤的关键。此外，已经证明异常有丝分裂与正常有丝分裂的比例具有预后意义。非典型有丝分裂像 (MF) 可以在形态学上鉴定为具有染色单体分离异常。在这项工作中，我们首次根据有丝分裂不同阶段的特征形态外观，将有丝分裂图自动分为正常和非典型类别。使用公开的 MIDOG21 和 TUPAC16 乳腺癌有丝分裂数据集，两位专家盲目地将有丝分裂图分为五个形态类别。此外，我们建立了最先进的对象检测管道，通过门控分层子分类分支扩展了无锚 FCOS 方法。我们的标签实验表明，有丝分裂图的亚型划分是一项具有挑战性的任务，并且容易出现评估者间的分歧，我们在 24.89% 的 MF 中发现了这种情况。使用更多样化的 MIDOG21 数据集进行训练，使用 TUPAC16 进行测试，我们达到了 0.552 的总体平均精度得分，非典型/正常 MF 的 ROC AUC 得分为 0.833，区分经历有丝分裂的细胞的不同阶段的平均类别平均 ROC-AUC 得分为 0.977。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的分层无锚框目标检测器，用于自动将有丝分裂细胞分为正常和异常亚型。 Marc Aubreville,Jonathan Ganz,Jonas Ammeling,Taryn A. Donovan,Rutger H. J. Fick,Katharina Breininger,Christof A. Bertram cs.CV

authors_text: Taeryung Lee,Gyeongsik Moon,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: MultiAct: Long-Term 3D Human Motion Generation from Multiple Action Labels
title_zh: MultiAct：根据多个动作标签生成长期 3D 人体运动
abstract: We tackle the problem of generating long-term 3D human motion from multiple action labels. Two main previous approaches, such as action- and motion-conditioned methods, have limitations to solve this problem. The action-conditioned methods generate a sequence of motion from a single action. Hence, it cannot generate long-term motions composed of multiple actions and transitions between actions. Meanwhile, the motion-conditioned methods generate future motions from initial motion. The generated future motions only depend on the past, so they are not controllable by the user's desired actions. We present MultiAct, the first framework to generate long-term 3D human motion from multiple action labels. MultiAct takes account of both action and motion conditions with a unified recurrent generation system. It repetitively takes the previous motion and action label; then, it generates a smooth transition and the motion of the given action. As a result, MultiAct produces realistic long-term motion controlled by the given sequence of multiple action labels. Codes are available here at https://github.com/TaeryungLee/MultiAct_RELEASE.
summary: We tackle the problem of generating long-term 3D human motion from multiple action labels. Two main previous approaches, such as action- and motion-conditioned methods, have limitations to solve this problem. The action-conditioned methods generate a sequence of motion from a single action. Hence, it cannot generate long-term motions composed of multiple actions and transitions between actions. Meanwhile, the motion-conditioned methods generate future motions from initial motion. The generated future motions only depend on the past, so they are not controllable by the user's desired actions. We present MultiAct, the first framework to generate long-term 3D human motion from multiple action labels. MultiAct takes account of both action and motion conditions with a unified recurrent generation system. It repetitively takes the previous motion and action label; then, it generates a smooth transition and the motion of the given action. As a result, MultiAct produces realistic long-term motion controlled by the given sequence of multiple action labels. Codes are available here at https://github.com/TaeryungLee/MultiAct_RELEASE.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了从多个动作标签生成长期 3D 人体运动的问题。先前的两种主要方法，例如动作条件方法和运动条件方法，在解决这个问题时都有局限性。动作条件方法从单个动作生成一系列运动。因此，它无法生成由多个动作和动作之间的转换组成的长期运动。同时，运动条件方法从初始运动生成未来运动。生成的未来动作仅取决于过去，因此它们无法由用户期望的动作控制。我们推出了 MultiAct，这是第一个从多个动作标签生成长期 3D 人体运动的框架。 MultiAct 通过统一的循环生成系统考虑动作和运动条件。它重复使用先前的动作和动作标签；然后，它生成平滑的过渡和给定动作的运动。因此，MultiAct 会产生由给定的多个动作标签序列控制的逼真的长期运动。代码可在 https://github.com/TaeryungLee/MultiAct_RELEASE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiAct框架，解决从多个动作标签生成长期3D人体运动的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动作条件和运动条件方法无法生成包含多动作过渡的长期运动，且缺乏用户控制性。
AI.method: 设计统一的递归生成系统，结合动作标签与运动条件，迭代生成平滑过渡的多动作序列。
AI.result: 实现由多动作标签控制的逼真长期3D人体运动生成，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MultiAct是首个融合动作与运动条件的框架，解决了多动作长期运动生成的控制与连贯性问题。

ai_content.conclusion: MultiAct是首个融合动作与运动条件的框架，解决了多动作长期运动生成的控制与连贯性问题。

authors_text: Haibin He,Xinyuan Chen,Chaoyue Wang,Juhua Liu,Bo Du,Dacheng Tao,Yu Qiao
title: Diff-Font: Diffusion Model for Robust One-Shot Font Generation
title_zh: Diff-Font：用于鲁棒一次性字体生成的扩散模型
abstract: Font generation is a difficult and time-consuming task, especially in those languages using ideograms that have complicated structures with a large number of characters, such as Chinese. To solve this problem, few-shot font generation and even one-shot font generation have attracted a lot of attention. However, most existing font generation methods may still suffer from (i) large cross-font gap challenge; (ii) subtle cross-font variation problem; and (iii) incorrect generation of complicated characters. In this paper, we propose a novel one-shot font generation method based on a diffusion model, named Diff-Font, which can be stably trained on large datasets. The proposed model aims to generate the entire font library by giving only one sample as the reference. Specifically, a large stroke-wise dataset is constructed, and a stroke-wise diffusion model is proposed to preserve the structure and the completion of each generated character. To our best knowledge, the proposed Diff-Font is the first work that developed diffusion models to handle the font generation task. The well-trained Diff-Font is not only robust to font gap and font variation, but also achieved promising performance on difficult character generation. Compared to previous font generation methods, our model reaches state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Font generation is a difficult and time-consuming task, especially in those languages using ideograms that have complicated structures with a large number of characters, such as Chinese. To solve this problem, few-shot font generation and even one-shot font generation have attracted a lot of attention. However, most existing font generation methods may still suffer from (i) large cross-font gap challenge; (ii) subtle cross-font variation problem; and (iii) incorrect generation of complicated characters. In this paper, we propose a novel one-shot font generation method based on a diffusion model, named Diff-Font, which can be stably trained on large datasets. The proposed model aims to generate the entire font library by giving only one sample as the reference. Specifically, a large stroke-wise dataset is constructed, and a stroke-wise diffusion model is proposed to preserve the structure and the completion of each generated character. To our best knowledge, the proposed Diff-Font is the first work that developed diffusion models to handle the font generation task. The well-trained Diff-Font is not only robust to font gap and font variation, but also achieved promising performance on difficult character generation. Compared to previous font generation methods, our model reaches state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 字体生成是一项困难且耗时的任务，特别是对于那些使用具有大量字符的复杂结构的表意文字的语言，例如中文。为了解决这个问题，few-shot字体生成甚至one-shot字体生成引起了很多关注。然而，大多数现有的字体生成方法可能仍然面临（i）大的跨字体间隙挑战； (ii) 微妙的跨字体变化问题； (iii) 复杂字符的错误生成。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于扩散模型的新型一次性字体生成方法，称为 Diff-Font，该方法可以在大型数据集上稳定地进行训练。所提出的模型旨在通过仅提供一个样本作为参考来生成整个字体库。具体来说，构建了一个大型笔划数据集，并提出了笔划扩散模型来保留每个生成字符的结构和完成度。据我们所知，所提出的 Diff-Font 是第一个开发扩散模型来处理字体生成任务的工作。训练有素的 Diff-Font 不仅对字体间隙和字体变化具有鲁棒性，而且在困难字符生成方面也取得了良好的性能。与以前的字体生成方法相比，我们的模型在定性和定量上都达到了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的单样本字体生成方法Diff-Font，用于解决复杂语言（如中文）字体生成中的跨字体差异、细微变化及复杂字符生成难题。
AI.motivation: 现有字体生成方法在处理跨字体差异、细微变化及复杂字符时存在不足，尤其在汉字等结构复杂的语言中表现不佳。
AI.method: 构建大规模笔画级数据集，设计笔画级扩散模型以保留字符结构完整性，通过单样本参考生成完整字体库。
AI.result: Diff-Font在字体差异鲁棒性和复杂字符生成上达到先进水平，实现单样本条件下字体生成的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: Diff-Font是首个将扩散模型应用于字体生成的方案，有效解决了复杂语言字体生成中的关键挑战。

To solve this problem, few-shot font generation and even one-shot font generation have attracted a lot of attention. However, most existing font generation methods may still suffer from (i) large cross-font gap challenge; (ii) subtle cross-font variation problem; and (iii) incorrect generation of complicated characters. In this paper, we propose a novel one-shot font generation method based on a diffusion model, named Diff-Font, which can be stably trained on large datasets. The proposed model aims to generate the entire font library by giving only one sample as the reference. Specifically, a large stroke-wise dataset is constructed, and a stroke-wise diffusion model is proposed to preserve the structure and the completion of each generated character. To our best knowledge, the proposed Diff-Font is the first work that developed diffusion models to handle the font generation task. The well-trained Diff-Font is not only robust to font gap and font variation, but also achieved promising performance on difficult character generation. Compared to previous font generation methods, our model reaches state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. 字体生成是一项困难且耗时的任务，特别是对于那些使用具有大量字符的复杂结构的表意文字的语言，例如中文。为了解决这个问题，few-shot字体生成甚至one-shot字体生成引起了很多关注。然而，大多数现有的字体生成方法可能仍然面临（i）大的跨字体间隙挑战； (ii) 微妙的跨字体变化问题； (iii) 复杂字符的错误生成。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于扩散模型的新型一次性字体生成方法，称为 Diff-Font，该方法可以在大型数据集上稳定地进行训练。所提出的模型旨在通过仅提供一个样本作为参考来生成整个字体库。具体来说，构建了一个大型笔划数据集，并提出了笔划扩散模型来保留每个生成字符的结构和完成度。据我们所知，所提出的 Diff-Font 是第一个开发扩散模型来处理字体生成任务的工作。训练有素的 Diff-Font 不仅对字体间隙和字体变化具有鲁棒性，而且在困难字符生成方面也取得了良好的性能。与以前的字体生成方法相比，我们的模型在定性和定量上都达到了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的单样本字体生成方法Diff-Font，用于解决复杂语言（如中文）字体生成中的跨字体差异、细微变化及复杂字符生成难题。 Haibin He,Xinyuan Chen,Chaoyue Wang,Juhua Liu,Bo Du,Dacheng Tao,Yu Qiao cs.CV

authors_text: Aarjav Jain,Challenger Mishra,Pietro Liò
title: A physics-informed search for metric solutions to Ricci flow, their embeddings, and visualisation
title_zh: 基于物理学的搜索 Ricci 流的度量解决方案、其嵌入和可视化
abstract: Neural networks with PDEs embedded in their loss functions (physics-informed neural networks) are employed as a function approximators to find solutions to the Ricci flow (a curvature based evolution) of Riemannian metrics. A general method is developed and applied to the real torus. The validity of the solution is verified by comparing the time evolution of scalar curvature with that found using a standard PDE solver, which decreases to a constant value of 0 on the whole manifold. We also consider certain solitonic solutions to the Ricci flow equation in two real dimensions. We create visualisations of the flow by utilising an embedding into $\mathbb{R}^3$. Snapshots of highly accurate numerical evolution of the toroidal metric over time are reported. We provide guidelines on applications of this methodology to the problem of determining Ricci flat Calabi--Yau metrics in the context of String theory, a long standing problem in complex geometry.
summary: Neural networks with PDEs embedded in their loss functions (physics-informed neural networks) are employed as a function approximators to find solutions to the Ricci flow (a curvature based evolution) of Riemannian metrics. A general method is developed and applied to the real torus. The validity of the solution is verified by comparing the time evolution of scalar curvature with that found using a standard PDE solver, which decreases to a constant value of 0 on the whole manifold. We also consider certain solitonic solutions to the Ricci flow equation in two real dimensions. We create visualisations of the flow by utilising an embedding into $\mathbb{R}^3$. Snapshots of highly accurate numerical evolution of the toroidal metric over time are reported. We provide guidelines on applications of this methodology to the problem of determining Ricci flat Calabi--Yau metrics in the context of String theory, a long standing problem in complex geometry.
abstract_zh: 损失函数中嵌入偏微分方程的神经网络（基于物理的神经网络）被用作函数逼近器，以找到黎曼度量的 Ricci 流（基于曲率的演化）的解决方案。开发了一种通用方法并将其应用于真实的环面。通过将标量曲率的时间演化与使用标准 PDE 求解器得到的结果进行比较来验证该解的有效性，该解在整个流形上减小到恒定值 0。我们还考虑了二维实数维中 Ricci 流方程的某些孤子解。我们通过嵌入 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 来创建流程的可视化。报告了环形度量随时间的高精度数值演化的快照。我们提供了将该方法应用于确定弦理论背景下的里奇平坦卡拉比-丘度量问题的指南，这是复杂几何中长期存在的问题。

AI.tldr: 利用物理信息神经网络求解黎曼度量的里奇流问题，并通过嵌入和可视化验证解的有效性。
AI.motivation: 里奇流在几何和弦理论中具有重要意义，传统数值方法难以处理复杂流形，需探索新方法求解。
AI.method: 采用物理信息神经网络作为函数逼近器，结合PDE约束求解里奇流，通过三维嵌入实现可视化，并与传统PDE求解器对比验证。
AI.result: 成功验证了解的有效性，生成高精度的环面度量演化快照，并为弦理论中的卡拉比-丘度量问题提供了方法指导。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效求解里奇流，验证了解的准确性，并为弦理论中的卡拉比-丘度量问题提供了可行的计算框架。
