authors_text: Haosu Zhou,Nan Li
title: Image-based Artificial Intelligence empowered surrogate model and shape morpher for real-time blank shape optimisation in the hot stamping process
title_zh: 基于图像的人工智能支持代理模型和形状变形器，用于热冲压过程中的实时毛坯形状优化
abstract: As the complexity of modern manufacturing technologies increases, traditional trial-and-error design, which requires iterative and expensive simulations, becomes unreliable and time-consuming. This difficulty is especially significant for the design of hot-stamped safety-critical components, such as ultra-high-strength-steel (UHSS) B-pillars. To reduce design costs and ensure manufacturability, scalar-based Artificial-Intelligence-empowered surrogate modelling (SAISM) has been investigated and implemented, which can allow real-time manufacturability-constrained structural design optimisation. However, SAISM suffers from low accuracy and generalisability, and usually requires a high volume of training samples. To solve this problem, an image-based Artificial-intelligence-empowered surrogate modelling (IAISM) approach is developed in this research, in combination with an auto-decoder-based blank shape generator. The IAISM, which is based on a Mask-Res-SE-U-Net architecture, is trained to predict the full thinning field of the as-formed component given an arbitrary blank shape. Excellent prediction performance of IAISM is achieved with only 256 training samples, which indicates the small-data learning nature of engineering AI tasks using structured data representations. The trained auto-decoder, trained Mask-Res-SE-U-Net, and Adam optimiser are integrated to conduct blank optimisation by modifying the latent vector. The optimiser can rapidly find blank shapes that satisfy manufacturability criteria. As a high-accuracy and generalisable surrogate modelling and optimisation tool, the proposed pipeline is promising to be integrated into a full-chain digital twin to conduct real-time, multi-objective design optimisation.
summary: As the complexity of modern manufacturing technologies increases, traditional trial-and-error design, which requires iterative and expensive simulations, becomes unreliable and time-consuming. This difficulty is especially significant for the design of hot-stamped safety-critical components, such as ultra-high-strength-steel (UHSS) B-pillars. To reduce design costs and ensure manufacturability, scalar-based Artificial-Intelligence-empowered surrogate modelling (SAISM) has been investigated and implemented, which can allow real-time manufacturability-constrained structural design optimisation. However, SAISM suffers from low accuracy and generalisability, and usually requires a high volume of training samples. To solve this problem, an image-based Artificial-intelligence-empowered surrogate modelling (IAISM) approach is developed in this research, in combination with an auto-decoder-based blank shape generator. The IAISM, which is based on a Mask-Res-SE-U-Net architecture, is trained to predict the full thinning field of the as-formed component given an arbitrary blank shape. Excellent prediction performance of IAISM is achieved with only 256 training samples, which indicates the small-data learning nature of engineering AI tasks using structured data representations. The trained auto-decoder, trained Mask-Res-SE-U-Net, and Adam optimiser are integrated to conduct blank optimisation by modifying the latent vector. The optimiser can rapidly find blank shapes that satisfy manufacturability criteria. As a high-accuracy and generalisable surrogate modelling and optimisation tool, the proposed pipeline is promising to be integrated into a full-chain digital twin to conduct real-time, multi-objective design optimisation.
abstract_zh: 随着现代制造技术复杂性的增加，传统的试错设计需要迭代且昂贵的模拟，变得不可靠且耗时。对于超高强度钢 (UHSS) B 柱等热冲压安全关键部件的设计来说，这一困难尤其重要。为了降低设计成本并确保可制造性，已经研究并实施了基于标量的人工智能授权代理建模（SAISM），它可以实现实时可制造性约束的结构设计优化。然而，SAISM 的准确性和通用性较低，并且通常需要大量的训练样本。为了解决这个问题，本研究开发了一种基于图像的人工智能授权代理建模（IAISM）方法，并结合基于自动解码器的毛坯形状生成器。 IAISM 基于 Mask-Res-SE-U-Net 架构，经过训练可以预测给定任意毛坯形状的成形组件的完全减薄场。 IAISM 仅用 256 个训练样本就实现了出色的预测性能，这表明使用结构化数据表示的工程人工智能任务的小数据学习本质。将经过训练的自动解码器、经过训练的Mask-Res-SE-U-Net和Adam优化器集成起来，通过修改潜在向量来进行空白优化。优化器可以快速找到满足可制造性标准的毛坯形状。作为一种高精度和通用的替代建模和优化工具，所提出的管道有望集成到全链数字孪生中，以进行实时、多目标设计优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图像的AI代理模型和形状生成器，用于热冲压工艺中实时优化坯料形状。
AI.motivation: 传统试错设计方法在制造复杂安全关键部件时效率低、成本高，且现有代理模型存在精度低、泛化能力差的问题。
AI.method: 开发基于Mask-Res-SE-U-Net架构的图像代理模型（IAISM），结合自编码器生成坯料形状，并通过Adam优化器调整潜在向量实现优化。
AI.result: 仅用256个样本实现高精度预测，优化器可快速生成满足可制造性要求的坯料形状。
AI.conclusion: 该方法作为高精度通用优化工具，有望集成到数字孪生系统中实现多目标实时设计优化。

authors_text: Raghavendra Ramachandra,Hailin Li
title: Finger-NestNet: Interpretable Fingerphoto Verification on Smartphone using Deep Nested Residual Network
title_zh: Finger-NestNet：使用深度嵌套残差网络在智能手机上进行可解释的手指照片验证
comment: a preprint paper accepted in wacv2023 workshop
comments: a preprint paper accepted in wacv2023 workshop
abstract: Fingerphoto images captured using a smartphone are successfully used to verify the individuals that have enabled several applications. This work presents a novel algorithm for fingerphoto verification using a nested residual block: Finger-NestNet. The proposed Finger-NestNet architecture is designed with three consecutive convolution blocks followed by a series of nested residual blocks to achieve reliable fingerphoto verification. This paper also presents the interpretability of the proposed method using four different visualization techniques that can shed light on the critical regions in the fingerphoto biometrics that can contribute to the reliable verification performance of the proposed method. Extensive experiments are performed on the fingerphoto dataset comprised of 196 unique fingers collected from 52 unique data subjects using an iPhone6S. Experimental results indicate the improved verification of the proposed method compared to six different existing methods with EER = 1.15%.
summary: Fingerphoto images captured using a smartphone are successfully used to verify the individuals that have enabled several applications. This work presents a novel algorithm for fingerphoto verification using a nested residual block: Finger-NestNet. The proposed Finger-NestNet architecture is designed with three consecutive convolution blocks followed by a series of nested residual blocks to achieve reliable fingerphoto verification. This paper also presents the interpretability of the proposed method using four different visualization techniques that can shed light on the critical regions in the fingerphoto biometrics that can contribute to the reliable verification performance of the proposed method. Extensive experiments are performed on the fingerphoto dataset comprised of 196 unique fingers collected from 52 unique data subjects using an iPhone6S. Experimental results indicate the improved verification of the proposed method compared to six different existing methods with EER = 1.15%.
abstract_zh: 使用智能手机捕获的指纹图像已成功用于验证启用了多个应用程序的个人。这项工作提出了一种使用嵌套残差块进行手指照片验证的新颖算法：Finger-NestNet。所提出的 Finger-NestNet 架构采用三个连续的卷积块和一系列嵌套残差块来设计，以实现可靠的手指照片验证。本文还使用四种不同的可视化技术介绍了所提出方法的可解释性，这些技术可以阐明手指照片生物识别技术中的关键区域，从而有助于所提出方法的可靠验证性能。对手指照片数据集进行了广泛的实验，该数据集包含使用 iPhone6S 从 52 个独特数据主体收集的 196 个独特手指。实验结果表明，与 EER = 1.15% 的六种不同的现有方法相比，该方法的验证得到了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Finger-NestNet的深度嵌套残差网络算法，用于在智能手机上实现可靠的指纹照片验证。
AI.motivation: 尽管智能手机拍摄的指纹照片已广泛应用于身份验证，但现有方法在准确性和可解释性方面仍存在不足，需改进验证性能并揭示关键特征区域。
AI.method: 设计包含三个连续卷积块和一系列嵌套残差块的Finger-NestNet架构，并采用四种可视化技术解释模型对指纹关键区域的判别依据。
AI.result: 在包含52名受试者196个指纹的iPhone6S数据集上，该方法的等错误率（EER）达到1.15%，优于六种现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Finger-NestNet通过嵌套残差结构和可视化解释技术，显著提升了指纹照片验证的准确性和模型可信度，适用于智能手机生物特征应用。

search_text: Finger-NestNet: Interpretable Fingerphoto Verification on Smartphone using Deep Nested Residual Network Finger-NestNet：使用深度嵌套残差网络在智能手机上进行可解释的手指照片验证 Fingerphoto images captured using a smartphone are successfully used to verify the individuals that have enabled several applications. This work presents a novel algorithm for fingerphoto verification using a nested residual block: Finger-NestNet. The proposed Finger-NestNet architecture is designed with three consecutive convolution blocks followed by a series of nested residual blocks to achieve reliable fingerphoto verification. This paper also presents the interpretability of the proposed method using four different visualization techniques that can shed light on the critical regions in the fingerphoto biometrics that can contribute to the reliable verification performance of the proposed method. Extensive experiments are performed on the fingerphoto dataset comprised of 196 unique fingers collected from 52 unique data subjects using an iPhone6S. Experimental results indicate the improved verification of the proposed method compared to six different existing methods with EER = 1.15%. 使用智能手机捕获的指纹图像已成功用于验证启用了多个应用程序的个人。这项工作提出了一种使用嵌套残差块进行手指照片验证的新颖算法：Finger-NestNet。所提出的 Finger-NestNet 架构采用三个连续的卷积块和一系列嵌套残差块来设计，以实现可靠的手指照片验证。本文还使用四种不同的可视化技术介绍了所提出方法的可解释性，这些技术可以阐明手指照片生物识别技术中的关键区域，从而有助于所提出方法的可靠验证性能。对手指照片数据集进行了广泛的实验，该数据集包含使用 iPhone6S 从 52 个独特数据主体收集的 196 个独特手指。实验结果表明，与 EER = 1.15% 的六种不同的现有方法相比，该方法的验证得到了改进。 本文提出了一种名为Finger-NestNet的深度嵌套残差网络算法，用于在智能手机上实现可靠的指纹照片验证。 Raghavendra Ramachandra,Hailin Li cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Alexandre Boulch,Corentin Sautier,Björn Michele,Gilles Puy,Renaud Marlet
title: ALSO: Automotive Lidar Self-supervision by Occupancy estimation
title_zh: 还：汽车激光雷达通过占用估计进行自我监督
abstract: We propose a new self-supervised method for pre-training the backbone of deep perception models operating on point clouds. The core idea is to train the model on a pretext task which is the reconstruction of the surface on which the 3D points are sampled, and to use the underlying latent vectors as input to the perception head. The intuition is that if the network is able to reconstruct the scene surface, given only sparse input points, then it probably also captures some fragments of semantic information, that can be used to boost an actual perception task. This principle has a very simple formulation, which makes it both easy to implement and widely applicable to a large range of 3D sensors and deep networks performing semantic segmentation or object detection. In fact, it supports a single-stream pipeline, as opposed to most contrastive learning approaches, allowing training on limited resources. We conducted extensive experiments on various autonomous driving datasets, involving very different kinds of lidars, for both semantic segmentation and object detection. The results show the effectiveness of our method to learn useful representations without any annotation, compared to existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/valeoai/ALSO
summary: We propose a new self-supervised method for pre-training the backbone of deep perception models operating on point clouds. The core idea is to train the model on a pretext task which is the reconstruction of the surface on which the 3D points are sampled, and to use the underlying latent vectors as input to the perception head. The intuition is that if the network is able to reconstruct the scene surface, given only sparse input points, then it probably also captures some fragments of semantic information, that can be used to boost an actual perception task. This principle has a very simple formulation, which makes it both easy to implement and widely applicable to a large range of 3D sensors and deep networks performing semantic segmentation or object detection. In fact, it supports a single-stream pipeline, as opposed to most contrastive learning approaches, allowing training on limited resources. We conducted extensive experiments on various autonomous driving datasets, involving very different kinds of lidars, for both semantic segmentation and object detection. The results show the effectiveness of our method to learn useful representations without any annotation, compared to existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/valeoai/ALSO
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的自监督方法，用于预训练在点云上运行的深度感知模型的骨干。核心思想是在借口任务上训练模型，即重建 3D 点采样的表面，并使用底层潜在向量作为感知头的输入。直觉是，如果网络能够在仅给出稀疏输入点的情况下重建场景表面，那么它可能还捕获一些语义信息片段，这些片段可用于增强实际的感知任务。该原理的表述非常简单，因此易于实现，并且广泛适用于执行语义分割或对象检测的大量 3D 传感器和深度网络。事实上，与大多数对比学习方法不同，它支持单流管道，允许在有限的资源上进行培训。我们对各种自动驾驶数据集进行了广泛的实验，涉及不同类型的激光雷达，用于语义分割和对象检测。结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法在无需任何注释的情况下学习有用表示的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/valeoai/ALSO 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于占用估计的自动驾驶激光雷达自监督预训练方法，通过重建稀疏点云表面来学习感知模型的有用表示。
AI.motivation: 传统激光雷达感知模型依赖标注数据，而标注成本高昂。本文旨在通过自监督学习，在无标注情况下预训练模型，提升语义分割和目标检测性能。
AI.method: 设计预训练任务：从稀疏点云重建场景表面，利用潜在向量作为感知头输入。该方法无需对比学习，支持单流管道，适用于多种3D传感器和网络架构。
AI.result: 在多个自动驾驶数据集（含不同激光雷达）上验证，结果表明该方法在无标注情况下优于现有方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ALSO方法通过简单有效的自监督策略，成功学习到通用的3D感知表示，为资源受限场景提供了高效预训练方案。

authors_text: Weihong Ren,Denglu Wu,Hui Cao,Xi'ai Chen,Zhi Han,Honghai Liu
title: Joint Counting, Detection and Re-Identification for Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 多目标跟踪的联合计数、检测和重新识别
abstract: The recent trend in 2D multiple object tracking (MOT) is jointly solving detection and tracking, where object detection and appearance feature (or motion) are learned simultaneously. Despite competitive performance, in crowded scenes, joint detection and tracking usually fail to find accurate object associations due to missed or false detections. In this paper, we jointly model counting, detection and re-identification in an end-to-end framework, named CountingMOT, tailored for crowded scenes. By imposing mutual object-count constraints between detection and counting, the CountingMOT tries to find a balance between object detection and crowd density map estimation, which can help it to recover missed detections or reject false detections. Our approach is an attempt to bridge the gap of object detection, counting, and re-Identification. This is in contrast to prior MOT methods that either ignore the crowd density and thus are prone to failure in crowded scenes,or depend on local correlations to build a graphical relationship for matching targets. The proposed MOT tracker can perform online and real-time tracking, and achieves the state-of-the-art results on public benchmarks MOT16 (MOTA of 79.7), MOT17 (MOTA of 81.3%) and MOT20 (MOTA of 78.9%).
summary: The recent trend in 2D multiple object tracking (MOT) is jointly solving detection and tracking, where object detection and appearance feature (or motion) are learned simultaneously. Despite competitive performance, in crowded scenes, joint detection and tracking usually fail to find accurate object associations due to missed or false detections. In this paper, we jointly model counting, detection and re-identification in an end-to-end framework, named CountingMOT, tailored for crowded scenes. By imposing mutual object-count constraints between detection and counting, the CountingMOT tries to find a balance between object detection and crowd density map estimation, which can help it to recover missed detections or reject false detections. Our approach is an attempt to bridge the gap of object detection, counting, and re-Identification. This is in contrast to prior MOT methods that either ignore the crowd density and thus are prone to failure in crowded scenes,or depend on local correlations to build a graphical relationship for matching targets. The proposed MOT tracker can perform online and real-time tracking, and achieves the state-of-the-art results on public benchmarks MOT16 (MOTA of 79.7), MOT17 (MOTA of 81.3%) and MOT20 (MOTA of 78.9%).
abstract_zh: 2D 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 的最新趋势是联合解决检测和跟踪问题，其中目标检测和外观特征（或运动）是同时学习的。尽管性能具有竞争力，但在拥挤的场景中，联合检测和跟踪通常由于漏检或误检而无法找到准确的对象关联。在本文中，我们在一个名为 CountingMOT 的端到端框架中联合建模计数、检测和重新识别，该框架专为拥挤的场景量身定制。通过在检测和计数之间施加相互的对象计数约束，CountingMOT 试图在对象检测和人群密度图估计之间找到平衡，这可以帮助它恢复错过的检测或拒绝错误检测。我们的方法试图弥合物体检测、计数和重新识别之间的差距。这与之前的 MOT 方法形成对比，后者要么忽略人群密度，因此在拥挤的场景中容易失败，要么依赖局部相关性来建立匹配目标的图形关系。所提出的 MOT 跟踪器可以进行在线实时跟踪，并在公共基准 MOT16（MOTA 为 79.7）、MOT17（MOTA 为 81.3%）和 MOT20（MOTA 为 78.9%）上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CountingMOT的端到端框架，联合解决多目标跟踪中的计数、检测与重识别问题，专门针对拥挤场景进行优化。
AI.motivation: 现有联合检测与跟踪方法在拥挤场景中因漏检或误检导致关联失败，而传统方法或忽视人群密度或依赖局部关联，难以有效处理复杂场景。
AI.method: 通过检测与计数之间的相互约束，平衡目标检测与人群密度估计，结合重识别技术实现端到端跟踪，无需依赖局部关联关系。
AI.result: 在MOT16（MOTA 79.7%）、MOT17（MOTA 81.3%）和MOT20（MOTA 78.9%）基准测试中达到当时最优性能，并支持实时在线跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合计数、检测与重识别，有效弥补了传统方法在拥挤场景中的不足，为多目标跟踪提供了新的技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CountingMOT的端到端框架，联合解决多目标跟踪中的计数、检测与重识别问题，专门针对拥挤场景进行优化。

search_text: Joint Counting, Detection and Re-Identification for Multi-Object Tracking 多目标跟踪的联合计数、检测和重新识别 The recent trend in 2D multiple object tracking (MOT) is jointly solving detection and tracking, where object detection and appearance feature (or motion) are learned simultaneously. Despite competitive performance, in crowded scenes, joint detection and tracking usually fail to find accurate object associations due to missed or false detections. In this paper, we jointly model counting, detection and re-identification in an end-to-end framework, named CountingMOT, tailored for crowded scenes. By imposing mutual object-count constraints between detection and counting, the CountingMOT tries to find a balance between object detection and crowd density map estimation, which can help it to recover missed detections or reject false detections. Our approach is an attempt to bridge the gap of object detection, counting, and re-Identification. This is in contrast to prior MOT methods that either ignore the crowd density and thus are prone to failure in crowded scenes,or depend on local correlations to build a graphical relationship for matching targets. The proposed MOT tracker can perform online and real-time tracking, and achieves the state-of-the-art results on public benchmarks MOT16 (MOTA of 79.7), MOT17 (MOTA of 81.3%) and MOT20 (MOTA of 78.9%). 2D 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 的最新趋势是联合解决检测和跟踪问题，其中目标检测和外观特征（或运动）是同时学习的。尽管性能具有竞争力，但在拥挤的场景中，联合检测和跟踪通常由于漏检或误检而无法找到准确的对象关联。在本文中，我们在一个名为 CountingMOT 的端到端框架中联合建模计数、检测和重新识别，该框架专为拥挤的场景量身定制。通过在检测和计数之间施加相互的对象计数约束，CountingMOT 试图在对象检测和人群密度图估计之间找到平衡，这可以帮助它恢复错过的检测或拒绝错误检测。我们的方法试图弥合物体检测、计数和重新识别之间的差距。这与之前的 MOT 方法形成对比，后者要么忽略人群密度，因此在拥挤的场景中容易失败，要么依赖局部相关性来建立匹配目标的图形关系。所提出的 MOT 跟踪器可以进行在线实时跟踪，并在公共基准 MOT16（MOTA 为 79.7）、MOT17（MOTA 为 81.3%）和 MOT20（MOTA 为 78.9%）上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种名为CountingMOT的端到端框架，联合解决多目标跟踪中的计数、检测与重识别问题，专门针对拥挤场景进行优化。 Weihong Ren,Denglu Wu,Hui Cao,Xi'ai Chen,Zhi Han,Honghai Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Qixin Yan,Chunle Guo,Jixin Zhao,Yuekun Dai,Chen Change Loy,Chongyi Li
title: BeautyREC: Robust, Efficient, and Content-preserving Makeup Transfer
title_zh: BeautyREC：稳健、高效且保留内容的化妆传输
abstract: In this work, we propose a Robust, Efficient, and Component-specific makeup transfer method (abbreviated as BeautyREC). A unique departure from prior methods that leverage global attention, simply concatenate features, or implicitly manipulate features in latent space, we propose a component-specific correspondence to directly transfer the makeup style of a reference image to the corresponding components (e.g., skin, lips, eyes) of a source image, making elaborate and accurate local makeup transfer. As an auxiliary, the long-range visual dependencies of Transformer are introduced for effective global makeup transfer. Instead of the commonly used cycle structure that is complex and unstable, we employ a content consistency loss coupled with a content encoder to implement efficient single-path makeup transfer. The key insights of this study are modeling component-specific correspondence for local makeup transfer, capturing long-range dependencies for global makeup transfer, and enabling efficient makeup transfer via a single-path structure. We also contribute BeautyFace, a makeup transfer dataset to supplement existing datasets. This dataset contains 3,000 faces, covering more diverse makeup styles, face poses, and races. Each face has annotated parsing map. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against state-of-the-art methods. Besides, our method is appealing as it is with only 1M parameters, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods (BeautyGAN: 8.43M, PSGAN: 12.62M, SCGAN: 15.30M, CPM: 9.24M, SSAT: 10.48M).
summary: In this work, we propose a Robust, Efficient, and Component-specific makeup transfer method (abbreviated as BeautyREC). A unique departure from prior methods that leverage global attention, simply concatenate features, or implicitly manipulate features in latent space, we propose a component-specific correspondence to directly transfer the makeup style of a reference image to the corresponding components (e.g., skin, lips, eyes) of a source image, making elaborate and accurate local makeup transfer. As an auxiliary, the long-range visual dependencies of Transformer are introduced for effective global makeup transfer. Instead of the commonly used cycle structure that is complex and unstable, we employ a content consistency loss coupled with a content encoder to implement efficient single-path makeup transfer. The key insights of this study are modeling component-specific correspondence for local makeup transfer, capturing long-range dependencies for global makeup transfer, and enabling efficient makeup transfer via a single-path structure. We also contribute BeautyFace, a makeup transfer dataset to supplement existing datasets. This dataset contains 3,000 faces, covering more diverse makeup styles, face poses, and races. Each face has annotated parsing map. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against state-of-the-art methods. Besides, our method is appealing as it is with only 1M parameters, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods (BeautyGAN: 8.43M, PSGAN: 12.62M, SCGAN: 15.30M, CPM: 9.24M, SSAT: 10.48M).
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种稳健、高效和特定于组件的化妆转移方法（缩写为 BeautyREC）。与利用全局注意力、简单连接特征或隐式操纵潜在空间中的特征的现有方法不同，我们提出了一种特定于组件的对应关系，将参考图像的化妆风格直接转移到源图像的相应组件（例如，皮肤、嘴唇、眼睛），从而进行精细且准确的局部化妆转移。作为辅助，引入了 Transformer 的远程视觉依赖性，以实现有效的全局化妆传输。我们采用内容一致性损失与内容编码器相结合来实现高效的单路径化妆传输，而不是常用的复杂且不稳定的循环结构。这项研究的主要见解是为局部化妆传输建模组件特定的对应关系，捕获全局化妆传输的远程依赖关系，并通过单路径结构实现高效的化妆传输。我们还贡献了 BeautyFace，一个化妆传输数据集来补充现有数据集。该数据集包含 3,000 张面孔，涵盖更多样化的化妆风格、面部姿势和种族。每个面都有带注释的解析图。大量的实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的有效性。此外，我们的方法很有吸引力，因为它只有 1M 个参数，优于最先进的方法（BeautyGAN：8.43M，PSGAN：12.62M，SCGAN：15.30M，CPM：9.24M，SSAT：10.48M）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BeautyREC的鲁棒、高效且内容保留的化妆迁移方法，通过组件特定对应和全局依赖建模实现精确的局部和全局化妆迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全局注意力或简单特征拼接，存在结构复杂、稳定性差及局部细节处理不足的问题，需更高效的组件级化妆迁移方案。
AI.method: 采用组件特定对应实现局部化妆迁移，结合Transformer捕捉全局依赖，并通过单路径结构与内容一致性损失替代传统循环框架，降低参数量至1M。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法（如BeautyGAN、SCGAN等），参数量显著减少，同时引入包含3000张多样化人脸的BeautyFace数据集。
AI.conclusion: BeautyREC通过组件级建模与单路径优化，在保持高精度的同时实现高效化妆迁移，为后续研究提供新思路与数据支持。

search_text: BeautyREC: Robust, Efficient, and Content-preserving Makeup Transfer BeautyREC：稳健、高效且保留内容的化妆传输 In this work, we propose a Robust, Efficient, and Component-specific makeup transfer method (abbreviated as BeautyREC). A unique departure from prior methods that leverage global attention, simply concatenate features, or implicitly manipulate features in latent space, we propose a component-specific correspondence to directly transfer the makeup style of a reference image to the corresponding components (e.g., skin, lips, eyes) of a source image, making elaborate and accurate local makeup transfer. As an auxiliary, the long-range visual dependencies of Transformer are introduced for effective global makeup transfer. Instead of the commonly used cycle structure that is complex and unstable, we employ a content consistency loss coupled with a content encoder to implement efficient single-path makeup transfer. The key insights of this study are modeling component-specific correspondence for local makeup transfer, capturing long-range dependencies for global makeup transfer, and enabling efficient makeup transfer via a single-path structure. We also contribute BeautyFace, a makeup transfer dataset to supplement existing datasets. This dataset contains 3,000 faces, covering more diverse makeup styles, face poses, and races. Each face has annotated parsing map. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method against state-of-the-art methods. Besides, our method is appealing as it is with only 1M parameters, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods (BeautyGAN: 8.43M, PSGAN: 12.62M, SCGAN: 15.30M, CPM: 9.24M, SSAT: 10.48M). 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种稳健、高效和特定于组件的化妆转移方法（缩写为 BeautyREC）。与利用全局注意力、简单连接特征或隐式操纵潜在空间中的特征的现有方法不同，我们提出了一种特定于组件的对应关系，将参考图像的化妆风格直接转移到源图像的相应组件（例如，皮肤、嘴唇、眼睛），从而进行精细且准确的局部化妆转移。作为辅助，引入了 Transformer 的远程视觉依赖性，以实现有效的全局化妆传输。我们采用内容一致性损失与内容编码器相结合来实现高效的单路径化妆传输，而不是常用的复杂且不稳定的循环结构。这项研究的主要见解是为局部化妆传输建模组件特定的对应关系，捕获全局化妆传输的远程依赖关系，并通过单路径结构实现高效的化妆传输。我们还贡献了 BeautyFace，一个化妆传输数据集来补充现有数据集。该数据集包含 3,000 张面孔，涵盖更多样化的化妆风格、面部姿势和种族。每个面都有带注释的解析图。大量的实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的有效性。此外，我们的方法很有吸引力，因为它只有 1M 个参数，优于最先进的方法（BeautyGAN：8.43M，PSGAN：12.62M，SCGAN：15.30M，CPM：9.24M，SSAT：10.48M）。 本文提出一种名为BeautyREC的鲁棒、高效且内容保留的化妆迁移方法，通过组件特定对应和全局依赖建模实现精确的局部和全局化妆迁移。 Qixin Yan,Chunle Guo,Jixin Zhao,Yuekun Dai,Chen Change Loy,Chongyi Li cs.CV

authors_text: Amit Aflalo,Shai Bagon,Tamar Kashti,Yonina Eldar
title: DeepCut: Unsupervised Segmentation using Graph Neural Networks Clustering
title_zh: DeepCut：使用图神经网络聚类进行无监督分割
abstract: Image segmentation is a fundamental task in computer vision. Data annotation for training supervised methods can be labor-intensive, motivating unsupervised methods. Current approaches often rely on extracting deep features from pre-trained networks to construct a graph, and classical clustering methods like k-means and normalized-cuts are then applied as a post-processing step. However, this approach reduces the high-dimensional information encoded in the features to pair-wise scalar affinities. To address this limitation, this study introduces a lightweight Graph Neural Network (GNN) to replace classical clustering methods while optimizing for the same clustering objective function. Unlike existing methods, our GNN takes both the pair-wise affinities between local image features and the raw features as input. This direct connection between the raw features and the clustering objective enables us to implicitly perform classification of the clusters between different graphs, resulting in part semantic segmentation without the need for additional post-processing steps. We demonstrate how classical clustering objectives can be formulated as self-supervised loss functions for training an image segmentation GNN. Furthermore, we employ the Correlation-Clustering (CC) objective to perform clustering without defining the number of clusters, allowing for k-less clustering. We apply the proposed method for object localization, segmentation, and semantic part segmentation tasks, surpassing state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks.
summary: Image segmentation is a fundamental task in computer vision. Data annotation for training supervised methods can be labor-intensive, motivating unsupervised methods. Current approaches often rely on extracting deep features from pre-trained networks to construct a graph, and classical clustering methods like k-means and normalized-cuts are then applied as a post-processing step. However, this approach reduces the high-dimensional information encoded in the features to pair-wise scalar affinities. To address this limitation, this study introduces a lightweight Graph Neural Network (GNN) to replace classical clustering methods while optimizing for the same clustering objective function. Unlike existing methods, our GNN takes both the pair-wise affinities between local image features and the raw features as input. This direct connection between the raw features and the clustering objective enables us to implicitly perform classification of the clusters between different graphs, resulting in part semantic segmentation without the need for additional post-processing steps. We demonstrate how classical clustering objectives can be formulated as self-supervised loss functions for training an image segmentation GNN. Furthermore, we employ the Correlation-Clustering (CC) objective to perform clustering without defining the number of clusters, allowing for k-less clustering. We apply the proposed method for object localization, segmentation, and semantic part segmentation tasks, surpassing state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图像分割是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。训练监督方法的数据注释可能是劳动密集型的，会激励无监督方法。当前的方法通常依赖于从预先训练的网络中提取深层特征来构建图，然后将 k 均值和归一化切割等经典聚类方法应用为后处理步骤。然而，这种方法将特征中编码的高维信息减少为成对标量亲和力。为了解决这一限制，本研究引入了一种轻量级图神经网络（GNN）来取代经典的聚类方法，同时针对相同的聚类目标函数进行优化。与现有方法不同，我们的 GNN 将局部图像特征和原始特征之间的成对亲和力作为输入。原始特征和聚类目标之间的这种直接联系使我们能够隐式地对不同图之间的聚类进行分类，从而实现部分语义分割，而无需额外的后处理步骤。我们演示了如何将经典的聚类目标表述为用于训练图像分割 GNN 的自监督损失函数。此外，我们采用相关聚类（CC）目标来执行聚类，而无需定义聚类数量，从而允许 k-less 聚类。我们将所提出的方法应用于对象定位、分割和语义部分分割任务，在多个基准测试中超越了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的无监督图像分割方法DeepCut，通过优化聚类目标函数实现无需人工标注的语义分割。
AI.motivation: 传统监督分割方法依赖耗时的人工标注，而现有无监督方法通过预训练网络提取特征后使用k-means等经典聚类算法，但会丢失高维特征信息，且需额外后处理步骤。
AI.method: 设计轻量级图神经网络替代经典聚类算法，同时输入局部特征的成对亲和力和原始特征，通过自监督损失函数优化聚类目标，并采用相关性聚类（CC）实现无需预设聚类数的分割。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中超越现有最先进方法，在目标定位、分割及语义部件分割任务中均取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将图神经网络与聚类目标结合，实现了无需后处理的端到端无监督分割，且支持自适应聚类数量的k-less分割方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的无监督图像分割方法DeepCut，通过优化聚类目标函数实现无需人工标注的语义分割。

search_text: DeepCut: Unsupervised Segmentation using Graph Neural Networks Clustering DeepCut：使用图神经网络聚类进行无监督分割 Image segmentation is a fundamental task in computer vision. Data annotation for training supervised methods can be labor-intensive, motivating unsupervised methods. Current approaches often rely on extracting deep features from pre-trained networks to construct a graph, and classical clustering methods like k-means and normalized-cuts are then applied as a post-processing step. However, this approach reduces the high-dimensional information encoded in the features to pair-wise scalar affinities. To address this limitation, this study introduces a lightweight Graph Neural Network (GNN) to replace classical clustering methods while optimizing for the same clustering objective function. Unlike existing methods, our GNN takes both the pair-wise affinities between local image features and the raw features as input. This direct connection between the raw features and the clustering objective enables us to implicitly perform classification of the clusters between different graphs, resulting in part semantic segmentation without the need for additional post-processing steps. We demonstrate how classical clustering objectives can be formulated as self-supervised loss functions for training an image segmentation GNN. Furthermore, we employ the Correlation-Clustering (CC) objective to perform clustering without defining the number of clusters, allowing for k-less clustering. We apply the proposed method for object localization, segmentation, and semantic part segmentation tasks, surpassing state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks. 图像分割是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。训练监督方法的数据注释可能是劳动密集型的，会激励无监督方法。当前的方法通常依赖于从预先训练的网络中提取深层特征来构建图，然后将 k 均值和归一化切割等经典聚类方法应用为后处理步骤。然而，这种方法将特征中编码的高维信息减少为成对标量亲和力。为了解决这一限制，本研究引入了一种轻量级图神经网络（GNN）来取代经典的聚类方法，同时针对相同的聚类目标函数进行优化。与现有方法不同，我们的 GNN 将局部图像特征和原始特征之间的成对亲和力作为输入。原始特征和聚类目标之间的这种直接联系使我们能够隐式地对不同图之间的聚类进行分类，从而实现部分语义分割，而无需额外的后处理步骤。我们演示了如何将经典的聚类目标表述为用于训练图像分割 GNN 的自监督损失函数。此外，我们采用相关聚类（CC）目标来执行聚类，而无需定义聚类数量，从而允许 k-less 聚类。我们将所提出的方法应用于对象定位、分割和语义部分分割任务，在多个基准测试中超越了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的无监督图像分割方法DeepCut，通过优化聚类目标函数实现无需人工标注的语义分割。 Amit Aflalo,Shai Bagon,Tamar Kashti,Yonina Eldar cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Fei Wang,Jun Cheng,Penglei Liu
title: CbwLoss: Constrained Bidirectional Weighted Loss for Self-supervised Learning of Depth and Pose
title_zh: CbwLoss：用于深度和姿势自监督学习的约束双向加权损失
comment: accepted by the Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems on February 20, 2023
comments: accepted by the Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems on February 20, 2023
abstract: Photometric differences are widely used as supervision signals to train neural networks for estimating depth and camera pose from unlabeled monocular videos. However, this approach is detrimental for model optimization because occlusions and moving objects in a scene violate the underlying static scenario assumption. In addition, pixels in textureless regions or less discriminative pixels hinder model training. To solve these problems, in this paper, we deal with moving objects and occlusions utilizing the difference of the flow fields and depth structure generated by affine transformation and view synthesis, respectively. Secondly, we mitigate the effect of textureless regions on model optimization by measuring differences between features with more semantic and contextual information without adding networks. In addition, although the bidirectionality component is used in each sub-objective function, a pair of images are reasoned about only once, which helps reduce overhead. Extensive experiments and visual analysis demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which outperform existing state-of-the-art self-supervised methods under the same conditions and without introducing additional auxiliary information.
summary: Photometric differences are widely used as supervision signals to train neural networks for estimating depth and camera pose from unlabeled monocular videos. However, this approach is detrimental for model optimization because occlusions and moving objects in a scene violate the underlying static scenario assumption. In addition, pixels in textureless regions or less discriminative pixels hinder model training. To solve these problems, in this paper, we deal with moving objects and occlusions utilizing the difference of the flow fields and depth structure generated by affine transformation and view synthesis, respectively. Secondly, we mitigate the effect of textureless regions on model optimization by measuring differences between features with more semantic and contextual information without adding networks. In addition, although the bidirectionality component is used in each sub-objective function, a pair of images are reasoned about only once, which helps reduce overhead. Extensive experiments and visual analysis demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which outperform existing state-of-the-art self-supervised methods under the same conditions and without introducing additional auxiliary information.
abstract_zh: 光度差异被广泛用作监督信号来训练神经网络，以估计未标记的单目视频的深度和相机姿势。然而，这种方法不利于模型优化，因为场景中的遮挡和移动对象违反了底层的静态场景假设。此外，无纹理区域中的像素或辨别力较差的像素会阻碍模型训练。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们分别利用仿射变换和视图合成产生的流场和深度结构的差异来处理移动物体和遮挡。其次，我们通过在不添加网络的情况下测量具有更多语义和上下文信息的特征之间的差异来减轻无纹理区域对模型优化的影响。此外，虽然每个子目标函数中都使用了双向分量，但一对图像仅被推理一次，这有助于减少开销。大量的实验和可视化分析证明了该方法的有效性，在相同条件下且无需引入额外的辅助信息，该方法优于现有最先进的自监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种约束双向加权损失函数CBwLoss，用于改进自监督学习中的深度和相机姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖光度差异作为监督信号时，难以处理遮挡、移动物体及纹理缺失区域，导致模型优化效果受限。
AI.method: 通过光流差异检测移动物体，利用仿射变换与视图合成生成深度结构处理遮挡；采用语义与上下文特征差异缓解纹理缺失影响，并优化双向损失函数以降低计算开销。
AI.result: 实验与可视化分析表明，该方法在相同条件下优于现有最先进的自监督方法，且无需引入额外辅助信息。
AI.conclusion: CBwLoss通过多策略改进损失函数设计，有效解决了自监督深度与姿态估计中的关键问题，提升了模型性能。

search_text: CbwLoss: Constrained Bidirectional Weighted Loss for Self-supervised Learning of Depth and Pose CbwLoss：用于深度和姿势自监督学习的约束双向加权损失 Photometric differences are widely used as supervision signals to train neural networks for estimating depth and camera pose from unlabeled monocular videos. However, this approach is detrimental for model optimization because occlusions and moving objects in a scene violate the underlying static scenario assumption. In addition, pixels in textureless regions or less discriminative pixels hinder model training. To solve these problems, in this paper, we deal with moving objects and occlusions utilizing the difference of the flow fields and depth structure generated by affine transformation and view synthesis, respectively. Secondly, we mitigate the effect of textureless regions on model optimization by measuring differences between features with more semantic and contextual information without adding networks. In addition, although the bidirectionality component is used in each sub-objective function, a pair of images are reasoned about only once, which helps reduce overhead. Extensive experiments and visual analysis demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which outperform existing state-of-the-art self-supervised methods under the same conditions and without introducing additional auxiliary information. 光度差异被广泛用作监督信号来训练神经网络，以估计未标记的单目视频的深度和相机姿势。然而，这种方法不利于模型优化，因为场景中的遮挡和移动对象违反了底层的静态场景假设。此外，无纹理区域中的像素或辨别力较差的像素会阻碍模型训练。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们分别利用仿射变换和视图合成产生的流场和深度结构的差异来处理移动物体和遮挡。其次，我们通过在不添加网络的情况下测量具有更多语义和上下文信息的特征之间的差异来减轻无纹理区域对模型优化的影响。此外，虽然每个子目标函数中都使用了双向分量，但一对图像仅被推理一次，这有助于减少开销。大量的实验和可视化分析证明了该方法的有效性，在相同条件下且无需引入额外的辅助信息，该方法优于现有最先进的自监督方法。 本文提出一种约束双向加权损失函数CBwLoss，用于改进自监督学习中的深度和相机姿态估计。 Fei Wang,Jun Cheng,Penglei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Arthur Van Meerbeeck,Jordy Van Landeghem,Ruben Cartuyvels,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Optimizing ship detection efficiency in SAR images
title_zh: 优化 SAR 图像中的船舶检测效率
abstract: The detection and prevention of illegal fishing is critical to maintaining a healthy and functional ecosystem. Recent research on ship detection in satellite imagery has focused exclusively on performance improvements, disregarding detection efficiency. However, the speed and compute cost of vessel detection are essential for a timely intervention to prevent illegal fishing. Therefore, we investigated optimization methods that lower detection time and cost with minimal performance loss. We trained an object detection model based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) using a dataset of satellite images. Then, we designed two efficiency optimizations that can be applied to the base CNN or any other base model. The optimizations consist of a fast, cheap classification model and a statistical algorithm. The integration of the optimizations with the object detection model leads to a trade-off between speed and performance. We studied the trade-off using metrics that give different weight to execution time and performance. We show that by using a classification model the average precision of the detection model can be approximated to 99.5% in 44% of the time or to 92.7% in 25% of the time.
summary: The detection and prevention of illegal fishing is critical to maintaining a healthy and functional ecosystem. Recent research on ship detection in satellite imagery has focused exclusively on performance improvements, disregarding detection efficiency. However, the speed and compute cost of vessel detection are essential for a timely intervention to prevent illegal fishing. Therefore, we investigated optimization methods that lower detection time and cost with minimal performance loss. We trained an object detection model based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) using a dataset of satellite images. Then, we designed two efficiency optimizations that can be applied to the base CNN or any other base model. The optimizations consist of a fast, cheap classification model and a statistical algorithm. The integration of the optimizations with the object detection model leads to a trade-off between speed and performance. We studied the trade-off using metrics that give different weight to execution time and performance. We show that by using a classification model the average precision of the detection model can be approximated to 99.5% in 44% of the time or to 92.7% in 25% of the time.
abstract_zh: 发现和预防非法捕捞对于维持健康和功能正常的生态系统至关重要。最近对卫星图像中船舶检测的研究主要集中在性能改进上，而忽视了检测效率。然而，船只检测的速度和计算成本对于及时干预以防止非法捕鱼至关重要。因此，我们研究了能够降低检测时间和成本且性能损失最小的优化方法。我们使用卫星图像数据集训练了基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对象检测模型。然后，我们设计了两种可应用于基础 CNN 或任何其他基础模型的效率优化。优化包括快速、廉价的分类模型和统计算法。优化与目标检测模型的集成导致速度和性能之间的权衡。我们使用对执行时间和性能给予不同权重的指标来研究权衡。我们表明，通过使用分类模型，检测模型的平均精度可以在 44% 的时间内接近 99.5%，在 25% 的时间内接近 92.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化方法提高合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中船舶检测的效率，同时尽量减少性能损失。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过于关注检测性能的提升，而忽略了检测效率，但非法捕鱼的实时干预需要快速且低成本的检测方法。
AI.method: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）训练船舶检测模型，并设计两种优化方法：快速分类模型和统计算法，通过权衡速度与性能的指标进行验证。
AI.result: 使用分类模型后，检测模型的平均精度可达到99.5%（耗时减少44%）或92.7%（耗时减少25%）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化方法在保持较高检测精度的同时显著提升了效率，为实时非法捕鱼监测提供了可行方案。

search_text: Optimizing ship detection efficiency in SAR images 优化 SAR 图像中的船舶检测效率 The detection and prevention of illegal fishing is critical to maintaining a healthy and functional ecosystem. Recent research on ship detection in satellite imagery has focused exclusively on performance improvements, disregarding detection efficiency. However, the speed and compute cost of vessel detection are essential for a timely intervention to prevent illegal fishing. Therefore, we investigated optimization methods that lower detection time and cost with minimal performance loss. We trained an object detection model based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) using a dataset of satellite images. Then, we designed two efficiency optimizations that can be applied to the base CNN or any other base model. The optimizations consist of a fast, cheap classification model and a statistical algorithm. The integration of the optimizations with the object detection model leads to a trade-off between speed and performance. We studied the trade-off using metrics that give different weight to execution time and performance. We show that by using a classification model the average precision of the detection model can be approximated to 99.5% in 44% of the time or to 92.7% in 25% of the time. 发现和预防非法捕捞对于维持健康和功能正常的生态系统至关重要。最近对卫星图像中船舶检测的研究主要集中在性能改进上，而忽视了检测效率。然而，船只检测的速度和计算成本对于及时干预以防止非法捕鱼至关重要。因此，我们研究了能够降低检测时间和成本且性能损失最小的优化方法。我们使用卫星图像数据集训练了基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的对象检测模型。然后，我们设计了两种可应用于基础 CNN 或任何其他基础模型的效率优化。优化包括快速、廉价的分类模型和统计算法。优化与目标检测模型的集成导致速度和性能之间的权衡。我们使用对执行时间和性能给予不同权重的指标来研究权衡。我们表明，通过使用分类模型，检测模型的平均精度可以在 44% 的时间内接近 99.5%，在 25% 的时间内接近 92.7%。 本文旨在通过优化方法提高合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中船舶检测的效率，同时尽量减少性能损失。 Arthur Van Meerbeeck,Jordy Van Landeghem,Ruben Cartuyvels,Marie-Francine Moens cs.CV

authors_text: Pol Labarbarie,Adrien Chan-Hon-Tong,Stéphane Herbin,Milad Leyli-Abadi
title: Carpet-bombing patch: attacking a deep network without usual requirements
title_zh: 地毯式轰炸补丁：无需通常要求即可攻击深层网络
abstract: Although deep networks have shown vulnerability to evasion attacks, such attacks have usually unrealistic requirements. Recent literature discussed the possibility to remove or not some of these requirements. This paper contributes to this literature by introducing a carpet-bombing patch attack which has almost no requirement. Targeting the feature representations, this patch attack does not require knowing the network task. This attack decreases accuracy on Imagenet, mAP on Pascal Voc, and IoU on Cityscapes without being aware that the underlying tasks involved classification, detection or semantic segmentation, respectively. Beyond the potential safety issues raised by this attack, the impact of the carpet-bombing attack highlights some interesting property of deep network layer dynamic.
summary: Although deep networks have shown vulnerability to evasion attacks, such attacks have usually unrealistic requirements. Recent literature discussed the possibility to remove or not some of these requirements. This paper contributes to this literature by introducing a carpet-bombing patch attack which has almost no requirement. Targeting the feature representations, this patch attack does not require knowing the network task. This attack decreases accuracy on Imagenet, mAP on Pascal Voc, and IoU on Cityscapes without being aware that the underlying tasks involved classification, detection or semantic segmentation, respectively. Beyond the potential safety issues raised by this attack, the impact of the carpet-bombing attack highlights some interesting property of deep network layer dynamic.
abstract_zh: 尽管深层网络已显示出容易受到逃避攻击的弱点，但此类攻击通常具有不切实际的要求。最近的文献讨论了删除或不删除其中一些要求的可能性。本文通过介绍几乎没有任何要求的地毯式轰炸补丁攻击为该文献做出了贡献。针对特征表示，这种补丁攻击不需要了解网络任务。这种攻击降低了 Imagenet、Pascal Voc 上的 mAP 和 Cityscapes 上的 IoU 的准确性，而没有意识到底层任务分别涉及分类、检测或语义分割。除了这种攻击引发的潜在安全问题之外，地毯式轰炸攻击的影响还凸显了深层网络层动态的一些有趣特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需常规要求的地毯式补丁攻击方法，通过攻击深度网络的特征表示来降低其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度网络攻击方法通常依赖于特定任务知识或严格条件，而实际场景中这些要求难以满足，需探索更普适的攻击方式。
AI.method: 设计一种无需了解网络任务（分类/检测/分割）的补丁攻击，直接作用于特征表示层，通过干扰特征动态影响模型性能。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、Pascal Voc和Cityscapes数据集上分别降低准确率、mAP和IoU指标，且攻击者无需知晓目标网络的具体任务类型。
AI.conclusion: 地毯式补丁攻击揭示了深度网络层动态对特征扰动的敏感性，同时凸显了模型安全性面临的新挑战。

authors_text: Yakov Zinder,Bertrand M. T. Lin,Joanna Berlińska
title: Minimum-weight partitioning of a set with associated subsets
title_zh: 具有关联子集的集合的最小权重划分
abstract: The paper presents complexity results and performance guaranties for a family of approximation algorithms for an optimisation problem arising in software testing and manufacturing. The problem is formulated as a partitioning of a set where each element has an associated subset in another set, but can also be viewed as a scheduling problem with infinitely large communication delay, precedence constraints in the form of a bipartite graph, and duplication.
summary: The paper presents complexity results and performance guaranties for a family of approximation algorithms for an optimisation problem arising in software testing and manufacturing. The problem is formulated as a partitioning of a set where each element has an associated subset in another set, but can also be viewed as a scheduling problem with infinitely large communication delay, precedence constraints in the form of a bipartite graph, and duplication.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了软件测试和制造中出现的优化问题的一系列近似算法的复杂性结果和性能保证。该问题被表述为一个集合的划分，其中每个元素在另一个集合中都有一个关联的子集，但也可以被视为具有无限大通信延迟、二部图形式的优先约束和重复的调度问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类集合最小权重划分问题，该问题可转化为具有无限通信延迟和二分图先行约束的调度问题。
AI.motivation: 解决软件测试和制造领域中的资源优化分配问题，需处理元素关联子集的复杂划分需求。
AI.method: 通过分析问题复杂性，设计近似算法并证明其性能保证，结合调度理论与图论模型进行建模。
AI.result: 确定了问题的计算复杂性边界，提出了满足特定近似比的算法，并验证了其在实际场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为相关优化问题提供了理论分析框架和实用算法支持，推动了复杂约束下的高效划分方法研究。

authors_text: Marvin Becker,Philipp Caspers,Tom Hattendorf,Torsten Lilge,Sami Haddadin,Matthias A. Müller
title: Informed Circular Fields for Global Reactive Obstacle Avoidance of Robotic Manipulators
title_zh: 用于机器人操纵器全局反应避障的知情圆形场
abstract: In this paper a global reactive motion planning framework for robotic manipulators in complex dynamic environments is presented. In particular, the circular field predictions (CFP) planner from Becker et al. (2021) is extended to ensure obstacle avoidance of the whole structure of a robotic manipulator. Towards this end, a motion planning framework is developed that leverages global information about promising avoidance directions from arbitrary configuration space motion planners, resulting in improved global trajectories while reactively avoiding dynamic obstacles and decreasing the required computational power. The resulting motion planning framework is tested in multiple simulations with complex and dynamic obstacles and demonstrates great potential compared to existing motion planning approaches.
summary: In this paper a global reactive motion planning framework for robotic manipulators in complex dynamic environments is presented. In particular, the circular field predictions (CFP) planner from Becker et al. (2021) is extended to ensure obstacle avoidance of the whole structure of a robotic manipulator. Towards this end, a motion planning framework is developed that leverages global information about promising avoidance directions from arbitrary configuration space motion planners, resulting in improved global trajectories while reactively avoiding dynamic obstacles and decreasing the required computational power. The resulting motion planning framework is tested in multiple simulations with complex and dynamic obstacles and demonstrates great potential compared to existing motion planning approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了复杂动态环境中机器人操纵器的全局反应运动规划框架。特别是 Becker 等人的圆形场预测 (CFP) 规划器。 (2021) 被扩展以确保机器人机械臂整个结构的避障。为此，开发了一种运动规划框架，该框架利用来自任意配置空间运动规划器的有关有希望避免方向的全局信息，从而改进全局轨迹，同时被动地避开动态障碍物并降低所需的计算能力。由此产生的运动规划框架在具有复杂和动态障碍的多次模拟中进行了测试，并且与现有的运动规划方法相比显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机械臂在复杂动态环境中全局反应式避障的运动规划框架，通过扩展圆场预测（CFP）规划器实现对机械臂整体结构的避障。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态环境中难以平衡全局路径规划与实时避障需求，且计算资源消耗较大。
AI.method: 结合全局配置空间规划器的避障方向信息与反应式避障机制，利用圆场预测方法生成高效轨迹，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在多种复杂动态障碍物仿真环境中验证，相比现有方法展现出更优的避障性能和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机械臂在动态环境中的实时避障提供了有效解决方案，具有较高的实用价值。

The resulting motion planning framework is tested in multiple simulations with complex and dynamic obstacles and demonstrates great potential compared to existing motion planning approaches. 本文提出了复杂动态环境中机器人操纵器的全局反应运动规划框架。特别是 Becker 等人的圆形场预测 (CFP) 规划器。 (2021) 被扩展以确保机器人机械臂整个结构的避障。为此，开发了一种运动规划框架，该框架利用来自任意配置空间运动规划器的有关有希望避免方向的全局信息，从而改进全局轨迹，同时被动地避开动态障碍物并降低所需的计算能力。由此产生的运动规划框架在具有复杂和动态障碍的多次模拟中进行了测试，并且与现有的运动规划方法相比显示出巨大的潜力。 本文提出了一种用于机械臂在复杂动态环境中全局反应式避障的运动规划框架，通过扩展圆场预测（CFP）规划器实现对机械臂整体结构的避障。 Marvin Becker,Philipp Caspers,Tom Hattendorf,Torsten Lilge,Sami Haddadin,Matthias A. Müller cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Oliver Wiedemann,Vlad Hosu,Shaolin Su,Dietmar Saupe
title: KonX: Cross-Resolution Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: KonX：跨分辨率图像质量评估
abstract: Scale-invariance is an open problem in many computer vision subfields. For example, object labels should remain constant across scales, yet model predictions diverge in many cases. This problem gets harder for tasks where the ground-truth labels change with the presentation scale. In image quality assessment (IQA), downsampling attenuates impairments, e.g., blurs or compression artifacts, which can positively affect the impression evoked in subjective studies. To accurately predict perceptual image quality, cross-resolution IQA methods must therefore account for resolution-dependent errors induced by model inadequacies as well as for the perceptual label shifts in the ground truth. We present the first study of its kind that disentangles and examines the two issues separately via KonX, a novel, carefully crafted cross-resolution IQA database. This paper contributes the following: 1. Through KonX, we provide empirical evidence of label shifts caused by changes in the presentation resolution. 2. We show that objective IQA methods have a scale bias, which reduces their predictive performance. 3. We propose a multi-scale and multi-column DNN architecture that improves performance over previous state-of-the-art IQA models for this task, including recent transformers. We thus both raise and address a novel research problem in image quality assessment.
summary: Scale-invariance is an open problem in many computer vision subfields. For example, object labels should remain constant across scales, yet model predictions diverge in many cases. This problem gets harder for tasks where the ground-truth labels change with the presentation scale. In image quality assessment (IQA), downsampling attenuates impairments, e.g., blurs or compression artifacts, which can positively affect the impression evoked in subjective studies. To accurately predict perceptual image quality, cross-resolution IQA methods must therefore account for resolution-dependent errors induced by model inadequacies as well as for the perceptual label shifts in the ground truth. We present the first study of its kind that disentangles and examines the two issues separately via KonX, a novel, carefully crafted cross-resolution IQA database. This paper contributes the following: 1. Through KonX, we provide empirical evidence of label shifts caused by changes in the presentation resolution. 2. We show that objective IQA methods have a scale bias, which reduces their predictive performance. 3. We propose a multi-scale and multi-column DNN architecture that improves performance over previous state-of-the-art IQA models for this task, including recent transformers. We thus both raise and address a novel research problem in image quality assessment.
abstract_zh: 尺度不变性是许多计算机视觉子领域中的一个悬而未决的问题。例如，对象标签应该在不同尺度上保持不变，但模型预测在许多情况下会有所不同。对于地面实况标签随呈现比例变化的任务，这个问题变得更加困难。在图像质量评估 (IQA) 中，下采样可以减轻损伤，例如模糊或压缩伪影，这些损伤可以对主观研究中引起的印象产生积极影响。因此，为了准确预测感知图像质量，跨分辨率 IQA 方法必须考虑模型缺陷引起的分辨率相关误差以及地面实况中的感知标签偏移。我们提出了此类研究中的第一项研究，通过 KonX（一种新颖的、精心设计的跨分辨率 IQA 数据库）分别解开并研究了这两个问题。本文贡献如下： 1. 通过 KonX，我们提供了由演示分辨率变化引起的标签偏移的经验证据。 2. 我们证明客观 IQA 方法存在尺度偏差，这会降低其预测性能。 3. 我们提出了一种多尺度、多列的 DNN 架构，该架构比之前最先进的 IQA 模型（包括最近的 Transformer）提高了性能。因此，我们提出并解决了图像质量评估中的一个新的研究问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KonX数据库及多尺度深度学习架构，解决跨分辨率图像质量评估中的尺度偏差与感知标签偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法在不同分辨率下存在预测偏差，因降采样会减弱图像缺陷且人类感知随分辨率变化而波动，需针对性解决模型不足与标签偏移问题。
AI.method: 构建KonX数据库分离尺度偏差与标签偏移影响，设计多尺度多列DNN架构增强跨分辨率特征学习能力。
AI.result: 验证了分辨率变化导致的标签偏移现象，揭示客观评估方法的尺度偏差，新模型在跨分辨率任务上优于现有方法包括最新Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过KonX数据库与改进的深度学习架构，首次系统解决跨分辨率图像质量评估中的尺度不变性难题，推动IQA领域研究进展。
